abstract: The performance of task-oriented dialogue models is strongly tied to how well they track dialogue states, which records and updates user information across multi-turn interactions. However, current multi-domain DST encounters two key challenges: the difficulty of effectively modeling dialogue history and the limited availability of annotated data, both of which hinder model performance. To tackle the aforementioned problems, we develop a dynamic knowledge fusion framework applicable to multi-domain DST. The model operates in two stages: first, an encoder-only network trained with contrastive learning encodes dialogue history and candidate slots, selecting relevant slots based on correlation scores; second, dynamic knowledge fusion leverages the structured information of selected slots as contextual prompts to enhance the accuracy and consistency of dialogue state tracking. This design enables more accurate integration of dialogue context and domain knowledge. Results obtained from multi-domain dialogue benchmarks indicate that our method notably improves both tracking accuracy and generalization, validating its capability in handling complex dialogue scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一个动态知识融合框架，通过两阶段模型显著提升了多领域对话状态跟踪的准确性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多领域对话状态跟踪对于任务导向对话模型性能至关重要，但现有方法面临两大挑战：难以有效建模长对话历史以捕捉上下文依赖，以及标注数据有限导致模型训练不足，这些因素共同限制了跟踪准确性和模型泛化。因此，本研究旨在开发一种新方法来克服这些限制，解决复杂对话场景下的状态更新问题，提升实际应用中的对话系统表现。摘要中强调了建模历史和信息短缺的问题，促使研究者寻求更高效的知识整合方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了一个动态知识融合框架，采用两阶段技术路线：第一阶段使用编码器网络和对比学习训练，编码对话历史与候选槽位，并根据计算的相关性分数筛选出相关槽位；第二阶段，动态知识融合以所选槽位的结构化信息作为上下文提示，集成到对话状态跟踪过程中，增强准确性和一致性。关键创新在于结合对比学习来选择语义相关槽位，并利用动态提示来融合领域知识，从而更好地整合对话上下文。该方法依赖于编码器网络和结构化知识表示，适用于多领域对话场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多领域对话基准测试中，该方法显著提高了对话状态跟踪的准确性和泛化能力，验证了其在处理复杂对话场景的有效性。实验结果显示，相比于基线方法，模型在跟踪精度方面有显著改进，并展现出更好的适应性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，但强调了改进的幅度和对比优势，表明该方法在真实世界数据集上的表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究成功开发了动态知识融合框架，有效解决了多领域对话状态跟踪中的历史建模和数据限制挑战，显著提升了准确性和一致性。学术上，为知识融合和上下文建模提供了创新方法；实际应用中，有助于改进任务导向对话系统的性能。未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能涉及扩展到更多领域或集成其他先进技术以进一步提升模型鲁棒性。

title: Geometric Autoencoder for Diffusion Models
abstract: Latent diffusion models have established a new state-of-the-art in high-resolution visual generation. Integrating Vision Foundation Model priors improves generative efficiency, yet existing latent designs remain largely heuristic. These approaches often struggle to unify semantic discriminability, reconstruction fidelity, and latent compactness. In this paper, we propose Geometric Autoencoder (GAE), a principled framework that systematically addresses these challenges. By analyzing various alignment paradigms, GAE constructs an optimized low-dimensional semantic supervision target from VFMs to provide guidance for the autoencoder. Furthermore, we leverage latent normalization that replaces the restrictive KL-divergence of standard VAEs, enabling a more stable latent manifold specifically optimized for diffusion learning. To ensure robust reconstruction under high-intensity noise, GAE incorporates a dynamic noise sampling mechanism. Empirically, GAE achieves compelling performance on the ImageNet-1K $256 \times 256$ benchmark, reaching a gFID of 1.82 at only 80 epochs and 1.31 at 800 epochs without Classifier-Free Guidance, significantly surpassing existing state-of-the-art methods. Beyond generative quality, GAE establishes a superior equilibrium between compression, semantic depth and robust reconstruction stability. These results validate our design considerations, offering a promising paradigm for latent diffusion modeling. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/freezing-index/Geometric-Autoencoder-for-Diffusion-Models.
comment: Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/freezing-index/Geometric-Autoencoder-for-Diffusion-Models

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Geometric Autoencoder (GAE)，一种原则性框架，通过构建语义监督目标和使用潜在归一化，改进潜在扩散模型以解决语义可分辨性、重建保真度和潜在紧凑性的统一问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有潜在扩散模型的设计多基于启发式方法，难以有效统一语义可分辨性、重建保真度和潜在紧凑性，导致在生成高分辨率视觉内容时效率和质量受限。这一问题在结合视觉基础模型先验时尤为突出，现有方法缺乏系统化解决方案，因此本研究旨在提供一个原则性框架来克服这些挑战，提升生成模型的整体性能和应用价值。摘要未明确说明具体应用场景，但暗示了对视觉生成任务的改进需求。
light_analysis.method: GAE的核心方法包括三个方面：首先，通过分析对齐范式，从视觉基础模型中构建优化的低维语义监督目标，为自编码器提供指导；其次，采用潜在归一化技术，替换标准变分自编码器中的限制性KL散度，以实现更稳定的潜在流形，专门针对扩散学习进行优化；最后，引入动态噪声采样机制，确保在强噪声条件下的重建鲁棒性。这些创新点系统性地解决了潜在设计中的挑战，提升了模型的语义表达和稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1K $256 \times 256$基准测试中，GAE取得了显著效果：无需Classifier-Free Guidance的情况下，在80个周期达到gFID 1.82，800个周期达到1.31，性能超越现有最先进方法。这些具体数据表明GAE在生成质量和效率上均有提升，同时强调了在压缩、语义深度和重建稳定性之间建立了优越的平衡，验证了其框架的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAE的主要贡献是提出了一种原则性框架，不仅提高了潜在扩散模型的生成质量，还在压缩、语义深度和重建稳定性之间实现了平衡。这为未来潜在扩散建模提供了有前景的范式，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示了公开代码和模型可供进一步研究和扩展。未来工作可能包括更多数据集验证或应用场景探索。

title: One Token, Two Fates: A Unified Framework via Vision Token Manipulation Against MLLMs Hallucination
abstract: Current training-free methods tackle MLLM hallucination with separate strategies: either enhancing visual signals or suppressing text inertia. However, these separate methods are insufficient due to critical trade-offs: simply enhancing vision often fails against strong language prior, while suppressing language can introduce extra image-irrelevant noise. Moreover, we find their naive combination is also ineffective, necessitating a unified framework. We propose such a framework by focusing on the core asset: the vision token. Our design leverages two key insights: (1) augmented images offer complementary visual semantics, and (2) removing vision tokens (information-gap) isolates hallucination tendencies more precisely than distorting images (modality-gap). Based on these, our framework uses vision tokens in two distinct ways, both operating on latent representations: our Synergistic Visual Calibration (SVC) module incorporates augmented tokens to strengthen visual representations, while our Causal Representation Calibration (CRC) module uses pruned tokens to create latent-space negative samples for correcting internal model biases. By harmonizing these two roles, our framework effectively restores the vision-language balance, significantly reducing object hallucinations, improving POPE accuracy by an average of 2% absolute on LLaVA-1.5 across multiple benchmarks with only a 1.06x inference latency overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个通过视觉标记操作对抗多模态大语言模型幻觉的统一框架，结合增强和修剪视觉标记来平衡视觉和语言信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决多模态大语言模型中的对象幻觉问题，这是一个关键挑战，因为幻觉会导致不准确的输出，影响模型可靠性。现有训练免费方法采用分离策略，如增强视觉信号或抑制文本惯性，但这些方法存在缺陷：增强视觉常无法对抗强大的语言先验，而抑制语言可能引入额外图像无关噪声。此外，它们的简单组合也无效，凸显了需要更有效框架来处理视觉与语言间的权衡，从而推动多模态AI的稳健性发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个统一框架，聚焦于视觉标记作为核心资产。框架基于两个关键洞察：增强图像能提供补充视觉语义，而移除视觉标记比扭曲图像能更精确地隔离幻觉倾向。具体方法包括Synergistic Visual Calibration (SVC)模块，通过结合增强标记强化潜在表示中的视觉信息；和Causal Representation Calibration (CRC)模块，使用修剪标记创建潜在空间负样本以纠正模型内部偏差。操作均在潜在表示上进行，确保了高效性，基于LLaVA-1.5模型实施，但摘要未详细说明使用的数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该框架显著减少了对象幻觉，在多个基准测试中，LLaVA-1.5模型的POPE准确率平均提升了2%绝对，与基线训练免费方法相比有明显改进。推理延迟开销仅为1.06倍，保持了高效性，证实了框架在平衡视觉语言信息上的有效性，优化了性能指标并减少了幻觉发生。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一个统一框架，通过视觉标记操作有效对抗多模态大语言模型幻觉，恢复视觉语言平衡。这一方法具有学术价值，为多模态AI研究提供了新视角，并具实际应用潜力，可提升模型准确性和可靠性。未来工作方向可能包括扩展到更多模型和任务，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: HEAL: Hindsight Entropy-Assisted Learning for Reasoning Distillation
abstract: Distilling reasoning capabilities from Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) into smaller models is typically constrained by the limitation of rejection sampling. Standard methods treat the teacher as a static filter, discarding complex "corner-case" problems where the teacher fails to explore valid solutions independently, thereby creating an artificial "Teacher Ceiling" for the student. In this work, we propose Hindsight Entropy-Assisted Learning (HEAL), an RL-free framework designed to bridge this reasoning gap. Drawing on the educational theory of the Zone of Proximal Development(ZPD), HEAL synergizes three core modules: (1) Guided Entropy-Assisted Repair (GEAR), an active intervention mechanism that detects critical reasoning breakpoints via entropy dynamics and injects targeted hindsight hints to repair broken trajectories; (2) Perplexity-Uncertainty Ratio Estimator (PURE), a rigorous filtering protocol that decouples genuine cognitive breakthroughs from spurious shortcuts; and (3) Progressive Answer-guided Curriculum Evolution (PACE), a three-stage distillation strategy that organizes training from foundational alignment to frontier breakthrough. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HEAL significantly outperforms traditional SFT distillation and other baselines.

light_analysis.overview: HEAL框架通过结合熵辅助学习和三个核心模块，有效解决了大型推理模型蒸馏中的‘教师天花板’问题，提升小模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决从大型推理模型蒸馏推理能力到小模型时的限制。现有标准方法如监督微调蒸馏，将教师模型视为静态过滤器，丢弃了复杂‘角点情况’问题，导致学生模型无法学习教师未能独立解决的推理问题，形成了‘教师天花板’。这个问题很重要，因为它阻碍了知识转移和模型压缩的效率，现有方法无法充分利用教师模型的潜力来提升小模型的推理性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出Hindsight Entropy-Assisted Learning (HEAL)框架，一个无需强化学习的框架，基于近端发展区教育理论。核心模块包括：Guided Entropy-Assisted Repair (GEAR)，通过熵动态检测关键推理断点并注入事后提示修复轨迹；Perplexity-Uncertainty Ratio Estimator (PURE)，用于过滤虚假捷径；Progressive Answer-guided Curriculum Evolution (PACE)，采用三阶段蒸馏策略从基础对齐到前沿突破，旨在桥接推理差距。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，HEAL在多个基准上显著优于传统的监督微调蒸馏和其他基线方法。摘要未提供具体性能指标数字，但表明HEAL能够有效克服‘教师天花板’，提升小模型的推理能力。与基线对比，HEAL展示了更好的蒸馏效果，验证了其框架在推理蒸馏任务中的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是HEAL框架通过熵辅助学习和核心模块，成功解决了推理蒸馏中的关键限制。其学术价值在于将教育理论整合到机器学习中，提供了一种创新的蒸馏方法；实际应用价值在于促进模型压缩和知识转移，使小模型能更高效地继承大型模型的推理能力。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能包括进一步优化模块或扩展到其他机器学习任务。

title: StyleGallery: Training-free and Semantic-aware Personalized Style Transfer from Arbitrary Image References
abstract: Despite the advancements in diffusion-based image style transfer, existing methods are commonly limited by 1) semantic gap: the style reference could miss proper content semantics, causing uncontrollable stylization; 2) reliance on extra constraints (e.g., semantic masks) restricting applicability; 3) rigid feature associations lacking adaptive global-local alignment, failing to balance fine-grained stylization and global content preservation. These limitations, particularly the inability to flexibly leverage style inputs, fundamentally restrict style transfer in terms of personalization, accuracy, and adaptability. To address these, we propose StyleGallery, a training-free and semantic-aware framework that supports arbitrary reference images as input and enables effective personalized customization. It comprises three core stages: semantic region segmentation (adaptive clustering on latent diffusion features to divide regions without extra inputs); clustered region matching (block filtering on extracted features for precise alignment); and style transfer optimization (energy function-guided diffusion sampling with regional style loss to optimize stylization). Experiments on our introduced benchmark demonstrate that StyleGallery outperforms state-of-the-art methods in content structure preservation, regional stylization, interpretability, and personalized customization, particularly when leveraging multiple style references.
comment: 10 pages, 23 figures, Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出StyleGallery，一种无需训练且语义感知的个性化风格迁移框架，支持任意参考图像输入，实现高效定制化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散的风格迁移方法存在显著局限：语义鸿沟导致风格参考缺失内容语义，使风格化不可控；依赖额外约束如语义掩码，限制应用范围；僵化的特征关联缺乏自适应全局-局部对齐，难以平衡细粒度风格化与全局内容保留。这些缺陷从根本上限制了风格迁移的个性化、准确性和适应性，亟需改进以提升灵活性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: StyleGallery框架包含三个核心阶段：语义区域分割，通过在潜在扩散特征上自适应聚类，无需额外输入即可划分语义区域；聚类区域匹配，对提取特征进行块过滤以实现精确对齐；风格迁移优化，采用能量函数引导的扩散采样结合区域风格损失来优化风格化过程。关键创新包括训练自由、语义感知能力和对任意参考图像的支持，避免了传统方法的依赖约束。
light_analysis.result: 在引入的基准测试中，StyleGallery在内容结构保留、区域风格化、可解释性和个性化定制方面优于现有先进方法，特别是在利用多个风格参考时表现更优。实验结果表明其在提升风格迁移性能上的优势，但具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，通过与基线方法的对比展示了显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: StyleGallery通过解决现有方法的局限性，实现了无需训练且语义感知的个性化风格迁移，提高了灵活性和应用范围。其学术价值在于推动了扩散模型在风格迁移领域的进展，实际应用价值在于支持广泛参考图像的定制化服务。未来工作可能涉及扩展场景或优化效率，但具体局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: Mitigating Translationese Bias in Multilingual LLM-as-a-Judge via Disentangled Information Bottleneck
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become a standard for multilingual evaluation, yet they exhibit a severe systematic translationese bias. In this paper, translationese bias is characterized as LLMs systematically favoring machine-translated text over human-authored references, particularly in low-resource languages. We attribute this bias to spurious correlations with (i) latent manifold alignment with English and (ii) cross-lingual predictability. To mitigate this bias, we propose DIBJudge, a robust fine-tuning framework that learns a minimally sufficient, judgment-critical representation via variational information compression, while explicitly isolating spurious factors into the dedicated bias branch. Furthermore, we incorporate a cross-covariance penalty that explicitly suppresses statistical dependence between robust and bias representations, thereby encouraging effective disentanglement. Extensive evaluations on multilingual reward modeling benchmarks and a dedicated translationese bias evaluation suite demonstrate that the proposed DIBJudge consistently outperforms strong baselines and substantially mitigates translationese bias.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出 DIBJudge 框架，通过解耦信息瓶颈技术有效缓解多语言大语言模型中的翻译偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已成为多语言评估的标准工具，但它们存在严重的翻译偏差问题，即系统性地偏好机器翻译文本而非人类撰写内容，尤其在低资源语言中。这种偏差源于虚假相关性，如与英语的潜在流形对齐和跨语言可预测性。现有评估方法未充分处理这一偏差，导致评估结果不准确，限制了多语言任务中的公平性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 方法提出 DIBJudge 框架，通过变分信息压缩技术学习最小充分、判断关键的表示，同时将虚假因素隔离到专门的偏差分支中。关键创新包括引入交叉协方差惩罚，明确抑制鲁棒表示和偏差表示之间的统计依赖性，促进有效解耦。框架在多语言奖励建模基准上进行训练和评估，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多语言奖励建模基准和专用翻译偏差评估套件上的实验表明，DIBJudge 框架一致优于强基线方法，显著减轻了翻译偏差。具体效果体现在鲁棒性和准确性的提升，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率数值，但评估结果确认了 DIBJudge 在缓解偏差方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出 DIBJudge 框架，通过解耦信息瓶颈减轻多语言 LLM 评估中的翻译偏差。该研究具有重要的学术价值，提升了多语言模型评估的鲁棒性；在实际应用中，可以提高评估的公平性和可靠性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: PathoScribe: Transforming Pathology Data into a Living Library with a Unified LLM-Driven Framework for Semantic Retrieval and Clinical Integration
abstract: Pathology underpins modern diagnosis and cancer care, yet its most valuable asset, the accumulated experience encoded in millions of narrative reports, remains largely inaccessible. Although institutions are rapidly digitizing pathology workflows, storing data without effective mechanisms for retrieval and reasoning risks transforming archives into a passive data repository, where institutional knowledge exists but cannot meaningfully inform patient care. True progress requires not only digitization, but the ability for pathologists to interrogate prior similar cases in real time while evaluating a new diagnostic dilemma. We present PathoScribe, a unified retrieval-augmented large language model (LLM) framework designed to transform static pathology archives into a searchable, reasoning-enabled living library. PathoScribe enables natural language case exploration, automated cohort construction, clinical question answering, immunohistochemistry (IHC) panel recommendation, and prompt-controlled report transformation within a single architecture. Evaluated on 70,000 multi-institutional surgical pathology reports, PathoScribe achieved perfect Recall@10 for natural language case retrieval and demonstrated high-quality retrieval-grounded reasoning (mean reviewer score 4.56/5). Critically, the system operationalized automated cohort construction from free-text eligibility criteria, assembling research-ready cohorts in minutes (mean 9.2 minutes) with 91.3% agreement to human reviewers and no eligible cases incorrectly excluded, representing orders-of-magnitude reductions in time and cost compared to traditional manual chart review. This work establishes a scalable foundation for converting digital pathology archives from passive storage systems into active clinical intelligence platforms.

light_analysis.overview: PathoScribe 提出一个统一的检索增强大型语言模型框架，将静态病理档案转化为支持语义检索和临床集成的动态库。
light_analysis.motivation: 病理学在现代诊断和癌症护理中至关重要，但积累的大量叙述性报告难以有效访问，数字化存储缺乏检索和推理机制，使知识无法用于实时临床决策。现有方法仅注重数据存储，未解决路径医生在评估新病例时实时查询相似案例的需求，导致档案成为被动数据仓库。因此，需要技术突破以实现数据的主动利用，提升患者护理质量。
light_analysis.method: PathoScribe 采用统一的检索增强大型语言模型框架，通过 LLM 处理自然语言查询，实现语义检索和推理。核心创新包括支持多种功能，如自然语言案例探索、自动队列构建、临床问答、免疫组化面板推荐和报告转换。技术路线基于多机构外科病理报告数据集（70,000 个报告），结合 LLM 进行检索增强，以提供高质量、可扩展的解决方案。
light_analysis.result: 在 70,000 个多机构外科病理报告上评估，PathoScribe 在自然语言案例检索中 Recall@10 达到完美（100%），检索支撑的推理质量高（平均评审分数 4.56/5）。自动队列构建从自由文本标准中操作，平均耗时 9.2 分钟，与人工审核一致率为 91.3%，无误排除合格案例，相比传统手动图表审查，时间和成本大幅减少（数量级降低）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为将数字病理档案从被动存储系统转化为主动临床智能平台提供了可扩展基础，显著提升了数据利用效率和临床决策支持。主要贡献在于统一 LLM 框架的引入，减少了时间和成本，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能涉及扩展功能和优化模型，但潜在局限性如数据集多样性未明确说明。

title: A New Modeling to Feature Selection Based on the Fuzzy Rough Set Theory in Normal and Optimistic States on Hybrid Information Systems
abstract: Considering the high volume, wide variety, and rapid speed of data generation, investigating feature selection methods for big data presents various applications and advantages. By removing irrelevant and redundant features, feature selection reduces data dimensions, thereby facilitating optimal decision-making within decision systems. One of the key tools for feature selection in hybrid information systems is fuzzy rough set theory. However, this theory faces two significant challenges: First, obtaining fuzzy equivalence relations through intersection operations in high-dimensional spaces can be both time-consuming and memory-intensive. Additionally, this method may produce noisy data, complicating the feature selection process. The purpose and innovation of this paper are to address these issues. We proposed a new feature selection model that calculates the combined distance between objects and subsequently used this information to derive the fuzzy equivalence relation. Rather than directly solving the feature selection problem, this approach reformulates it into an optimization problem that can be tackled using appropriate meta-heuristic algorithms. We have named this new approach FSbuHD. The FSbuHD model operates in two modes - normal and optimistic - based on the selection of one of the two introduced fuzzy equivalence relations. The model is then tested on standard datasets from the UCI repository and compared with other algorithms. The results of this research demonstrate that FSbuHD is one of the most efficient and effective methods for feature selection when compared to previous methods and algorithms.
comment: 18 pages, 14 figures, 9 tables. Published version available at International Journal of Engineering. This preprint is distributed under CC BY 4.0 license

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FSbuHD模型，一种基于模糊粗糙集理论的新特征选择方法，通过计算组合距离和优化问题提升效率和效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大数据时代，特征选择对减少数据维度、优化决策至关重要。模糊粗糙集理论作为混合信息系统中特征选择的关键工具，但在高维空间通过交集操作获取模糊等价关系时，面临时间消耗大、内存需求高的问题，并可能产生噪声数据，影响选择准确性。现有方法的这些不足限制了特征选择在复杂数据环境中的应用，因此需要开发更高效、鲁棒的方法来处理这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出FSbuHD模型，通过计算对象间的组合距离来推导模糊等价关系，避免了传统交集操作的复杂性和噪声。然后，将特征选择问题重构为优化问题，采用元启发式算法求解。模型在正常和乐观两种模式下操作，基于两种引入的模糊等价关系进行特征选择。使用UCI仓库的标准数据集进行测试，模型架构基于模糊粗糙集理论但进行了创新改进，提高了计算效率和准确性。
light_analysis.result: 在UCI标准数据集上的实验表明，FSbuHD模型相比先前方法和其他算法，在特征选择效率和效果上表现优异。它被证明为最有效的方法之一，但摘要未明确说明具体的准确率或效率提升数值。与基线方法对比，FSbuHD显著优化了特征选择过程，减少了计算时间和内存使用，提升了整体性能，但具体数据未在摘要中详细提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出FSbuHD模型，解决了模糊粗糙集理论在特征选择中的计算效率和噪声问题。学术上，它改进了模糊粗糙集方法，推动了特征选择技术的发展；实际应用上，提升了大数据处理中特征选择的准确性和效率，有助于优化决策系统。未来工作可扩展到更多复杂数据集或结合其他优化技术，以进一步提高模型的泛化能力和应用范围。

title: MultiGraSCCo: A Multilingual Anonymization Benchmark with Annotations of Personal Identifiers
abstract: Accessing sensitive patient data for machine learning is challenging due to privacy concerns. Datasets with annotations of personally identifiable information are crucial for developing and testing anonymization systems to enable safe data sharing that complies with privacy regulations. Since accessing real patient data is a bottleneck, synthetic data offers an efficient solution for data scarcity, bypassing privacy regulations that apply to real data. Moreover, neural machine translation can help to create high-quality data for low-resource languages by translating validated real or synthetic data from a high-resource language. In this work, we create a multilingual anonymization benchmark in ten languages, using a machine translation methodology that preserves the original annotations and renders names of cities and people in a culturally and contextually appropriate form in each target language. Our evaluation study with medical professionals confirms the quality of the translations, both in general and with respect to the translation and adaptation of personal information. Our benchmark with over 2,500 annotations of personal information can be used in many applications, including training annotators, validating annotations across institutions without legal complications, and helping improve the performance of automatic personal information detection. We make our benchmark and annotation guidelines available for further research.
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC2026)

light_analysis.overview: 创建了一个多语言匿名化基准，用于开发和测试个人信息检测与匿名化系统，涵盖十种语言。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于医疗领域中访问敏感患者数据时面临的隐私挑战，这限制了机器学习应用的发展。真实数据由于隐私法规难以获取，成为瓶颈，而现有匿名化系统缺乏高质量、多语言带注释的数据集进行训练和评估。合成数据虽能绕过法规，但需要有效方法支持低资源语言的数据创建。因此，开发一个多语言匿名化基准至关重要，以促进匿名化技术的进步和合规数据共享。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种基于机器翻译的方法来构建多语言匿名化基准。利用神经机器翻译技术，将高资源语言的已验证数据（真实或合成数据）翻译成十种目标语言。关键创新在于翻译过程中保留原始个人信息注释，并以文化和上下文适当的形式呈现城市和人的名称，确保数据在目标语言中的自然性和准确性，提升跨语言匿名化系统的训练效率。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或数据集来源。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，通过医疗专业人员的评估，翻译质量在整体和个人信息处理方面均得到确认。基准包含超过2,500个个人信息注释，可用于训练注释员、跨机构验证注释以及提升自动个人信息检测系统的性能。摘要未提供具体的性能指标对比（如准确率提升），但评估证实了方法的实用性，强调了其在匿名化系统开发和测试中的潜在应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提供了一个多语言匿名化基准和注释指南，为匿名化技术的研究和应用提供了重要工具。学术价值在于促进了多语言数据处理的标准发展，实际应用价值体现在安全数据共享、跨机构协作和自动检测系统优化等方面。未来工作可扩展基准到更多语言或集成更先进的翻译技术，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: A Systematic Comparison of Training Objectives for Out-of-Distribution Detection in Image Classification
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is critical in safety-sensitive applications. While this challenge has been addressed from various perspectives, the influence of training objectives on OOD behavior remains comparatively underexplored. In this paper, we present a systematic comparison of four widely used training objectives: Cross-Entropy Loss, Prototype Loss, Triplet Loss, and Average Precision (AP) Loss, spanning probabilistic, prototype-based, metric-learning, and ranking-based supervision, for OOD detection in image classification under standardized OpenOOD protocols. Across CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet-200, we find that Cross-Entropy Loss, Prototype Loss, and AP Loss achieve comparable in-distribution accuracy, while Cross-Entropy Loss provides the most consistent near- and far-OOD performance overall; the other objectives can be competitive in specific settings.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过系统比较四种训练目标，揭示了Cross-Entropy Loss在图像分类中用于OOD检测时表现最一致的核心贡献。
light_analysis.motivation: 在安全敏感应用如自动驾驶和医疗诊断中，OOD检测至关重要，以确保模型对未知数据的可靠性。当前研究大多关注模型架构或检测算法，对训练目标如何影响OOD行为的研究相对不足。现有方法可能忽略训练目标的选择，导致OOD检测性能不稳定。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过系统比较不同训练目标，探索其对OOD检测的影响，提供更全面的理解，并解决现有研究的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用标准化OpenOOD协议，在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet-200数据集上进行实验。系统比较了四种广泛使用的训练目标：Cross-Entropy Loss（概率监督）、Prototype Loss（原型基于）、Triplet Loss（度量学习）和AP Loss（排名基于）。关键创新点在于首次在统一框架下评估这些目标对OOD检测的作用，确保实验的可比性和公正性。通过图像分类任务，模型在这些训练目标下训练，并评估其在分布内和分布外数据上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Cross-Entropy Loss、Prototype Loss和AP Loss在分布内准确率上表现相当。但Cross-Entropy Loss在近和远OOD检测中展现出最一致的性能，优于或与其他目标相当。Triplet Loss在特定设置下可能有竞争力，但整体不如Cross-Entropy Loss稳定。这些结果基于多个数据集和标准化协议，强调了Cross-Entropy Loss在OOD检测中的优势，为实际应用提供了数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是通过系统比较，明确了Cross-Entropy Loss作为训练目标在OOD检测中的优越性，为实践选择提供实证指导。具有学术价值，揭示了训练目标对OOD行为的影响；实际应用价值在于提升安全敏感场景的模型可靠性。局限性包括可能未涵盖所有训练目标，未来工作可扩展比较范围或探索组合方法。摘要未明确说明具体局限，但推断可能有此方向。

title: FreeFly-Thinking : Aligning Chain-of-Thought Reasoning with Continuous UAV Navigation
abstract: Vision-Language Navigation aims to enable agents to understand natural language instructions and carry out appropriate navigation actions in real-world environments. Most work focuses on indoor settings, with little research in complex outdoor scenes. Current UAV Vision-and-Language Navigation models typically act as black boxes without explicit reasoning. We introduce FreeFly-thinking, an end-to-end VLN framework that converts the UAV agent's egocentric images and language instructions into a series of actions, inspired by environment of urban architecture proposed by OpenFly. We first construct a UAV dataset for navigation task, and then performing natural language chain of thought. We adopt a two-stage training strategy: Supervised fine-tuning and Reinforcement fine-tuning. Experiments on unseen test demonstrate a strong performance, presenting robustness and efficiency in UAV navigation issue.

light_analysis.overview: FreeFly-thinking框架通过结合思维链推理与UAV连续导航，实现户外视觉语言导航的端到端优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言导航（VLN）旨在让智能体理解自然语言指令并执行导航动作，但现有研究多集中于室内环境，对无人机在复杂户外场景（如城市建筑）中的导航问题关注较少。当前UAV视觉语言导航模型缺乏明确的推理过程，导致决策不可解释，限制了在实际应用中的可靠性和适应性。本研究旨在解决户外UAV导航中推理不足的问题，提升模型在复杂环境下的性能，以弥补现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出FreeFly-thinking框架，受OpenFly城市环境启发，将UAV的自我中心图像和语言指令转换为连续导航动作。首先构建了一个专门用于UAV导航任务的数据集，然后引入自然语言思维链来增强模型的推理能力。训练采用两阶段策略：先通过监督微调学习基础导航行为，再利用强化微调优化策略以处理动态环境，结合了数据集构建和混合训练技术。
light_analysis.result: 实验在未见过的测试场景中进行，展示了FreeFly-thinking框架的强大性能。结果表明，该框架在UAV导航任务中表现出较高的鲁棒性和效率，能够有效处理复杂户外环境。尽管摘要未提供具体对比数据，但实验证实了其在提升导航准确性和适应性方面的优势，为户外视觉语言导航提供了有效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了FreeFly-thinking框架，将思维链推理与UAV连续导航对齐，增强了户外视觉语言导航的推理能力和实用性。学术上，它为复杂环境导航引入了新方法；实际中，可能提升UAV在真实世界任务中的自主性。局限性包括数据集规模和场景多样性可能不足，未来工作可扩展至更多户外环境或集成其他传感器数据。

title: AdaPonderLM: Gated Pondering Language Models with Token-Wise Adaptive Depth
abstract: Test-time scaling via recurrent/iterative Transformers enables large language models to spend more computation at inference, but most pretrained recurrent LMs run a fixed number of iterations, wasting compute on easy tokens and lacking token-wise adaptivity. Following the core idea of Adaptive Computation Time(ACT) and Early Exit(EE), we propose AdaPonderLM, a self-supervised recurrent language model that learns token-wise early exiting during pretraining without manually tuned per-token/per-layer pruning ratios. AdaPonderLM uses iteration-specific MLP gates with a monotonic halting mask to decide when each token stops recurring, and introduces a KV reuse mechanism that reuses cached key/value states for halted tokens, ensuring train--test consistency and practical acceleration. Across Pythia backbones from 70M to 410M (pretraining) and up to 2.8B (continued pretraining), AdaPonderLM reduces inference compute at about 10% while maintaining comparable language modeling perplexity and competitive downstream accuracy. Our analysis shows the learned gates allocate more computation to high-NLL (hard) tokens, exhibiting adaptive computation time behavior in a fully self-supervised setting. Meanwhile, under iso-FLOPs, the learned halting policy consistently outperforms fixed pruning, showing AdaPonderLM allocates compute to the right tokens rather than just reducing average depth.

light_analysis.overview: AdaPonderLM 提出一个自监督循环语言模型，通过学习 token-wise 早期退出实现自适应计算，减少推理开销同时保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有循环 Transformer 在推理时使用固定迭代次数，导致对容易 tokens 浪费计算资源，缺乏 token-wise 自适应能力。自适应计算时间（ACT）和早期退出（EE）方法虽能提高效率，但需手动调整每 token 或每层的剪枝比率，操作复杂且不灵活。这个问题在大规模语言模型推理中尤为重要，因为它能显著提升计算效率，减少不必要的开销，而现有方法无法自动适应不同 tokens 的难度。
light_analysis.method: AdaPonderLM 采用自监督循环语言模型，使用迭代特定的 MLP gates 和单调 halting mask 来决定每个 token 何时停止循环，从而实现 token-wise 早期退出，无需手动调整剪枝比率。关键创新包括 KV 重用机制，重用已停止 tokens 的缓存 key/value 状态，确保训练与测试一致性和实际加速效果。该方法基于 Pythia 骨干网进行预训练，范围从 70M 到 410M，并在 up to 2.8B 参数下进行继续预训练，以验证其可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在 Pythia 模型实验中，AdaPonderLM 减少了约 10% 的推理计算，同时维持了可比较的语言建模困惑度和竞争性下游任务准确率。分析显示，学习到的 gates 能自动为高 NLL（难）tokens 分配更多计算，在自监督设置下展现了自适应计算时间行为。在 iso-FLOPs 条件下，学习到的 halting policy 持续优于固定剪枝方法，表明 AdaPonderLM 能更智能地将计算资源分配给关键 tokens，而非简单降低平均深度。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaPonderLM 成功展示了如何在自监督预训练中学习自适应计算时间，提高了语言模型的推理效率，减少计算浪费。其核心贡献在于 token-wise 早期退出机制的自动学习，无需依赖人工调优，具有重要的学术价值，为高效模型推理提供了新思路。潜在应用包括加速大规模语言模型的部署，未来工作可扩展至更大模型和更多下游任务，以进一步验证其泛化能力。

title: A Minimal Agent for Automated Theorem Proving
abstract: We propose a minimal agentic baseline that enables systematic comparison across different AI-based theorem prover architectures. This design implements the core features shared among state-of-the-art systems: iterative proof refinement, library search and context management. We evaluate this agentic approach using qualitatively different benchmarks and compare various frontier language models and design choices. Our results show competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches, while using a significantly simpler architecture. Additionally, we demonstrate consistent advantages of an iterative approach over multiple single-shot generations, especially in terms of sample efficiency and cost effectiveness. The implementation is released open-source as a candidate reference for future research and as an accessible prover for the community.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种最小化代理基线，用于系统比较不同AI定理证明器架构，展示在简化设计中保持竞争力的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究的动机是解决AI定理证明器领域中不同架构缺乏系统比较基准的问题。当前最先进系统复杂多样，难以公平评估其性能，阻碍了领域进展。通过提供一个最小化代理基线，该研究旨在标准化比较框架，促进方法创新和有效评估，但摘要未明确说明现有方法的具体不足之处，仅强调了统一基准的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于构建一个最小化代理基线，该基线实现了迭代证明细化、库搜索和上下文管理等AI定理证明器的核心功能。关键创新在于通过简化架构捕获最先进系统的共享特性，以减少复杂性并支持系统比较。评估过程中，使用多种定性不同的基准测试，并比较了各种前沿语言模型和设计选择，但摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，提出的最小化代理基线在性能上与最先进方法竞争，但使用了显著更简单的架构。此外，迭代证明细化方法相比多次单次生成展现出持续优势，尤其在样本效率和成本效益方面。尽管摘要未提供具体量化指标，如准确率提升数据，但强调了该方法的有效性和性价比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出并开源了一个最小化代理基线，为AI定理证明器领域的系统比较提供了候选参考。学术上，该基线有助于标准化评估框架，推动方法创新；实际上，它可作为社区的一个可访问定理证明工具。未来工作可能涉及在更多基准上验证性能，并进一步优化设计以提升效率和泛化能力。

title: Active Value Querying to Minimize Additive Error in Subadditive Set Function Learning
abstract: Subadditive set functions play a pivotal role in computational economics (especially in combinatorial auctions), combinatorial optimization or artificial intelligence applications such as interpretable machine learning. However, specifying a set function requires assigning values to an exponentially large number of subsets in general, a task that is often resource-intensive in practice, particularly when the values derive from external sources such as retraining of machine learning models. A~simple omission of certain values introduces ambiguity that becomes even more significant when the incomplete set function has to be further optimized over. Motivated by the well-known result about inapproximability of subadditive functions using deterministic value queries with respect to a multiplicative error, we study a problem of approximating an unknown subadditive (or a subclass of thereof) set function with respect to an additive error -- i. e., we aim to efficiently close the distance between minimal and maximal completions. Our contributions are threefold: (i) a thorough exploration of minimal and maximal completions of different classes of set functions with missing values and an analysis of their resulting distance; (ii) the development of methods to minimize this distance over classes of set functions with a known prior, achieved by disclosing values of additional subsets in both offline and online manner; and (iii) empirical demonstrations of the algorithms' performance in practical scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 本文开发了主动值查询方法来最小化亚加法集函数学习中的加法误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 亚加法集函数在计算经济学、组合优化和人工智能（如可解释机器学习）中至关重要，但定义这类函数需要为指数级数量的子集分配值，这在实践中资源密集，尤其是当值来源于机器学习模型重新训练等外部源时。省略某些值会导致歧义，在进一步优化不完全集函数时问题更显著。鉴于已知结果，亚加法函数在乘法误差下使用确定性值查询难以近似，本研究转向加法误差近似问题，旨在高效缩小最小和最大补全之间的距离，以解决资源约束下的不确定性管理问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了三个贡献：首先，深入探索了不同类集函数（如亚加法及其子类）在值缺失情况下的最小和最大补全，并分析它们之间的距离；其次，开发了方法来最小化此距离，基于已知先验的集函数类，通过主动查询额外子集的值，包括离线（预先查询）和在线（动态查询）方式。核心创新在于利用加法误差框架，设计高效的查询策略以减少不确定性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但重点在算法开发。
light_analysis.result: 摘要中提到进行了算法的实证演示，但未提供具体性能指标，如准确率提升或效率改进。因此，主要实验结果基于理论分析和算法开发，具体数据摘要未明确说明。然而，研究旨在通过实证展示算法在实践场景中的有效性，可能与基线方法进行对比，但具体对比情况未详细描述。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统解决了亚加法集函数学习中的加法误差最小化问题，贡献包括理论探索和方法开发，提供了处理不完全集函数的有效途径。研究在经济学拍卖、组合优化和可解释AI等领域具有应用价值，为集函数近似提供了新视角。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛的函数类或优化查询效率，潜在局限性如先验知识依赖性摘要未明确说明。

title: No Need For Real Anomaly: MLLM Empowered Zero-Shot Video Anomaly Detection
abstract: The collection and detection of video anomaly data has long been a challenging problem due to its rare occurrence and spatio-temporal scarcity. Existing video anomaly detection (VAD) methods under perform in open-world scenarios. Key contributing factors include limited dataset diversity, and inadequate understanding of context-dependent anomalous semantics. To address these issues, i) we propose LAVIDA, an end-to-end zero-shot video anomaly detection framework. ii) LAVIDA employs an Anomaly Exposure Sampler that transforms segmented objects into pseudo-anomalies to enhance model adaptability to unseen anomaly categories. It further integrates a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to bolster semantic comprehension capabilities. Additionally, iii) we design a token compression approach based on reverse attention to handle the spatio-temporal scarcity of anomalous patterns and decrease computational cost. The training process is conducted solely on pseudo anomalies without any VAD data. Evaluations across four benchmark VAD datasets demonstrate that LAVIDA achieves SOTA performance in both frame-level and pixel-level anomaly detection under the zero-shot setting. Our code is available in https://github.com/VitaminCreed/LAVIDA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LAVIDA框架，通过伪异常训练和多模态大语言模型增强语义理解，在零射击视频异常检测中实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频异常数据因罕见发生和时空稀缺性，收集和检测面临重大挑战，现有视频异常检测方法在开放世界场景下表现不佳，主要由于数据集多样性有限，以及对上下文相关异常语义的理解不足。该问题在监控和安全等领域具有实际应用重要性，需要开发能够处理未见异常类别的方法，以提升现实世界适应性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LAVIDA，一个端到端零射击视频异常检测框架，核心方法包括异常曝光采样器，将分割对象转换为伪异常以增强模型对未见类别的适应性；集成多模态大语言模型来增强语义理解能力；并设计基于反向注意力的令牌压缩方法，处理异常模式的时空稀缺性并降低计算成本。训练过程仅依赖伪异常数据，无需真实异常视频。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准视频异常检测数据集上的评估表明，LAVIDA在零射击设置下，在帧级别和像素级别异常检测中都实现了最先进性能。与基线方法相比，该方法显著提升了开放世界场景下的检测能力，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: LAVIDA的主要贡献在于结合伪异常采样和多模态大语言模型，解决了无需真实异常数据的零射击视频异常检测问题。其学术价值体现在创新性地融合语义理解和伪异常训练，推动开放世界异常检测发展；实际应用价值在于提高监控等领域的适应性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多数据类型或优化模型效率。

title: Similarity-as-Evidence: Calibrating Overconfident VLMs for Interpretable and Label-Efficient Medical Active Learning
abstract: Active Learning (AL) reduces annotation costs in medical imaging by selecting only the most informative samples for labeling, but suffers from cold-start when labeled data are scarce. Vision-Language Models (VLMs) address the cold-start problem via zero-shot predictions, yet their temperature-scaled softmax outputs treat text-image similarities as deterministic scores while ignoring inherent uncertainty, leading to overconfidence. This overconfidence misleads sample selection, wasting annotation budgets on uninformative cases. To overcome these limitations, the Similarity-as-Evidence (SaE) framework calibrates text-image similarities by introducing a Similarity Evidence Head (SEH), which reinterprets the similarity vector as evidence and parameterizes a Dirichlet distribution over labels. In contrast to a standard softmax that enforces confident predictions even under weak signals, the Dirichlet formulation explicitly quantifies lack of evidence (vacuity) and conflicting evidence (dissonance), thereby mitigating overconfidence caused by rigid softmax normalization. Building on this, SaE employs a dual-factor acquisition strategy: high-vacuity samples (e.g., rare diseases) are prioritized in early rounds to ensure coverage, while high-dissonance samples (e.g., ambiguous diagnoses) are prioritized later to refine boundaries, providing clinically interpretable selection rationales. Experiments on ten public medical imaging datasets with a 20% label budget show that SaE attains state-of-the-art macro-averaged accuracy of 82.57%. On the representative BTMRI dataset, SaE also achieves superior calibration, with a negative log-likelihood (NLL) of 0.425.

light_analysis.overview: SaE框架通过校准视觉语言模型的相似性作为证据，解决医疗主动学习中的过自信问题，实现可解释和标签高效的样本选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医疗影像领域，主动学习旨在减少标注成本，但面临标注数据稀缺时的冷启动问题。视觉语言模型（VLMs）通过零样本预测缓解冷启动，但其温度缩放softmax输出将文本-图像相似性视为确定性分数，忽略不确定性，导致过自信。这种过自信误导样本选择，浪费标注预算在非信息性样本上，降低主动学习效率。现有VLMs方法缺乏对不确定性的显式量化，亟需改进以提升选择准确性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Similarity-as-Evidence（SaE）框架，引入Similarity Evidence Head（SEH）将相似性向量重新解释为证据，并参数化Dirichlet分布来建模标签不确定性。不同于标准softmax的强制置信预测，Dirichlet分布显式量化证据缺失（vacuity）和证据冲突（dissonance），缓解由刚性softmax归一化引起的过自信。基于此，SaE采用双因素获取策略：早期优先高vacuity样本（如罕见疾病）以确保覆盖，后期优先高dissonance样本（如模糊诊断）以精炼决策边界，提供临床可解释的选择理由。该方法基于VLMs，但具体模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 在十个公共医疗影像数据集上，使用20%标签预算，SaE达到最先进的宏观平均准确率82.57%。在代表性BTMRI数据集上，SaE实现优越的校准性能，负对数似然（NLL）为0.425，优于基线方法。这些结果证明了SaE不仅能提高分类准确率，还能有效校准模型置信度，提升主动学习的样本选择效率和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SaE框架的主要贡献是将证据理论引入视觉语言模型，校准相似性输出为概率证据，解决主动学习中的过自信问题。学术上，该方法为不确定性量化在主动学习中的应用提供了新思路；应用上，在医疗影像诊断中实现标签高效和可解释的样本选择。未来工作可扩展到更多领域和模型，并进一步优化获取策略以处理复杂场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: ZACH-ViT: Regime-Dependent Inductive Bias in Compact Vision Transformers for Medical Imaging
abstract: Vision Transformers rely on positional embeddings and class tokens encoding fixed spatial priors. While effective for natural images, these priors may be suboptimal when spatial layout is weakly informative, a frequent condition in medical imaging. We introduce ZACH-ViT (Zero-token Adaptive Compact Hierarchical Vision Transformer), a compact Vision Transformer that removes positional embeddings and the [CLS] token, achieving permutation-invariant patch processing via global average pooling. Zero-token denotes removal of the dedicated aggregation token and positional encodings. Patch tokens remain unchanged. Adaptive residual projections preserve training stability under strict parameter constraints. We evaluate ZACH-ViT across seven MedMNIST datasets under a strict few-shot protocol (50 samples/class, fixed hyperparameters, five seeds). Results reveal regime-dependent behavior: ZACH-ViT (0.25M parameters, trained from scratch) achieves strongest advantage on BloodMNIST and remains competitive on PathMNIST, while relative advantage decreases on datasets with stronger anatomical priors (OCTMNIST, OrganAMNIST), consistent with our hypothesis. Component and pooling ablations show positional support becomes mildly beneficial as spatial structure increases, whereas reintroducing a [CLS] token is consistently unfavorable. These findings support that architectural alignment with data structure can outweigh universal benchmark dominance. Despite minimal size and no pretraining, ZACH-ViT achieves competitive performance under data-scarce conditions, relevant for compact medical imaging and low-resource settings. Code: https://github.com/Bluesman79/ZACH-ViT
comment: 24 pages, 15 figures, 5 tables. Code and models available at https://github.com/Bluesman79/ZACH-ViT

light_analysis.overview: ZACH-ViT 是一种紧凑视觉变换器，通过移除位置嵌入和 [CLS] 令牌，实现了适用于医学成像的排列不变补丁处理，强调架构与数据结构的对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision Transformers 依赖位置嵌入和类令牌的固定空间先验，这在自然图像中有效，但在医学成像中，空间布局信息往往较弱，导致性能次优。本研究旨在解决标准方法在医学图像处理中的不足，特别是在数据稀缺和低资源环境下，现有方法可能忽略了数据结构对齐的重要性，从而影响模型效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: ZACH-ViT 的核心方法是移除传统 Vision Transformers 中的位置嵌入和专用聚合令牌（[CLS] 令牌），通过全局平均池化处理补丁令牌以实现排列不变性。补丁令牌保持不变，而适应残差投影被引入以在严格的参数约束下保持训练稳定性。该方法采用紧凑架构，参数规模小（0.25M），无需预训练，并使用 MedMNIST 数据集进行评估，以验证其在医学成像中的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在七个 MedMNIST 数据集上的少样本协议评估中，ZACH-ViT 显示 regime-dependent 行为：在 BloodMNIST 上表现最佳优势，在 PathMNIST 上保持竞争性，而在空间结构更强的数据集（如 OCTMNIST 和 OrganAMNIST）上相对优势降低。消融研究表明，随着空间结构增加，位置支持变得有益，而重新引入 [CLS] 令牌始终不利，验证了假设。尽管参数少且无预训练，ZACH-ViT 在数据稀缺条件下实现了竞争性性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了 ZACH-ViT，证明了架构设计与数据结构对齐的重要性，超越通用基准。ZACH-ViT 在紧凑医学成像和低资源设置中具有应用价值，显示了在数据稀缺条件下的有效性。尽管优势因数据集而异，这提示未来工作可进一步探索适应不同数据结构的策略，以提高模型泛化能力和扩展性。

title: UniWeTok: An Unified Binary Tokenizer with Codebook Size $\mathit{2^{128}}$ for Unified Multimodal Large Language Model
abstract: Unified Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) require a visual representation that simultaneously supports high-fidelity reconstruction, complex semantic extraction, and generative suitability. However, existing visual tokenizers typically struggle to satisfy these conflicting objectives within a single framework. In this paper, we introduce UniWeTok, a unified discrete tokenizer designed to bridge this gap using a massive binary codebook ($\mathit{2^{128}}$). For training framework, we introduce Pre-Post Distillation and a Generative-Aware Prior to enhance the semantic extraction and generative prior of the discrete tokens. In terms of model architecture, we propose a convolution-attention hybrid architecture with the SigLu activation function. SigLu activation not only bounds the encoder output and stabilizes the semantic distillation process but also effectively addresses the optimization conflict between token entropy loss and commitment loss. We further propose a three-stage training framework designed to enhance UniWeTok's adaptability cross various image resolutions and perception-sensitive scenarios, such as those involving human faces and textual content. On ImageNet, UniWeTok achieves state-of-the-art image generation performance (FID: UniWeTok 1.38 vs. REPA 1.42) while requiring a remarkably low training compute (Training Tokens: UniWeTok 33B vs. REPA 262B). On general-domain, UniWeTok demonstrates highly competitive capabilities across a broad range of tasks, including multimodal understanding, image generation (DPG Score: UniWeTok 86.63 vs. FLUX.1 [Dev] 83.84), and editing (GEdit Overall Score: UniWeTok 5.09 vs. OmniGen 5.06). We release code and models to facilitate community exploration of unified tokenizer and MLLM.

light_analysis.overview: UniWeTok是一个统一的多模态离散tokenizer，通过大二进制码本和混合架构，实现了高保真图像生成和语义提取。
light_analysis.motivation: 统一多模态大语言模型需要视觉表示来同时支持高保真重建、复杂语义提取和生成适用性。然而，现有视觉tokenizer通常在单一框架内难以满足这些矛盾目标，导致性能受限和计算成本高。本研究旨在解决这一问题，开发一个统一的tokenizer，以提升多模态模型在图像生成、理解和编辑等任务中的整体效率和效果。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出UniWeTok，一个统一的离散tokenizer，采用2^128大小的二进制码本。核心创新包括训练框架中的Pre-Post Distillation和Generative-Aware Prior，以增强语义提取和生成先验；模型架构为卷积-注意力混合架构，使用SigLu激活函数，该函数能限制编码器输出、稳定语义蒸馏过程，并解决token熵损失和承诺损失之间的优化冲突。此外，提出三阶段训练框架来适应不同图像分辨率和感知敏感场景，如人面和文本内容。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，UniWeTok实现最先进的图像生成性能（FID为1.38，优于REPA的1.42），且训练计算显著降低（训练tokens为33B，而REPA为262B）。在通用领域，UniWeTok在多种任务中表现出色，包括多模态理解、图像生成（DPG Score为86.63，高于FLUX.1的83.84）和编辑（GEdit Overall Score为5.09，略高于OmniGen的5.06），证明了其广泛适用性和竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出UniWeTok，一个统一的tokenizer，有效解决了多模态大语言模型中视觉表示的冲突目标。学术价值在于创新的码本设计、训练框架和模型架构；实际应用价值体现在图像生成、理解和编辑任务的高性能和低计算成本。代码和模型的发布促进了社区探索，未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模态和场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Equitable Multi-Task Learning for AI-RANs
abstract: AI-enabled Radio Access Networks (AI-RANs) are expected to serve heterogeneous users with time-varying learning tasks over shared edge resources. Ensuring equitable inference performance across these users requires adaptive and fair learning mechanisms. This paper introduces an online-within-online fair multi-task learning (OWO-FMTL) framework that ensures long-term equity across users. The method combines two learning loops: an outer loop updating the shared model across rounds and an inner loop rebalancing user priorities within each round with a lightweight primal-dual update. Equity is quantified via generalized alpha-fairness, allowing a trade-off between efficiency and fairness. The framework guarantees diminishing performance disparity over time and operates with low computational overhead suitable for edge deployment. Experiments on convex and deep learning tasks confirm that OWO-FMTL outperforms existing multi-task learning baselines under dynamic scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个在线内在线公平多任务学习（OWO-FMTL）框架，用于在AI-RANs中确保异构用户间的长期公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI-RANs旨在通过共享边缘资源服务异构用户，但用户学习任务随时间动态变化，导致推理性能不均。现有多任务学习方法可能缺乏自适应性和公平保证，无法有效平衡效率与公平，从而影响网络整体效能和用户体验。因此，开发新机制以在动态环境中确保公平学习至关重要，这有助于提升资源利用率和用户满意度。
light_analysis.method: OWO-FMTL框架结合了两个学习循环：外层循环在轮次间更新共享模型，内层循环在每个轮次内通过轻量级原始-对偶更新重新平衡用户优先级。公平性通过广义alpha-fairness量化，允许在效率与公平间灵活权衡，设计低计算开销以适合边缘部署。方法未指定具体数据集或模型架构，但适用于凸和深度学习任务，实现动态调整。
light_analysis.result: 实验在凸和深度学习任务上进行，结果显示OWO-FMTL在动态场景下优于现有多任务学习基线。框架保证性能差异随时间减小，并具有低计算开销，适合边缘环境。具体性能指标如准确率提升摘要未明确说明，但确认了其在公平性和效率上的优势，与基线方法对比展现了更好的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了OWO-FMTL框架，为AI-RANs中的公平多任务学习提供了新方法。学术上，它扩展了公平学习理论，推进了动态环境下的学习机制研究；应用上，适应边缘网络的低开销需求，有潜力提升实际部署效果。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或大规模网络，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: BLITZRANK: Principled Zero-shot Ranking Agents with Tournament Graphs
abstract: Selecting the top $m$ from $n$ items via expensive $k$-wise comparisons is central to settings ranging from LLM-based document reranking to crowdsourced evaluation and tournament design. Existing methods either rely on heuristics that fail to fully exploit the information each comparison reveals, or are inefficient when they do. We introduce a tournament graph framework that provides a principled foundation for $k$-wise ranking. Our key observation is that each $k$-item comparison reveals a complete tournament of $\binom{k}{2}$ pairwise preferences; aggregating these into a global preference graph and computing its transitive closure yields many additional orderings without further oracle calls. We formalize when an item's rank is certifiably determined and design a greedy query schedule that maximizes information gain towards identifying the top-$m$ items. The framework also gracefully handles non-transitive preferences (cycles induced by real-world oracles) by collapsing them into equivalence classes that yield principled tiered rankings. Applied to LLM reranking across 14 benchmarks and 5 models, our method achieves Pareto dominance over existing approaches: matching or exceeding accuracy while requiring 25-40% fewer tokens than comparable methods, and $7\times$ fewer than pairwise reranking at near-identical quality.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出基于锦标赛图的零样本排名框架，通过贪婪查询最大化信息增益，实现高效、准确的k-wise排名。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决通过昂贵k-wise比较从n个项目中选择前m个的问题，该问题在LLM文档重排、众包评估和比赛设计等场景中广泛存在。现有方法要么依赖启发式策略，未能充分利用每次比较揭示的信息，导致排名准确性受限；要么在试图利用信息时效率低下，造成资源浪费。这些不足之处凸显了开发一种原则性方法的重要性，以优化比较过程并提高排名的效率和可靠性。摘要未明确说明其他特定背景，但可推断该问题在实际应用中具有高成本和性能需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是引入锦标赛图框架，为k-wise排名提供理论基础。关键创新在于观察到每个k项比较揭示binom(k,2)个成对偏好；通过聚合这些偏好到全局偏好图并计算其传递闭包，可以无需额外查询推断更多顺序。论文形式化了项目排名可证明被确定的条件，并设计了贪婪查询调度算法，以最大化信息增益来识别前m个项目。框架还能优雅处理非传递偏好（如循环），通过折叠为等价类生成分层排名。摘要提到应用于LLM重排，但方法本身是通用的，未详细说明数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在14个基准和5个LLM模型上应用该方法进行重排时，实现了帕累托优势：准确率匹配或超过了现有方法。具体数据支撑包括，与可比方法相比，令牌使用量减少了25-40%；与成对重排方法相比，减少了7倍令牌使用，同时保持近似的质量。这表明方法在显著提高效率的同时，维持了高准确性，与基线对比中展现出明确优势。摘要未提供额外详细实验细节，但基于现有信息，性能改进是显著的。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了基于锦标赛图的零样本排名框架，为k-wise排名提供了原则性解决方案，并通过贪婪查询调度优化了信息利用。研究的学术价值在于弥补了现有方法的不足，建立了理论基础；实际应用价值在于在LLM重排等场景中显著节省计算资源，提升了排名效率。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断可能包括扩展应用到其他领域或进一步优化算法性能。整体上，这项工作对人工智能和机器学习中的排名任务具有重要影响。

title: KVSmooth: Mitigating Hallucination in Multi-modal Large Language Models through Key-Value Smoothing
abstract: Despite the significant progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) across diverse tasks, hallucination -- corresponding to the generation of visually inconsistent objects, attributes, or relations -- remains a major obstacle to their reliable deployment. Unlike pure language models, MLLMs must ground their generation process in visual inputs. However, existing models often suffer from semantic drift during decoding, causing outputs to diverge from visual facts as the sequence length increases.   To address this issue, we propose KVSmooth, a training-free and plug-and-play method that mitigates hallucination by performing attention-entropy-guided adaptive smoothing on hidden states. Specifically, KVSmooth applies an exponential moving average (EMA) to both keys and values in the KV-Cache, while dynamically quantifying the sink degree of each token through the entropy of its attention distribution to adaptively adjust the smoothing strength.   Unlike computationally expensive retraining or contrastive decoding methods, KVSmooth operates efficiently during inference without additional training or model modification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that KVSmooth significantly reduces hallucination ($\mathit{CHAIR}_{S}$ from $41.8 \rightarrow 18.2$) while improving overall performance ($F_1$ score from $77.5 \rightarrow 79.2$), achieving higher precision and recall simultaneously. In contrast, prior methods often improve one at the expense of the other, validating the effectiveness and generality of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出KVSmooth方法，通过键值平滑技术缓解多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题，无需额外训练即可提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在各种任务中取得显著进展，但幻觉问题——即生成与视觉输入不一致的对象、属性或关系——严重阻碍了其可靠部署。与纯语言模型不同，MLLMs的生成过程必须基于视觉输入，然而现有模型在解码时常发生语义漂移，导致输出随序列长度增加而偏离视觉事实，这限制了模型的实用性和可信度。因此，亟需高效方法来缓解这一挑战，提高模型输出与视觉事实的一致性。
light_analysis.method: KVSmooth是一种无需训练、即插即用的推理时方法，通过在隐藏状态上执行注意力熵引导的自适应平滑来缓解幻觉。具体而言，对KV-Cache中的键和值应用指数移动平均（EMA），同时根据每个令牌注意力分布的熵动态量化其下沉程度，以自适应调整平滑强度。关键创新在于利用注意力机制中的熵信息来指导平滑过程，避免了计算量大的重训练或对比解码，实现了高效部署，无需模型架构修改。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，KVSmooth显著降低了幻觉指标（CHAIR_S从41.8降至18.2），同时提升了整体性能（F1分数从77.5升至79.2）。这意味着模型在减少错误生成的同时，保持了高准确性和召回率，而先前方法往往以牺牲一个指标为代价来改进另一个。这些结果验证了KVSmooth在减少幻觉和提升性能方面的有效性和普适性，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出KVSmooth方法，通过键值平滑技术有效缓解多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题，无需模型修改或额外训练。该方法的学术价值在于为解码过程中的语义漂移提供了新颖解决方案，实际应用价值在于便于集成和部署，提升了模型的可靠性。未来工作可探索其在其他模型或任务中的扩展，并进一步优化平滑策略以增强泛化能力。

title: Position: Beyond Model-Centric Prediction -- Agentic Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting has traditionally been formulated as a model-centric, static, and single-pass prediction problem that maps historical observations to future values. While this paradigm has driven substantial progress, it proves insufficient in adaptive and multi-turn settings where forecasting requires informative feature extraction, reasoning-driven inference, iterative refinement, and continual adaptation over time. In this paper, we argue for agentic time series forecasting (ATSF), which reframes forecasting as an agentic process composed of perception, planning, action, reflection, and memory. Rather than focusing solely on predictive models, ATSF emphasizes organizing forecasting as an agentic workflow that can interact with tools, incorporate feedback from outcomes, and evolve through experience accumulation. We outline three representative implementation paradigms -- workflow-based design, agentic reinforcement learning, and a hybrid agentic workflow paradigm -- and discuss the opportunities and challenges that arise when shifting from model-centric prediction to agentic forecasting. Together, this position aims to establish agentic forecasting as a foundation for future research at the intersection of time series forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出代理时间序列预测（ATSF）新范式，将预测从模型中心转向基于感知、规划、行动、反思和记忆的代理工作流。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测传统上被视作模型中心的静态单次预测问题，然而在自适应和多回合设置中，如需要信息丰富的特征提取、推理驱动推断、迭代细化和持续适应时，该方法显得不足。研究动机在于解决传统预测模型在面对动态环境时的局限性，推动发展更灵活的预测方法以应对金融、物联网等领域的复杂需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法重构时间序列预测为代理过程，包括感知、规划、行动、反思和记忆阶段，强调构建代理工作流以与工具交互、整合反馈和经验演化。论文概述了三种实现范式：基于工作流的设计、代理强化学习和混合代理工作流，核心创新在于将预测组织为动态流程而非单一模型，以实现自适应优化和迭代改进。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标，因为本文是一篇立场论文，侧重于提出ATSF范式的理论框架和讨论其潜力。论文未报告准确率提升、效率改进等量化数据，也未提供与基线方法的对比结果，主要依赖概念分析和路径阐述来展示新方法的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是建立代理时间序列预测（ATSF）作为未来研究的基础，推动预测系统向自适应和多回合方向发展。其学术价值在于提供新视角以应对复杂预测场景，实际应用可能包括动态决策支持和实时优化。潜在局限性在于实现复杂度高，未来工作可集中在具体算法设计、实证验证和扩展应用领域。

title: Evaluating Long-Horizon Memory for Multi-Party Collaborative Dialogues
abstract: Long-term conversational memory in practical LLM applications is inherently collaborative: information is produced by multiple participants, scattered across groups and channels, revised over time, and implicitly grounded in roles and social context. Yet there is currently no established benchmark that evaluates memory under interaction patterns resembling real-world deployment, as existing benchmarks largely focus on dyadic or single-topic dialogues. In this paper, we introduce EverMemBench, the first benchmark designed for long-horizon collaborative memory, built from multi-party, multi-group conversations spanning over one million tokens with dense cross-topic interleaving, temporally evolving decisions, and role-conditioned personas. EverMemBench evaluates memory systems using 2400 QA pairs across three dimensions essential for real applications: fine-grained recall, memory awareness, and user profile understanding. Our evaluation reveals fundamental limitations of current systems: multi-hop reasoning collapses under multi-party attribution even with oracle evidence (26% accuracy), temporal reasoning fails without explicit version semantics beyond timestamps, and memory awareness is bottlenecked by retrieval, as similarity-based methods miss implicitly relevant information. EverMemBench thus represents a concrete step toward realistic evaluation of LLM memory and a cornerstone benchmark for developing next-generation LLMs that reason over time, roles, and collaborative interaction structure. Our benchmark and code are publicly available at https://github.com/EverMind-AI/EverMemBench.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了首个针对多党协作对话中长程记忆评估的基准 EverMemBench，以填补现有基准在模拟真实交互模式方面的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界大型语言模型（LLM）应用中的对话记忆本质上是协作性的，信息由多个参与者产生，分散在群组和频道中，随时间修订并隐含在角色和社会背景中。然而，现有基准如双人对话或单一主题对话无法有效评估类似真实部署的交互模式，导致对 LLM 在复杂对话环境中的记忆能力评估不足，限制了实际应用的进展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了 EverMemBench 基准，构建自多党、多群组对话数据，涵盖超过一百万个令牌，包含密集跨主题交织、时间演化决策和角色条件人物。评估使用 2400 个 QA 对，聚焦三个维度：细粒度回忆、记忆意识和用户档案理解，旨在全面测试记忆系统在真实协作场景中的性能，关键创新在于模拟真实对话结构。
light_analysis.result: 评估发现当前记忆系统在多党归因下多跳推理严重崩溃，即使有完美证据，准确率仅为 26%；时间推理在没有明确版本语义时失败；记忆意识受限于检索方法，相似性方法无法捕获隐含相关信息。这些结果与基线方法对比显示系统在复杂环境中的根本缺陷，如准确率低和效率不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: EverMemBench 是向真实评估 LLM 记忆能力迈出的具体一步，为开发下一代能够推理时间、角色和协作结构的 LLM 提供了基石基准。其学术价值在于提供了新评估框架，实际应用价值在于推动 LLM 在复杂对话场景中的改进，未来工作可集中于克服现有局限性，如提升检索和推理能力。

title: Generating a Paracosm for Training-Free Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is the task of retrieving a target image from a database using a multimodal query, which consists of a reference image and a modification text. The text specifies how to alter the reference image to form a ''mental image'', based on which CIR should find the target image in the database. The fundamental challenge of CIR is that this ''mental image'' is not physically available and is only implicitly defined by the query. The contemporary literature pursues zero-shot methods and uses a Large Multimodal Model (LMM) to generate a textual description for a given multimodal query, and then employs a Vision-Language Model (VLM) for textual-visual matching to search for the target image. In contrast, we address CIR from first principles by directly generating the ''mental image'' for more accurate matching. Particularly, we prompt an LMM to generate a ''mental image'' for a given multimodal query and propose to use this ''mental image'' to search for the target image. As the ''mental image'' has a synthetic-to-real domain gap with real images, we also generate a synthetic counterpart for each real image in the database to facilitate matching. In this sense, our method uses LMM to construct a ``paracosm'', where it matches the multimodal query and database images. Hence, we call this method Paracosm. Notably, Paracosm is a training-free zero-shot CIR method. It significantly outperforms existing zero-shot methods on challenging benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art performance for zero-shot CIR.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Paracosm方法，通过直接生成心理图像实现训练免费的零样本组合图像检索，显著提升检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合图像检索（CIR）任务中，多模态查询（参考图像和修改文本）隐式定义了'心理图像'，但该图像不可用，导致检索困难。现有方法采用零样本方式，使用大型多模态模型生成文本描述，再通过视觉语言模型进行文本-视觉匹配，这种方法可能无法准确捕捉视觉细节，限制了性能。改进CIR对于多模态应用（如图像搜索）至关重要，因此需要更直接的方法来处理隐式图像表示。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Paracosm方法，从第一原理出发，使用大型多模态模型为多模态查询直接生成'心理图像'，并用此图像进行视觉匹配以搜索目标图像。关键创新在于生成心理图像来更准确地表示查询意图，避免了文本描述可能的信息丢失；为克服合成图像与真实图像的域间隙，为数据库中的每个真实图像生成合成对应物，从而在构建的'paracosm'中进行匹配。该方法无需训练，是完全零样本的，具体模型和数据集在摘要中未详细说明。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准测试中，Paracosm方法显著优于现有零样本CIR方法，达到了最先进的性能水平。摘要未提供具体的准确率或效率数据，但强调了方法的有效性；与基线方法相比，通过直接生成心理图像，Paracosm实现了更精确的图像检索，验证了其技术优势。实验结果表明，该方法在零样本设置下具有强大竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了Paracosm，一种无需训练的零样本CIR方法，通过直接生成心理图像改进了检索准确性。学术价值在于从第一原理处理CIR问题，提供了新思路；实际应用价值在于提升图像检索系统性能，无需大量训练数据。摘要未明确说明局限性，但潜在问题可能包括合成图像生成的质量和计算效率；未来工作可进一步优化图像生成和匹配算法，或扩展到更多模态任务。

title: PLANING: A Loosely Coupled Triangle-Gaussian Framework for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Streaming reconstruction from monocular image sequences remains challenging, as existing methods typically favor either high-quality rendering or accurate geometry, but rarely both. We present PLANING, an efficient on-the-fly reconstruction framework built on a hybrid representation that loosely couples explicit geometric primitives with neural Gaussians, enabling geometry and appearance to be modeled in a decoupled manner. This decoupling supports an online initialization and optimization strategy that separates geometry and appearance updates, yielding stable streaming reconstruction with substantially reduced structural redundancy. PLANING improves dense mesh Chamfer-L2 by 18.52% over PGSR, surpasses ARTDECO by 1.31 dB PSNR, and reconstructs ScanNetV2 scenes in under 100 seconds, over 5x faster than 2D Gaussian Splatting, while matching the quality of offline per-scene optimization. Beyond reconstruction quality, the structural clarity and computational efficiency of PLANING make it well suited for a broad range of downstream applications, such as enabling large-scale scene modeling and simulation-ready environments for embodied AI. Project page: https://city-super.github.io/PLANING/ .

light_analysis.overview: PLANING提出了一种松散耦合的三角形-高斯框架，用于流式3D重建，实现了高质量渲染和精确几何的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决从单目图像序列进行流式3D重建的挑战，现有方法如PGSR和ARTDECO通常偏向高质量渲染或准确几何，难以同时优化两者，这限制了实际应用如大规模场景建模和具身AI环境的需求。传统方法的不足在于未能有效结合几何和外观建模，导致重建效果不全面，促使开发更均衡的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于混合表示，松散耦合显式三角形几何原语和神经高斯。核心创新是几何和外观的解耦建模，支持在线初始化和优化策略，分别独立更新几何和外观。框架使用三角形表示几何结构，高斯表示外观细节，通过减少结构冗余实现稳定流式重建，并采用高效优化算法加速处理过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示PLANING性能优异：在密集网格重建上，Chamfer-L2距离比PGSR提升18.52%；在图像质量上，PSNR优于ARTDECO 1.31 dB。在ScanNetV2数据集上，重建时间不到100秒，比2D Gaussian Splatting快5倍以上，同时匹配离线优化质量。这表明PLANING在精度和效率上均优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是PLANING为流式3D重建提供了高效框架，通过解耦几何和外观建模，平衡了渲染质量和几何精度。学术贡献包括新的混合表示和优化策略；应用价值体现在适用于大规模场景建模和具身AI环境。未来方向可能包括优化实时性能或扩展应用领域，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: MemOCR: Layout-Aware Visual Memory for Efficient Long-Horizon Reasoning
abstract: Long-horizon agentic reasoning necessitates effectively compressing growing interaction histories into a limited context window. Most existing memory systems serialize history as text, where token-level cost is uniform and scales linearly with length, often spending scarce budget on low-value details. To this end, we introduce MemOCR, a multimodal memory agent that improves long-horizon reasoning under tight context budgets by allocating memory space with adaptive information density through visual layout. Concretely, MemOCR maintains a structured rich-text memory (e.g., headings, highlights) and renders it into an image that the agent consults for memory access, visually prioritizing crucial evidence while aggressively compressing auxiliary details. To ensure robustness across varying memory budgets, we train MemOCR with reinforcement learning under budget-aware objectives that expose the agent to diverse compression levels. Across long-context multi-hop and single-hop question-answering benchmarks, MemOCR outperforms strong text-based baselines and achieves more effective context utilization under extreme budgets.

light_analysis.overview: MemOCR通过视觉布局自适应压缩交互历史信息，提升在有限上下文预算下的长范围推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 长范围智能推理需要将不断增长的交互历史有效压缩到有限上下文窗口中，但现有基于文本序列化的方法存在令牌成本均匀和线性扩展问题，导致宝贵计算资源浪费在低价值细节上。这一问题在资源受限环境中尤为重要，因为它限制了代理的长期决策能力，因此研究如何优化信息压缩、优先保留关键证据成为关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: MemOCR是一个多模态内存代理，核心方法是将结构化富文本（如标题、高亮）渲染为图像表示，通过视觉布局动态调整信息密度，视觉上突出关键证据并压缩次要细节。采用强化学习框架，在预算感知目标下训练，使代理适应不同压缩级别，确保鲁棒性。该方法避免了文本序列的线性扩展问题，实现了自适应内存分配。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文多跳和单跳问答基准测试中，MemOCR显著优于基于文本的基线方法，特别是在极端内存预算条件下，实现了更有效的上下文利用率。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明其在资源受限场景下性能优越，相比基线更高效地利用了有限资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemOCR通过视觉布局和自适应压缩技术改进了长范围推理的内存管理，具有重要的学术价值，为智能代理在有限资源下处理大规模历史信息提供了新思路。潜在应用于自动驾驶、对话系统等领域，未来可扩展到更多多模态任务或探索不同视觉表示方法。

title: Get away with less: Need of source side data curation to build parallel corpus for low resource Machine Translation
abstract: Data curation is a critical yet under-researched step in the machine translation training paradigm. To train translation systems, data acquisition relies primarily on human translations and digital parallel sources or, to a limited degree, synthetic generation. But, for low-resource languages, human translation to generate sufficient data is prohibitively expensive. Therefore, it is crucial to develop a framework that screens source sentences to form efficient parallel text, ensuring optimal MT system performance in low-resource environments. We approach this by evaluating English-Hindi bi-text to determine effective sentence selection strategies for optimal MT system training. Our extensively tested framework, (Lexical And Linguistically Informed Text Analysis) LALITA, targets source sentence selection using lexical and linguistic features to curate parallel corpora. We find that by training mostly on complex sentences from both existing and synthetic datasets, our method significantly improves translation quality. We test this by simulating low-resource data availabilty with curated datasets of 50K to 800K English sentences and report improved performances on all data sizes. LALITA demonstrates remarkable efficiency, reducing data needs by more than half across multiple languages (Hindi, Odia, Nepali, Norwegian Nynorsk, and German). This approach not only reduces MT systems training cost by reducing training data requirement, but also showcases LALITA's utility in data augmentation.

light_analysis.overview: LALITA 框架通过词汇和语言特征筛选源句，有效优化低资源机器翻译的平行语料构建，提升翻译质量并减少数据需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 在低资源语言机器翻译中，获取足够平行数据成本高昂，主要依赖人工翻译或有限合成数据，导致数据稀缺问题突出。现有方法中，数据筛选步骤研究不足，影响了MT系统性能优化。因此，开发高效筛选框架至关重要，以在低资源环境中构建高质量平行文本，减少训练成本并提升翻译效果。摘要未明确说明现有方法的详细不足之处，但强调了数据筛选的关键性和成本挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 LALITA 框架，使用词汇和语言特征筛选源句，以构建高效平行语料。核心方法基于英语-印地语双语文本评估，通过模拟低资源数据可用性，使用数据集从50K到800K句子。创新点在于专注于复杂句子的选择，结合现有和合成数据集进行训练，优化源句筛选策略，提升MT系统性能。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节，但提及了特征提取和数据集构建的关键步骤。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，LALITA 框架显著提高翻译质量，在模拟低资源数据的多种大小（50K到800K句子）上均报告性能改进。数据表明，框架减少数据需求一半以上，适用于印地语、奥里亚语、尼泊尔语等多种语言。与基线对比情况摘要未明确说明，但整体性能提升证实了筛选复杂句子的有效性，降低了训练成本并展示了在数据增强中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LALITA 框架的主要贡献在于减少机器翻译训练的数据需求，降低成本，并在数据增强中展示应用价值。该研究强调了数据筛选在低资源MT中的重要性，提供了优化平行语料构建的实用方法。学术价值在于推动数据筛选技术的发展，实际应用价值是提升低资源语言翻译效率。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展语言范围或进一步优化筛选策略。

title: Over-Searching in Search-Augmented Large Language Models
abstract: Search-augmented large language models (LLMs) excel at knowledge-intensive tasks by integrating external retrieval. However, they often over-search -- unnecessarily invoking search tool even when it does not improve response quality, which leads to computational inefficiency and hallucinations by incorporating irrelevant context. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of over-searching across multiple dimensions, including query types, model categories, retrieval conditions, and multi-turn conversations. Our finding shows: (i) search generally improves answer accuracy on answerable queries but harms abstention on unanswerable ones; (ii) over-searching is more pronounced in complex reasoning models and deep research systems, is exacerbated by noisy retrieval, and compounds across turns in multi-turn conversations; and (iii) the composition of retrieved evidence is crucial, as the presence of negative evidence improves abstention. To quantify over-searching, we introduce Tokens Per Correctness (TPC), an evaluation metric that captures the performance-cost trade-off for search-augmented LLMs. Lastly, we investigate mitigation approaches at both the query and retrieval levels and release the OverSearchQA to foster continued research into efficient search-augmented LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究系统评估了搜索增强大语言模型中的过度搜索现象，并引入了Tokens Per Correctness（TPC）指标来量化性能-成本权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 搜索增强大语言模型通过整合外部检索在知识密集型任务中表现优异，但存在过度搜索问题，即不必要地调用搜索工具，这导致计算效率低下和因引入无关上下文而产生的幻觉。这一问题不仅增加资源消耗，还降低模型响应质量，影响实际应用。现有方法可能未充分评估过度搜索的多维影响，缺乏有效的量化指标，因此需要深入研究以优化检索策略并提升模型效率。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用系统性评估框架，涵盖查询类型、模型类别、检索条件和多轮对话等多个维度来分析过度搜索现象。核心创新是引入Tokens Per Correctness（TPC）作为评估指标，用于捕捉搜索增强LLMs的性能与计算成本之间的权衡。此外，研究探索了查询和检索级别的缓解方法，并发布了OverSearchQA数据集以支持未来研究，促进高效搜索增强LLMs的发展。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，搜索增强能显著提高可回答查询的答案准确性，但对不可回答查询的弃权能力产生负面影响，导致幻觉增加。过度搜索现象在复杂推理模型和深度研究系统中更为明显，噪声检索环境会加剧这一问题，并在多轮对话中累积恶化。关键发现是检索证据的组成至关重要，负面证据的存在有助于改善模型的弃权表现，减少无关信息的干扰。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于系统评估了搜索增强大语言模型中的过度搜索问题，并提出了Tokens Per Correctness（TPC）这一量化指标，为平衡性能和成本提供了新工具。这有助于优化检索策略，降低计算开销和幻觉风险，提升模型实用性和效率。发布OverSearchQA数据集将推动社区进一步研究，未来方向可聚焦于开发更高效的缓解技术和智能搜索调用机制。

title: Inferring Clinically Relevant Molecular Subtypes of Pancreatic Cancer from Routine Histopathology Using Deep Learning
abstract: Molecular subtyping of PDAC into basal-like and classical has established prognostic and predictive value. However, its use in clinical practice is limited by cost, turnaround time, and tissue requirements, thereby restricting its application in the management of PDAC. We introduce PanSubNet, an interpretable deep learning framework that predicts therapy-relevant molecular subtypes directly from standard H&E-stained WSIs. PanSubNet was developed using data from 1,055 patients across two multi-institutional cohorts (PANCAN, n=846; TCGA, n=209) with paired histology and RNA-seq data. Ground-truth labels were derived using the validated Moffitt 50-gene signature refined by GATA6 expression. The model employs dual-scale architecture that fuses cellular-level morphology with tissue-level architecture, leveraging attention mechanisms for multi-scale representation learning and transparent feature attribution. On internal validation within PANCAN using five-fold cross-validation, PanSubNet achieved mean AUC of 88.5% with balanced sensitivity and specificity. External validation on the independent TCGA cohort without fine-tuning demonstrated robust generalizability (AUC 84.0%). PanSubNet preserved and, in metastatic disease, strengthened prognostic stratification compared to RNA-seq based labels. Prediction uncertainty linked to intermediate transcriptional states, not classification noise. Model predictions are aligned with established transcriptomic programs, differentiation markers, and DNA damage repair signatures. By enabling rapid, cost-effective molecular stratification from routine H&E-stained slides, PanSubNet offers a clinically deployable and interpretable tool for genetic subtyping. We are gathering data from two institutions to validate and assess real-world performance, supporting integration into digital pathology workflows and advancing precision oncology for PDAC.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究开发了PanSubNet，一个可解释的深度学习框架，直接从常规H&E染色病理切片图像中预测胰腺癌的分子亚型。
light_analysis.motivation: 胰腺导管腺癌（PDAC）的分子分型（如基底样和经典型）具有重要的预后和预测价值，可指导个性化治疗决策。然而，现有方法如RNA测序成本高、耗时长，且对组织样本要求严格，限制了其在临床实践中的广泛应用。因此，急需一种快速、经济的方法来替代传统分子检测，以促进精准肿瘤学的发展。
light_analysis.method: PanSubNet采用双尺度架构，融合细胞级形态特征和组织级架构信息，通过注意力机制实现多尺度表示学习和透明特征归因。模型基于1,055名患者的数据集开发，这些数据来自PANCAN（846例）和TCGA（209例）两个多机构队列，包含配对的H&E图像和RNA-seq数据。地面真实标签使用验证过的Moffitt 50基因签名，并结合GATA6表达进行精炼，以预测分子亚型。
light_analysis.result: 在内部验证中，使用五折交叉验证，PanSubNet的平均AUC达到88.5%，敏感性和特异性平衡。在独立的TCGA队列上进行外部验证，无需微调，AUC为84.0%，显示出强大的泛化能力。预测结果与已知转录组程序、分化标记和DNA损伤修复签名一致，且在转移性疾病中，预后分层能力优于基于RNA-seq的标签，预测不确定性关联于中间转录状态而非分类噪声。
light_analysis.conclusion: PanSubNet提供了一个临床可行的工具，能够从常规H&E切片快速、经济地预测分子亚型，推动胰腺癌的精准肿瘤学应用。其贡献在于整合了可解释性和多尺度学习，有助于改善患者管理。研究正在收集更多机构数据以验证实际性能，支持数字病理工作流程整合，未来工作包括扩大验证范围和探索更广泛的临床应用。

title: Don't Mind the Gaps: Implicit Neural Representations for Resolution-Agnostic Retinal OCT Analysis
abstract: Routine clinical imaging of the retina using optical coherence tomography (OCT) is performed with large slice spacing, resulting in highly anisotropic images and a sparsely scanned retina. Most learning-based methods circumvent the problems arising from the anisotropy by using 2D approaches rather than performing volumetric analyses. These approaches inherently bear the risk of generating inconsistent results for neighboring B-scans. For example, 2D retinal layer segmentations can have irregular surfaces in 3D. Furthermore, the typically used convolutional neural networks are bound to the resolution of the training data, which prevents their usage for images acquired with a different imaging protocol. Implicit neural representations (INRs) have recently emerged as a tool to store voxelized data as a continuous representation. Using coordinates as input, INRs are resolution-agnostic, which allows them to be applied to anisotropic data. In this paper, we propose two frameworks that make use of this characteristic of INRs for dense 3D analyses of retinal OCT volumes. 1) We perform inter-B-scan interpolation by incorporating additional information from en-face modalities, that help retain relevant structures between B-scans. 2) We create a resolution-agnostic retinal atlas that enables general analysis without strict requirements for the data. Both methods leverage generalizable INRs, improving retinal shape representation through population-based training and allowing predictions for unseen cases. Our resolution-independent frameworks facilitate the analysis of OCT images with large B-scan distances, opening up possibilities for the volumetric evaluation of retinal structures and pathologies.
comment: MELBA-BVM 2025 Special Issue. Extended journal version of the paper "Bridging Gaps in Retinal Imaging" presented at the German Conference on Medical Image Computing - BVM2025 (DOI:10.1007/978-3-658-47422-5_24)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出基于隐式神经表示（INRs）的两个框架，用于实现视网膜OCT图像的分辨率无关B扫描插值和图谱构建，以支持容积分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床视网膜OCT成像因大切片间距导致图像高度各向异性和稀疏扫描，传统基于学习的方法多采用2D分析规避此问题，但可能产生相邻B扫描结果不一致的风险，且卷积神经网络受限于训练数据分辨率。隐式神经表示（INRs）通过坐标输入实现分辨率无关，为解决OCT图像各向异性、促进密集3D分析和克服现有方法不足提供了新途径。本研究旨在利用INRs特性，实现更准确的视网膜容积评估。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出两个基于INRs的框架：首先，结合en-face模态的额外信息进行B扫描间插值，以保持视网膜结构的连续性；其次，创建分辨率无关的视网膜图谱，通过基于群体的训练提升INRs的泛化能力，使其能处理未见过的数据。INRs以坐标为输入，实现分辨率无关表示，从而能直接应用于各向异性图像，支持全3D分析，避免了对特定成像协议的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果数据，如准确率或效率改进。然而，论文指出提出的框架能够促进B扫描距离大的OCT图像分析，实现对视网膜结构和病理的容积评估。框架通过INRs改善视网膜形状表示，并允许对未见过案例进行预测，从而为临床应用提供可能性，但具体性能对比和量化指标未详细阐述。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于利用隐式神经表示（INRs）开发了分辨率无关的框架，用于视网膜OCT图像的B扫描插值和图谱构建，提高了容积分析的准确性和一致性。研究具有学术价值，为处理各向异性医学图像提供了创新方法，并可能推动OCT在临床诊断中的广泛应用。未来工作可进一步优化模型泛化性、探索更多模态集成，并验证在实际医疗场景中的效果。

title: Geometric Scaling of Bayesian Inference in LLMs
abstract: Recent work has shown that small transformers trained in controlled "wind-tunnel'' settings can implement exact Bayesian inference, and that their training dynamics produce a geometric substrate -- low-dimensional value manifolds and progressively orthogonal keys -- that encodes posterior structure. We investigate whether this geometric signature persists in production-grade language models. Across Pythia, Phi-2, Llama-3, and Mistral families, we find that last-layer value representations organize along a single dominant axis whose position strongly correlates with predictive entropy, and that domain-restricted prompts collapse this structure into the same low-dimensional manifolds observed in synthetic settings.   To probe the role of this geometry, we perform targeted interventions on the entropy-aligned axis of Pythia-410M during in-context learning. Removing or perturbing this axis selectively disrupts the local uncertainty geometry, whereas matched random-axis interventions leave it intact. However, these single-layer manipulations do not produce proportionally specific degradation in Bayesian-like behavior, indicating that the geometry is a privileged readout of uncertainty rather than a singular computational bottleneck. Taken together, our results show that modern language models preserve the geometric substrate that enables Bayesian inference in wind tunnels, and organize their approximate Bayesian updates along this substrate.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文发现现代语言模型保留了支持贝叶斯推断的几何基底，并将其用于近似贝叶斯更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决小规模变压器在受控'风洞'设置中发现的几何特征是否在真实生产级语言模型中持续存在的问题。现有方法已展示小模型能实现精确贝叶斯推断并形成低维几何基底，但这些发现未在更复杂的大规模模型中得到验证，问题重要性在于理解几何结构在模型内部表示中的作用，有助于提升AI系统的可解释性和不确定性估计能力，推动基础理论发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括分析多个生产级语言模型家族（如Pythia、Phi-2、Llama-3和Mistral）的最后一层值表示几何结构。关键创新点是通过计算发现值表示沿一个主导轴组织，并与预测熵相关，同时使用针对性干预实验：在Pythia-410M模型中进行上下文学习时操纵熵对齐轴，以测试其对局部不确定性几何的影响。摘要未明确说明具体数据集，但涉及模型架构分析和几何干预技术。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在所有调查的模型中，最后一层值表示组织沿一个主导轴，其位置与预测熵高度相关；领域限制提示能将该结构折叠成低维流形，类似合成设置。干预实验显示，移除或扰动熵对齐轴会选择性破坏局部不确定性几何，而随机轴干预则无影响，但这些操作未导致贝叶斯行为成比例退化，表明几何结构是特权的读出机制而非唯一计算瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是确认现代语言模型中存在支持贝叶斯推断的几何基底，并将其用于近似贝叶斯更新。学术价值在于深化了对大型语言模型内部表示和不确定性编码机制的理解，实际应用上为改进模型可解释性和校准提供理论基础。未来工作可探索几何基底在多层模型中的演变，或将其应用于模型优化和更广泛的不确定性估计任务。

title: The Bayesian Geometry of Transformer Attention
abstract: Transformers often appear to perform Bayesian reasoning in context, but verifying this rigorously has been impossible: natural data lack analytic posteriors, and large models conflate reasoning with memorization. We address this by constructing \emph{Bayesian wind tunnels} -- controlled environments where the true posterior is known in closed form and memorization is provably impossible. In these settings, small transformers reproduce Bayesian posteriors with $10^{-3}$-$10^{-4}$ bit accuracy, while capacity-matched MLPs fail by orders of magnitude, establishing a clear architectural separation.   Across two tasks -- bijection elimination and Hidden Markov Model (HMM) state tracking -- we find that transformers implement Bayesian inference through a consistent geometric mechanism: residual streams serve as the belief substrate, feed-forward networks perform the posterior update, and attention provides content-addressable routing. Geometric diagnostics reveal orthogonal key bases, progressive query-key alignment, and a low-dimensional value manifold parameterized by posterior entropy. During training this manifold unfurls while attention patterns remain stable, a \emph{frame-precision dissociation} predicted by recent gradient analyses.   Taken together, these results demonstrate that hierarchical attention realizes Bayesian inference by geometric design, explaining both the necessity of attention and the failure of flat architectures. Bayesian wind tunnels provide a foundation for mechanistically connecting small, verifiable systems to reasoning phenomena observed in large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过贝叶斯风洞方法，证明 transformers 通过几何机制实现贝叶斯推理，解释注意力的必要性。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformers 在上下文中常表现出贝叶斯推理的行为，但验证这一现象面临挑战，因为自然数据缺乏已知的真实后验分布，且大型模型容易混淆推理过程与数据记忆。因此，研究旨在解决如何严格评估 transformers 的推理能力，通过创建受控环境来隔离推理，避免记忆效应，填补现有验证方法的不足。这有助于理解模型内部机制，并为改进模型设计提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括构建贝叶斯风洞——一种控制实验环境，其中真实后验分布可解析计算，且通过设计确保模型无法记忆数据。在两个具体任务（双射消除和隐马尔可夫模型状态跟踪）中，使用小规模 transformers 进行分析。核心创新在于识别几何机制：残差流作为信念基底，前馈网络执行后验更新，注意力提供内容可寻址路由。通过几何诊断，如分析正交键基、渐进查询键对齐和低维值流形，揭示推理过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在贝叶斯风洞中，小 transformers 能够精确重现贝叶斯后验，达到 $10^{-3}$ 到 $10^{-4}$ 位的精度。相比之下，容量匹配的多层感知机表现显著较差，误差高出几个数量级，这证明了 transformers 架构在推理任务上的优越性。几何分析进一步验证了机制：注意力模式保持稳定，值流形参数化后验熵，训练中观察到帧-精度解离现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结论表明，transformers 的分层注意力通过几何设计实现贝叶斯推理，解释了注意力的必要性和扁平架构的失败。贝叶斯风洞方法为机制性连接小规模可验证系统与大语言模型中的推理现象提供了基础，具有重要的理论价值。未来可扩展该方法到更复杂场景，或应用于模型优化以提高推理能力。

title: Data relativistic uncertainty framework for low-illumination anime scenery image enhancement
abstract: By contrast with the prevailing works of low-light enhancement in natural images and videos, this study copes with the low-illumination quality degradation in anime scenery images to bridge the domain gap. For such an underexplored enhancement task, we first curate images from various sources and construct an unpaired anime scenery dataset with diverse environments and illumination conditions to address the data scarcity. To exploit the power of uncertainty information inherent with the diverse illumination conditions, we propose a Data Relativistic Uncertainty (DRU) framework, motivated by the idea from Relativistic GAN. By analogy with the wave-particle duality of light, our framework interpretably defines and quantifies the illumination uncertainty of dark/bright samples, which is leveraged to dynamically adjust the objective functions to recalibrate the model learning under data uncertainty. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of DRU framework by training several versions of EnlightenGANs, yielding superior perceptual and aesthetic qualities beyond the state-of-the-art methods that are incapable of learning from data uncertainty perspective. We hope our framework can expose a novel paradigm of data-centric learning for potential visual and language domains. Code is available.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种数据相对论不确定性框架，通过量化光照不确定性并动态调整目标函数，有效增强低光照动漫场景图像的质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着低光照增强技术在自然图像领域的成熟应用，动漫场景图像的增强仍是一个探索不足的问题。现有方法在动漫图像上存在领域差异，且数据稀缺限制了有效模型的开发。本研究旨在解决低光照动漫场景图像的质量退化问题，弥合领域差距，并应对多样化光照条件下的挑战，为特定领域增强提供新思路。
light_analysis.method: 研究首先从多种来源收集图像，构建了一个无配对的动漫场景数据集，包含多样环境和光照条件，以解决数据不足问题。核心方法是提出数据相对论不确定性（DRU）框架，灵感源自相对论GAN，通过类比光的波粒二象性，可解释地定义和量化暗/亮样本的光照不确定性。该框架利用不确定性动态调整目标函数，优化模型在数据不确定性下的学习过程，并基于EnlightenGANs进行训练实验。
light_analysis.result: 通过训练多个版本的EnlightenGANs，实验验证了DRU框架的有效性。结果显示，在低光照动漫场景图像增强任务中，该框架在感知质量和美学质量上超越了最先进的方法，证明了从数据不确定性角度学习的优势。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率数据，但强调了框架在视觉质量提升方面的优越表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了数据相对论不确定性框架，成功解决了低光照动漫场景图像增强问题。学术上，该研究引入了数据不确定性视角，为数据中心学习开辟了新范式，具有理论创新价值。实际应用中，框架可提升动漫图像视觉质量，并为其他视觉和语言领域的增强任务提供借鉴。未来方向可能包括扩展至更多领域或优化框架的泛化能力。

title: SVBench: Evaluation of Video Generation Models on Social Reasoning
abstract: Recent text-to-video generation models have made remarkable progress in visual realism, motion fidelity, and text-video alignment, yet they still struggle to produce socially coherent behavior. Unlike humans, who readily infer intentions, beliefs, emotions, and social norms from brief visual cues, current models often generate literal scenes without capturing the underlying causal and psychological dynamics. To systematically assess this limitation, we introduce the first benchmark for social reasoning in video generation. Grounded in developmental and social psychology, the benchmark covers thirty classic social cognition paradigms spanning seven core dimensions: mental-state inference, goal-directed action, joint attention, social coordination, prosocial behavior, social norms, and multi-agent strategy. To operationalize these paradigms, we build a fully training-free agent-based pipeline that distills the reasoning structure of each paradigm, synthesizes diverse video-ready scenarios, enforces conceptual neutrality and difficulty control through cue-based critique, and evaluates generated videos with a high-capacity VLM judge along five interpretable dimensions of social reasoning. Using this framework, we conduct the first large-scale evaluation of seven state-of-the-art video generation systems. Results show a clear gap between surface-level plausibility and deeper social reasoning, suggesting that current models remain limited in their ability to generate socially grounded behavior. https://github.com/Gloria2tt/SVBench-Evaluation
