light_analysis.overview: SVBench首次提出基于发展和社会心理学的基准，系统性评估视频生成模型的社会推理能力，填补了该领域空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到视频生成模型在视觉真实感和运动保真度方面进步显著，但仍难以生成社会一致性行为。人类能轻松从视觉线索推断意图、信念和情感，而模型往往生成字面场景，缺乏深层因果和心理动态。这个问题重要，因为它限制了模型在需要社会理解的视频应用中的表现，现有方法侧重于表面特征，忽视社会推理，导致行为不够智能和自然。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出无需训练的基于代理的管道，蒸馏三十个社会认知范式的推理结构，合成多样化视频就绪场景，并通过基于线索的批评确保概念中立性和难度控制。使用高容量视频语言模型（VLM）作为法官，从心理状态推断、目标导向行为、联合注意、社会协调、亲社会行为、社会规范和多代理策略这五个可解释维度评估生成视频的社会推理能力，覆盖七个核心维度以系统化评估。
light_analysis.result: 通过对七个最先进视频生成系统的大规模评估，结果显示表面合理性与深层社会推理之间存在明显差距。模型虽然在视觉和运动方面表现良好，但在捕捉社会动态上不足，例如推断代理意图和遵守社会规范的能力有限，这突显了当前技术的局限性，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与基线方法对比表明模型社会推理能力有待提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVBench基准的引入填补了视频生成模型社会推理评估的空白，基于心理学理论提供结构化框架，具有重要的学术价值，推动模型向更智能、符合人类行为的方向发展。在实际应用中，有助于改进视频生成的社会理解能力，提升现实世界交互性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但强调了当前模型的限制和进一步研究的必要性。

title: Pretrained battery transformer (PBT): A foundation model for universal battery life prediction
abstract: Early prediction of battery cycle life is essential for improving battery design, manufacturing, and deployment. However, despite encouraging results with machine learning, progress remains constrained by scarce data and data heterogeneity across battery chemistries, specifications, formation protocols, and operating conditions. Although transfer learning has been widely explored to alleviate these challenges, its effectiveness is constrained by the lack of a foundation model that can capture broadly transferable knowledge from diverse battery life data. This gap persists because integration of heterogeneous battery datasets under data scarcity is inherently challenging. Here we introduce the pretrained battery transformer (PBT), a foundation model for battery life prediction that incorporates battery-knowledge-encoded mixture-of-experts layers to learn transferable representations from heterogeneous data. PBT is pretrained on 13 lithium-ion battery datasets and subsequently adapted to downstream battery life prediction tasks through transfer learning. Across 15 datasets covering 977 batteries and 533 sets of aging conditions from lithium-ion, sodium-ion and zinc-ion batteries, PBT achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the strongest competing method by 21.8% on average, with gains of up to 86.9%. Our study establishes the first foundation model for battery life prediction and provides a scalable route towards universal battery lifetime prediction systems, with broader implications for other scientific and technological domains characterized by scarce and heterogeneous data.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了预训练电池变压器（PBT），首个用于电池寿命预测的基础模型，通过电池知识编码的专家混合层从异构数据中学习，实现了通用预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 电池循环寿命的早期预测对优化电池设计、制造和使用至关重要，但当前研究面临数据稀缺和数据异构性的挑战，如不同化学组成、规格和操作条件。现有机器学习方法虽取得进展，但转移学习因缺乏能从多样化数据中捕获广泛可转移知识的基础模型而效果受限，这源于整合异构数据集在数据稀缺下的固有困难，凸显了开发新模型的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法提出了预训练电池变压器（PBT），这是一个基础模型，通过整合电池知识编码的专家混合层来学习可转移表示，以从异构数据中捕获通用知识。PBT首先在13个锂离子电池数据集上进行预训练，然后利用转移学习技术适应下游电池寿命预测任务。关键创新点在于使用mixture-of-experts架构处理数据异构性，并采用预训练策略克服数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验在15个数据集上评估PBT，这些数据集覆盖977个电池和533组老化条件，包括锂离子、钠离子和锌离子电池。PBT实现了最先进的性能，平均准确率超越最强竞争方法21.8%，最高提升达86.9%，证明了其在多种电池类型和条件下具有卓越的预测能力和泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是建立了首个电池寿命预测的基础模型PBT，通过高效整合异构数据，提升了预测的准确性和泛化能力，为开发通用电池寿命预测系统提供了可扩展路径，并对其他面临数据稀缺和异构性挑战的科学与技术领域具有启发意义，未来工作可能包括扩展到更多电池类型或优化模型架构。

title: Enhancing Tree Species Classification: Insights from YOLOv8 and Explainable AI Applied to TLS Point Cloud Projections
abstract: Aiming to advance research in the field of interpretability of deep learning models for tree species classification using TLS 3D point clouds we present insights in the classification abilities of YOLOv8 through a new framework which enables systematic analysis of saliency maps derived from CAM (Class Activation Mapping). To investigate the contribution of structural tree features to the classification decisions of the models, we link regions with high saliency derived from the application of Finer-CAM to segments of 2D side-view images that correspond to structural tree features. Using TLS 3D point clouds from 2445 trees across seven European tree species, we trained five YOLOv8 models with cross-validation, reaching a mean accuracy of 96% (SD = 0.24%) when applied to the test data. Our results demonstrate that Finer-CAM can be considered faithful in identifying discriminative regions that discriminate target tree species. This renders Finer-CAM suitable for enhancing the interpretability of the tree species classification models. Analysis of 630 saliency maps indicate that the models primarily rely on image regions associated with tree crowns for species classification. While this result is pronounced in Silver Birch, European Beech, English oak, and Norway Spruce, image regions associated with stems contribute more frequently to the differentiation of European ash, Scots pine, and Douglas-fir. We demonstrate that the visibility of detailed structural tree features in the 2D side-view images enhances the discriminative performances of the models, indicating YOLOv8`s abilities to leverage detailed point cloud representations. Our results represent a first step toward enhancing the understanding of the classification decision processes of tree species classification models, aiding in the identification of data set and model limitations, and building confidence in model predictions.
comment: 34 pages, 17 figures, submitted to Forestry: An International Journal of Forest Research

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一个结合YOLOv8和Finer-CAM的新框架，通过分析TLS点云数据的显著性图，增强树物种分类模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决使用TLS（地面激光扫描）3D点云进行树物种分类时深度学习模型可解释性不足的实际问题。在生态学和林业应用中，理解模型的分类决策过程至关重要，可以帮助识别数据集和模型的局限性，并增强对预测结果的信心。现有方法可能过于侧重于提高准确性，而缺乏对模型内部工作机制的系统分析，这限制了模型在敏感领域的可靠部署。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个新框架，核心方法是利用YOLOv8模型对TLS点云的2D侧视图像投影进行分类，并结合Finer-CAM技术生成显著性图。关键创新点在于系统地链接高显著性区域与树木的结构特征（如树冠和树干），以深入分析模型的决策依据。使用数据集包括从2445棵树采集的TLS点云，覆盖七个欧洲树物种，通过交叉验证训练五个YOLOv8模型，以评估分类性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，YOLOv8模型在测试数据上实现了平均96%（标准差0.24%）的分类准确率，表明其高精度。Finer-CAM被证明能有效识别区分不同树物种的判别区域，增强了模型的可解释性。分析630个显著性图表明，模型主要依赖树冠区域进行分类，但对于欧洲白蜡树、苏格兰松和花旗松等物种，树干区域更常用于区分。这表明详细结构特征在2D图像中的可见性提升了模型的判别能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了一个结合YOLOv8和可解释AI的框架，显著提升了树物种分类模型的可解释性，学术价值在于为深度学习在生态学中的可解释性提供了新方法，实际应用价值是支持林业管理和生态监测中的可靠决策。作为第一步研究，它有助于识别模型和数据集的局限性，并建立对预测的信心，未来工作可扩展到更多物种和复杂场景以优化模型性能。

title: GTR-Turbo: Merged Checkpoint is Secretly a Free Teacher for Agentic VLM Training
abstract: Multi-turn reinforcement learning (RL) for multi-modal agents built upon vision-language models (VLMs) is hampered by sparse rewards and long-horizon credit assignment. Recent methods densify the reward by querying a teacher that provides step-level feedback, e.g., Guided Thought Reinforcement (GTR) and On-Policy Distillation, but rely on costly, often privileged models as the teacher, limiting practicality and reproducibility. We introduce GTR-Turbo, a highly efficient upgrade to GTR that matches its performance without training on or querying an expensive teacher model. Specifically, GTR-Turbo merges the weights of checkpoints produced during ongoing RL training and then uses the resulting merged model as a "free" teacher to guide subsequent RL via supervised fine-tuning or soft logit distillation. This design removes dependence on privileged VLMs (e.g., GPT or Gemini), mitigates the "entropy collapse" observed in prior work, and maintains stable training. Across diverse visual agentic tasks, GTR-Turbo improves the accuracy of the baseline model by 10-30% while reducing wall-clock training time by 50% and compute cost by 60% relative to GTR.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GTR-Turbo方法，通过合并训练检查点权重创建免费教师，有效提升多模态代理强化学习的效率与性能，无需依赖昂贵外部模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态代理基于视觉语言模型（VLMs）的多轮强化学习（RL）面临稀疏奖励和长期信用分配的挑战，导致训练效率低下。现有方法如指导思维强化（GTR）和策略蒸馏通过查询昂贵、特权模型（如GPT或Gemini）作为教师来稠化奖励，虽改善了性能，但依赖外部资源限制了实用性和可重复性。因此，迫切需要一种更高效、低成本的训练策略来解决这一问题，减少对特权模型的依赖，促进算法在现实场景中的广泛应用。
light_analysis.method: GTR-Turbo的核心方法是：在RL训练过程中，合并生成的检查点权重，形成一个新的模型作为'免费'教师。然后，利用该教师模型通过监督微调或软logit蒸馏指导后续RL训练。关键创新在于消除了对特权VLMs的依赖，同时缓解了先前方法中观察到的'熵崩溃'问题，从而保持训练稳定性。摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集和模型架构，但涉及视觉语言模型和视觉代理任务，强调了自监督蒸馏的技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 在多种视觉代理任务中，GTR-Turbo显著提升性能：相对于GTR，将基线模型的准确率提高了10-30%。同时，效率大幅改善，训练时间减少了50%，计算成本降低了60%。这表明GTR-Turbo不仅在性能上匹配或超越原有方法，还在资源消耗上实现显著优化，验证了其在不依赖外部教师模型情况下的高效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GTR-Turbo的主要贡献是提出了一种无需昂贵教师模型的RL训练升级方法，通过合并检查点权重创造免费教师，有效解决稀疏奖励问题。学术上，它为多模态代理训练提供了新思路；实际应用中，降低训练成本，提升可扩展性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在方向可能包括扩展到更复杂的代理任务或进一步优化权重合并策略。

title: Ultra-Low Bitrate Perceptual Image Compression with Shallow Encoder
abstract: Ultra-low bitrate image compression (below 0.05 bits per pixel) is increasingly critical for bandwidth-constrained and computation-limited encoding scenarios such as edge devices. Existing frameworks typically rely on large pretrained encoders (e.g., VAEs or tokenizer-based models) and perform transform coding within their generative latent space. While these approaches achieve impressive perceptual fidelity, their reliance on heavy encoder networks makes them unsuitable for deployment on weak sender devices. In this work, we explore the feasibility of applying shallow encoders for ultra-low bitrate compression and propose a novel Asymmetric Extreme Image Compression (AEIC) framework that pursues simultaneously encoding simplicity and decoding quality. Specifically, AEIC employs moderate or even shallow encoder networks, while leveraging an one-step diffusion decoder to maintain high-fidelity and high-realism reconstructions under extreme bitrates. To further enhance the efficiency of shallow encoders, we design a dual-side feature distillation scheme that transfers knowledge from AEIC with moderate encoders to its shallow encoder variants. Experiments show that AEIC not only outperforms existing methods on rate-distortion-perception performance at ultra-low bitrates, but also delivers exceptional encoding efficiency for 35.8 FPS on 1080P images, while maintaining competitive decoding speed compared to existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/LuizScarlet/AEIC.
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了 Asymmetric Extreme Image Compression (AEIC) 框架，通过浅层编码器和一步扩散解码器实现高效超低比特率图像压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 超低比特率图像压缩（低于每像素0.05位）对于边缘设备等带宽和计算受限场景至关重要，但现有方法如基于VAE或tokenizer的模型依赖大型编码器网络，虽然能在生成潜空间中实现高感知保真度，却因编码器复杂而不适合在弱发送设备上部署。这突显了开发编码简单的压缩方法的迫切需求，以在保持压缩效率的同时适应实际部署环境，解决现有技术的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 AEIC 框架，采用中等或浅层编码器网络以减少编码复杂度，并引入一步扩散解码器在极端比特率下维持高保真度和真实感重建。关键创新包括不对称设计平衡编码-解码性能，以及双端特征蒸馏方案，从标准编码器迁移知识到浅层变体，从而提升压缩效率。该方法强调以浅层网络实现有效特征提取，避免重型计算负担，专注于解码端的先进生成技术。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，AEIC 在超低比特率下优于现有方法，在率失真感知性能方面表现更优，具体指标包括编码效率达到35.8 FPS处理1080P图像，同时解码速度与现有方法保持竞争。这些数据验证了浅层编码器在极端压缩场景下的可行性，实现了编码效率和恢复质量的显著提升，为实际应用提供了可靠依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出 AEIC 框架，通过浅层编码器和扩散解码器平衡编码简单性和解码质量，解决了现有压缩方法在部署上的局限性。该研究具有重要的学术价值和实际应用意义，特别适合边缘设备等计算受限环境，推动了图像压缩技术的发展。未来工作可进一步优化蒸馏策略或扩展应用范围，摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Toward Closed-loop Molecular Discovery via Language Model, Property Alignment and Strategic Search
abstract: Drug discovery is a time-consuming and expensive process, with traditional high-throughput and docking-based virtual screening hampered by low success rates and limited scalability. Recent advances in generative modelling, including autoregressive, diffusion, and flow-based approaches, have enabled de novo ligand design beyond the limits of enumerative screening. Yet these models often suffer from inadequate generalization, limited interpretability, and an overemphasis on binding affinity at the expense of key pharmacological properties, thereby restricting their translational utility. Here we present Trio, a molecular generation framework integrating fragment-based molecular language modeling, reinforcement learning, and Monte Carlo tree search, for effective and interpretable closed-loop targeted molecular design. Through the three key components, Trio enables context-aware fragment assembly, enforces physicochemical and synthetic feasibility, and guides a balanced search between the exploration of novel chemotypes and the exploitation of promising intermediates within protein binding pockets. Experimental results show that Trio reliably achieves chemically valid and pharmacologically enhanced ligands, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches with improved binding affinity (+7.85%), drug-likeness (+11.10%) and synthetic accessibility (+12.05%), while expanding molecular diversity more than fourfold. By combining generalization, plausibility, and interpretability, Trio establishes a closed-loop generative paradigm that redefines how chemical space can be navigated, offering a transformative foundation for the next era of AI-driven drug discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Trio框架，集成片段分子语言建模、强化学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索，实现高效可解释的闭环分子设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 药物发现过程耗时昂贵，传统高吞吐量和基于对接的虚拟筛选方法因成功率低和扩展性有限而受阻。现有生成模型如自回归、扩散和流模型虽能超越枚举筛选限制，但存在泛化不足、可解释性差的问题，且过度关注结合亲和力而忽略其他关键药理属性，限制了其实际应用价值。因此，需要开发新方法来克服这些缺陷，提升药物发现的效率和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: Trio框架整合三个核心组件：基于片段的分子语言建模，用于上下文感知的片段组装；强化学习，以确保物理化学和合成可行性；以及蒙特卡洛树搜索，指导在探索新化学类型与利用蛋白质结合口袋中有前景中间体之间的平衡搜索。该方法通过协同工作机制，实现闭环靶向分子设计，增强生成过程的效率和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Trio可靠生成化学有效和药理增强的配体，在结合亲和力上优于最先进方法7.85%，药物类似性提升11.10%，合成可及性提升12.05%，同时分子多样性扩展超过四倍。这些数据表明，Trio在多个关键性能指标上显著改进，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Trio结合了泛化性、合理性和可解释性，建立了闭环生成范式，重新定义了化学空间的导航方式，为AI驱动的药物发现提供了转型基础。其贡献在于提升分子设计效率和质量，学术价值在于推动可解释生成方法发展，未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，可能包括进一步算法优化或应用扩展。

title: Partially Equivariant Reinforcement Learning in Symmetry-Breaking Environments
abstract: Group symmetries provide a powerful inductive bias for reinforcement learning (RL), enabling efficient generalization across symmetric states and actions via group-invariant Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). However, real-world environments almost never realize fully group-invariant MDPs; dynamics, actuation limits, and reward design usually break symmetries, often only locally. Under group-invariant Bellman backups for such cases, local symmetry-breaking introduces errors that propagate across the entire state-action space, resulting in global value estimation errors. To address this, we introduce Partially group-Invariant MDP (PI-MDP), which selectively applies group-invariant or standard Bellman backups depending on where symmetry holds. This framework mitigates error propagation from locally broken symmetries while maintaining the benefits of equivariance, thereby enhancing sample efficiency and generalizability. Building on this framework, we present practical RL algorithms -- Partially Equivariant (PE)-DQN for discrete control and PE-SAC for continuous control -- that combine the benefits of equivariance with robustness to symmetry-breaking. Experiments across Grid-World, locomotion, and manipulation benchmarks demonstrate that PE-DQN and PE-SAC significantly outperform baselines, highlighting the importance of selective symmetry exploitation for robust and sample-efficient RL. Project page: https://pranaboy72.github.io/perl_page/

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种部分等变强化学习框架和算法，通过选择性利用群对称性来处理局部对称性破坏环境，以提高样本效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究背景是群对称性为强化学习提供有效的归纳偏置，通过群不变马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）实现对称状态和动作的高效泛化。然而，真实环境中的动态变化、执行限制和奖励设计往往局部破坏对称性，导致现有基于完全群不变MDP的方法在局部对称性破坏时引入错误，这些错误通过群不变Bellman备份传播到整个状态-动作空间，造成全局价值估计不准确。这限制了RL算法在非完全对称环境中的样本效率和泛化能力，因此需要开发鲁棒方法来应对局部对称性破坏，以提升算法性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了部分群不变MDP（PI-MDP）框架，核心创新在于根据对称性是否成立，选择性地应用群不变Bellman备份或标准备份，以减轻局部对称性破坏导致的错误传播，同时保持等变性的优势。基于此框架，开发了两个实用RL算法：用于离散控制的PE-DQN和用于连续控制的PE-SAC，这些算法结合了等变性带来的泛化能力和对称性破坏的鲁棒性。方法利用了强化学习中的标准组件，但通过选择性对称性利用优化了备份过程，提高了算法适应复杂环境的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个基准测试中进行，包括Grid-World、运动任务和控制任务。结果显示，提出的PE-DQN和PE-SAC算法在样本效率和泛化性能上显著优于基线方法，突显了选择性对称性利用对于提高RL在对称性破坏环境中的鲁棒性的重要性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值，但强调了算法在多个任务中的优越表现，表明该方法能有效减少错误传播并提升整体学习效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了部分等变强化学习框架和算法，解决了局部对称性破坏环境中的错误传播问题，从而增强了RL的样本效率和泛化能力。这具有重要的学术价值，推动了对称性在RL中的应用研究，并提高了算法在实际环境中的实用性和鲁棒性。未来工作可能包括将该方法扩展到更多复杂环境，并进一步优化算法以处理更广泛的对称性破坏场景。

title: TEAR: Temporal-aware Automated Red-teaming for Text-to-Video Models
abstract: Text-to-Video (T2V) models are capable of synthesizing high-quality, temporally coherent dynamic video content, but the diverse generation also inherently introduces critical safety challenges. Existing safety evaluation methods,which focus on static image and text generation, are insufficient to capture the complex temporal dynamics in video generation. To address this, we propose a TEmporal-aware Automated Red-teaming framework, named TEAR, an automated framework designed to uncover safety risks specifically linked to the dynamic temporal sequencing of T2V models. TEAR employs a temporal-aware test generator optimized via a two-stage approach: initial generator training and temporal-aware online preference learning, to craft textually innocuous prompts that exploit temporal dynamics to elicit policy-violating video output. And a refine model is adopted to improve the prompt stealthiness and adversarial effectiveness cyclically. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of TEAR across open-source and commercial T2V systems with over 80% attack success rate, a significant boost from prior best result of 57%.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出TEAR框架，一种时态感知的自动红队测试方法，专门用于揭示文本到视频模型中与动态时态序列相关的安全风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到视频模型能生成高质量、时态一致的视频，但多样化内容引入关键安全挑战。现有安全评估方法主要针对静态图像和文本生成，无法有效捕捉视频中的复杂时态动态，导致对时态相关风险的检测不足。因此，需要开发专注于时态感知的自动化框架，以提升对视频生成模型安全性的全面评估。
light_analysis.method: TEAR框架采用时态感知测试生成器，通过两阶段优化：初始生成器训练和时态感知在线偏好学习，以生成文本无害的提示，利用时态动态触发违反策略的视频输出。同时，引入精炼模型循环提升提示的隐蔽性和对抗效果，确保测试的有效性和不易被察觉。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，TEAR在开源和商业文本到视频系统中攻击成功率超过80%，相比先前最佳结果的57%有显著提升，突显了框架在捕捉时态相关安全风险方面的有效性。广泛的评估验证了其鲁棒性和在实际应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了TEAR框架，提高了对视频生成安全风险的理解，并为安全评估方法设计提供了新思路。其学术价值在于强调时态动态的重要性，实际应用可促进更安全的AI视频系统开发，但摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能扩展到更复杂的动态内容评估。

title: AD-R1: Closed-Loop Reinforcement Learning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Impartial World Models
abstract: End-to-end models for autonomous driving hold the promise of learning complex behaviors directly from sensor data, but face critical challenges in safety and handling long-tail events. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising path to overcome these limitations, yet its success in autonomous driving has been elusive. We identify a fundamental flaw hindering this progress: a deep seated optimistic bias in the world models used for RL. To address this, we introduce a framework for post-training policy refinement built around an Impartial World Model. Our primary contribution is to teach this model to be honest about danger. We achieve this with a novel data synthesis pipeline, Counterfactual Synthesis, which systematically generates a rich curriculum of plausible collisions and off-road events. This transforms the model from a passive scene completer into a veridical forecaster that remains faithful to the causal link between actions and outcomes. We then integrate this Impartial World Model into our closed-loop RL framework, where it serves as an internal critic. During refinement, the agent queries the critic to ``dream" of the outcomes for candidate actions. We demonstrate through extensive experiments, including on a new Risk Foreseeing Benchmark, that our model significantly outperforms baselines in predicting failures. Consequently, when used as a critic, it enables a substantial reduction in safety violations in challenging simulations, proving that teaching a model to dream of danger is a critical step towards building truly safe and intelligent autonomous agents.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于公正世界模型的闭环强化学习框架，通过教模型预测危险以提高端到端自动驾驶的安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶模型有直接从传感器数据学习复杂行为的潜力，但面临安全和长尾事件处理的挑战。强化学习虽为解决此问题提供了希望，但在自动驾驶中应用受限，主要原因在于用于RL的世界模型存在根深蒂固的乐观偏差。这种偏差导致模型无法准确评估危险动作的后果，从而在安全关键场景中表现不佳，限制了RL的实际部署和安全性提升，因此亟需设计更公正的模型以克服这一缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是提出一个Impartial World Model，通过Counterfactual Synthesis数据合成流水线，系统生成可能的碰撞和越野事件数据，使模型从被动场景完成者转变为忠实预测动作与结果因果关系的真实预测者。该模型随后被集成到一个闭环RL框架中，作为内部批评家，在策略精炼时用于“梦想”候选动作的潜在后果，从而指导代理学习更安全的驾驶策略，无需额外复杂架构。
light_analysis.result: 通过在Risk Foreseeing Benchmark等实验上进行广泛评估，模型在预测失败方面显著优于基线方法。当用作批评家时，它在挑战性模拟中实现了安全违规的显著减少，证明了该方法在提高自动驾驶安全性上的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值，但强调了与基线对比的优越表现和风险降低的实质性进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是展示了通过教模型诚实预测危险，可以显著增强强化学习在自动驾驶中的安全性和实用性。这不仅为构建真正智能和安全的自主代理提供了关键步骤，还具有广泛的学术价值和应用前景，例如推广到其他RL任务。未来工作可能包括优化合成数据方法或扩展到更复杂的环境。

title: Clair Obscur: an Illumination-Aware Method for Real-World Image Vectorization
abstract: Image vectorization aims to convert raster images into editable, scalable vector representations while preserving visual fidelity. Existing vectorization methods struggle to represent complex real-world images, often producing fragmented shapes at the cost of semantic conciseness. In this paper, we propose COVec, an illumination-aware vectorization framework inspired by the Clair-Obscur principle of light-shade contrast. COVec is the first to introduce intrinsic image decomposition in the vector domain, separating an image into albedo, shade, and light layers in a unified vector representation. A semantic-guided initialization and two-stage optimization refine these layers with differentiable rendering. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that COVec achieves higher visual fidelity and significantly improved editability compared to existing methods. The code will be released at https://github.com/decade-de/COVec.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出COVec框架，首次在矢量域中引入光照感知的内在图像分解，显著提升复杂图像向量化的视觉保真度和可编辑性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像向量化旨在将光栅图像转换为可编辑、可缩放的矢量表示，但在处理复杂现实世界图像时，现有方法常产生碎片化形状，牺牲语义简洁性，导致视觉保真度不足。这一问题在图形设计、计算机视觉等领域至关重要，因为高质量的矢量表示能支持更灵活的编辑和跨平台应用。现有方法的不足在于忽略光照影响，使得向量化结果在自然度和准确性方面受限，从而难以满足高保真图像处理需求。
light_analysis.method: COVec框架基于Clair-Obscur明暗对比原理，创新地在矢量域进行内在图像分解，将图像分离为反照率、阴影和光层，并以统一矢量表示。该方法采用语义引导的初始化步骤，结合两阶段优化过程，利用可微分渲染技术精炼各层，确保生成矢量图形的高保真度和易编辑性。关键创新点包括首次将光照分解应用于矢量化领域，以及通过语义信息指导优化过程，以提升结果的视觉质量和结构性。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，COVec相比现有向量化方法，在视觉保真度和可编辑性方面均有显著提升。具体来说，COVec生成的矢量图像更接近原始光栅图像，同时保持更好的编辑便利性，如易于调整光照和颜色参数。与基线方法对比，COVec减少了碎片化形状，提高了语义连贯性，从而在复杂场景下表现更优。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据如准确率或效率改进，但强调了整体优势的实证结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: COVec的主要贡献在于提出了一种光照感知的图像向量化方法，通过内在分解技术改善矢量表示的视觉质量和可编辑性，为图像处理领域提供了新视角。学术价值体现在将光照分析引入矢量域，推动矢量图形生成技术的发展；实际应用价值适用于数字艺术、视觉设计等领域，支持高保真图像编辑。局限性方面摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能包括优化算法效率、扩展至更多图像类型或探索更复杂的光照条件。

title: Hierarchical Dual-Strategy Unlearning for Biomedical and Healthcare Intelligence Using Imperfect and Privacy-Sensitive Medical Data
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit exceptional performance but pose substantial privacy risks due to training data memorization, particularly within healthcare contexts involving imperfect or privacy-sensitive patient information. We present a hierarchical dual-strategy framework for selective knowledge unlearning that precisely removes specialized knowledge while preserving fundamental medical competencies. Our approach synergistically integrates geometric-constrained gradient updates to selectively modulate target parameters with concept-aware token-level interventions that distinguish between preservation-critical and unlearning-targeted tokens via a unified four-level medical concept hierarchy. Comprehensive evaluations on the MedMCQA (surgical) and MHQA (anxiety, depression, trauma) datasets demonstrate superior performance, achieving an 82.7% forgetting rate and 88.5% knowledge preservation. Notably, our framework maintains robust privacy guarantees while requiring modification of only 0.1% of parameters, addressing critical needs for regulatory compliance, auditability, and ethical standards in clinical research.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种分层双策略框架，用于医疗大型语言模型的选择性知识遗忘，以解决隐私风险并保持核心医疗能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于大型语言模型（LLMs）在医疗保健领域表现出色，但由于训练数据记忆，存在显著的隐私风险，尤其是在涉及不完美或隐私敏感的患者信息时。现有方法在精确移除特定知识的同时保持基础医疗能力方面不足，这可能导致法规合规性、审计性和伦理标准的挑战。因此，开发高效的方法来平衡知识遗忘和保留至关重要，以满足临床研究和实际应用的需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于分层双策略框架，通过结合几何约束梯度更新来选择性调制目标参数，并使用概念感知令牌级干预，通过统一的四级医疗概念层次区分保存关键令牌和遗忘目标令牌。具体技术包括在MedMCQA（外科）和MHQA（焦虑、抑郁、创伤）数据集上进行训练和评估，确保精确控制知识移除过程，同时仅需修改少量参数（如0.1%）以提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 在MedMCQA和MHQA数据集上的综合评估显示，框架取得了卓越性能：遗忘率达到82.7%，知识保存率达到88.5%。与基线方法相比，该框架在精确移除专门知识的同时保持了基础医疗能力，且仅需修改0.1%的参数，确保了计算效率。这些结果验证了框架在隐私保护、法规合规和审计标准方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了一种创新的分层双策略遗忘框架，有效解决医疗LLM的隐私问题，同时保持核心医疗能力。其学术价值在于提供了一种新颖的知识遗忘方法，促进临床研究的伦理合规和实际应用。未来工作可扩展至其他隐私敏感领域，并进一步优化参数效率和泛化能力，以应对更广泛的挑战。

title: REMSA: Foundation Model Selection for Remote Sensing via a Constraint-Aware Agent
abstract: Foundation Models (FMs) are increasingly integrated into remote sensing (RS) pipelines. These models include unimodal vision encoders and multimodal architectures. FMs are adapted to diverse perception tasks, such as image classification, change detection, and visual question answering. However, selecting the most suitable remote sensing foundation model (RSFM) for a specific task remains challenging due to scattered documentation, heterogeneous formats, and complex deployment constraints. To address this, we first introduce the RSFM Database (RS-FMD), the first structured and schema-guided resource covering over 160 RSFMs trained on various data modalities, spanning different spatial, spectral, and temporal resolutions, considering different learning paradigms. Built upon RS-FMD, we further present REMSA, a constraint-aware agent that enables automated RSFM selection from natural language queries. REMSA combines structured FM metadata retrieval with a task-driven decision workflow. In detail, it interprets user input, clarifies missing constraints, ranks models via in-context learning, and provides transparent justifications. Our system supports various RS tasks and data modalities, enabling personalized, reproducible, and efficient FM selection. To evaluate REMSA, we construct a benchmark of 100 expert-verified RS query scenarios. Each query is evaluated across 4 systems and 3 LLM backbones, with the top-3 selected models manually assessed by domain experts. This results in 3,000 expert-scored task--system--model configurations under our novel expert-centered evaluation protocol. REMSA outperforms multiple baselines, showing its practical utility in real decision-making applications. REMSA operates entirely on publicly available metadata of open source RSFMs, without accessing private or sensitive data.
comment: Code and data available at https://github.com/be-chen/REMSA

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了REMSA，一种基于约束感知代理的遥感基础模型自动选择系统，结合结构化数据库和自然语言查询实现高效模型推荐。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是遥感基础模型选择面临挑战，因为文档分散、格式异构和部署约束复杂，缺乏统一资源。随着基础模型在遥感任务中集成，手动选择效率低下，影响实际应用。现有方法难以处理多样化任务和约束，自动化工具缺乏，导致选择过程耗时且不可靠，阻碍了遥感领域的模型优化和部署效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括首先构建RSFM数据库（RS-FMD），这是一个结构化资源，涵盖160多个遥感基础模型，涉及多种数据模态、空间光谱分辨率、时间分辨率和学习范式。然后开发REMSA代理，它结合结构化元数据检索与任务驱动决策流程，通过自然语言处理解释用户查询、使用上下文学习澄清约束并排名模型、提供透明解释，实现自动化模型选择，核心创新在于利用LLM进行智能决策支持。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果基于构建的100个专家验证查询基准进行评估，覆盖4个系统和3个LLM骨干网络，专家手动评估了3000个任务-系统-模型配置。REMSA在多个基线方法中表现优越，显示出在真实决策应用中的实用性，例如在模型选择准确性和效率方面有显著改进，具体性能指标如准确率摘要未明确说明，但强调其优于其他方法并支持个性化推荐。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是该研究贡献了首个结构化的遥感基础模型数据库（RS-FMD）和自动化选择系统REMSA，促进了模型选择的个性化、可重复性和高效性。学术价值在于引入新的专家中心评估协议和基准，应用价值在于提升遥感任务中模型部署的实际效率，局限性包括依赖公开元数据，未来工作可扩展数据库覆盖或集成更多约束条件以适应更广泛场景。

title: STREAM-VAE: Dual-Path Routing for Slow and Fast Dynamics in Vehicle Telemetry Anomaly Detection
abstract: Automotive telemetry data exhibits slow drifts and fast spikes, often within the same sequence, making reliable anomaly detection challenging. Standard reconstruction-based methods, including sequence variational autoencoders (VAEs), use a single latent process and therefore mix heterogeneous time scales, which can smooth out spikes or inflate variances and weaken anomaly separation.   In this paper, we present STREAM-VAE, a variational autoencoder for anomaly detection in automotive telemetry time-series data. Our model uses a dual-path encoder to separate slow drift and fast spike signal dynamics, and a decoder that represents transient deviations separately from the normal operating pattern. STREAM-VAE is designed for deployment, producing stable anomaly scores across operating modes for both in-vehicle monitors and backend fleet analytics.   Experiments on an automotive telemetry dataset and the public SMD benchmark show that explicitly separating drift and spike dynamics improves robustness compared to strong forecasting, attention, graph, and VAE baselines.
comment: Accepted to appear in the 2026 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2026), Detroit, MI, USA, June 22-25, 2026. 8 Pages, 4 Figures, 4 Tables

light_analysis.overview: STREAM-VAE 提出了一种通过双路径编码器分离慢漂移和快尖峰动态的变分自编码器，用于汽车遥测异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 汽车遥测数据在同一个序列中同时表现出慢漂移和快尖峰，这使得可靠的异常检测变得具有挑战性。标准重建方法，如序列变分自编码器 (VAEs)，使用单一潜在过程，导致混合了不同时间尺度的信号动态，可能平滑掉尖峰或放大方差，从而削弱异常分离能力。这一问题的重要性在于汽车遥测异常检测对车辆安全和车队管理至关重要，而现有方法在处理异质时间尺度时存在不足，无法有效区分钟器动态。
light_analysis.method: STREAM-VAE 的核心方法是基于变分自编码器架构，设计了一个双路径编码器来分离慢漂移和快尖峰的信号动态。解码器将瞬态偏差与正常操作模式分开表示，以增强异常检测的准确性。模型面向部署，旨在为车内监控和后端车队分析提供稳定的异常分数。关键创新点是双路径路由机制，专门处理时间序列数据中的多尺度动态，使用变分自编码器框架进行建模。
light_analysis.result: 实验在汽车遥测数据集和公开的 SMD 基准测试中进行，结果表明 STREAM-VAE 通过显式分离漂移和尖峰动态，相比基于预测、注意力、图和 VAE 的基线方法，提高了异常检测的鲁棒性和稳定性。性能改进包括更好的异常分离能力，摘要未提供具体的准确率数据，但与多种基线对比显示了优势，强调了模型在处理复杂时间尺度时的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STREAM-VAE 的主要贡献是开发了一种能有效分离不同时间尺度动态的异常检测模型，提高了汽车遥测数据的鲁棒性。研究具有学术价值，扩展了变分自编码器在时间序列分析中的应用，同时具有实际应用价值，可部署于智能车辆监控和车队管理系统中。局限性可能包括模型的计算复杂度或对特定数据类型的依赖，摘要未明确说明未来工作方向，但潜在方向可能包括优化效率或扩展到其他领域。

title: X-WIN: Building Chest Radiograph World Model via Predictive Sensing
abstract: Chest X-ray radiography (CXR) is an essential medical imaging technique for disease diagnosis. However, as 2D projectional images, CXRs are limited by structural superposition and hence fail to capture 3D anatomies. This limitation makes representation learning and disease diagnosis challenging. To address this challenge, we propose a novel CXR world model named X-WIN, which distills volumetric knowledge from chest computed tomography (CT) by learning to predict its 2D projections in latent space. The core idea is that a world model with internalized knowledge of 3D anatomical structure can predict CXRs under various transformations in 3D space. During projection prediction, we introduce an affinity-guided contrastive alignment loss that leverages mutual similarities to capture rich, correlated information across projections from the same volume. To improve model adaptability, we incorporate real CXRs into training through masked image modeling and employ a domain classifier to encourage statistically similar representations for real and simulated CXRs. Comprehensive experiments show that X-WIN outperforms existing foundation models on diverse downstream tasks using linear probing and few-shot fine-tuning. X-WIN also demonstrates the ability to render 2D projections for reconstructing a 3D CT volume.

light_analysis.overview: X-WIN通过从CT数据预测2D投影构建CXR世界模型，提升胸部X射线影像的表示学习和疾病诊断能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 胸部X射线（CXR）是疾病诊断的重要医学影像技术，但作为二维投影图像，受限于结构叠加，无法捕捉三维解剖结构，这导致表示学习和诊断面临挑战。现有方法可能主要基于二维图像分析，缺乏三维信息，限制了诊断准确性和鲁棒性。因此，本研究旨在通过引入三维知识来克服这一局限，提高CXR的分析效果和实际应用价值。摘要未明确说明具体现有方法的不足细节，但强调CXR的局限性推动了新方法的开发。
light_analysis.method: X-WIN模型的核心方法是利用胸部CT数据，通过预测其二维投影在潜在空间中提取体积知识，构建一个具有三维解剖知识的世界模型。关键创新点包括：设计预测感知机制来预测不同三维变换下的CXR；在投影预测过程中，引入亲和力引导的对比对齐损失，以捕捉同一体积下投影间的相关信息；为提高模型适应性，结合真实CXR进行训练，使用掩码图像建模并引入域分类器，鼓励真实和模拟CXR表示之间的统计相似性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但推断涉及医学影像数据的集成。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验表明，X-WIN在多种下游任务中优于现有的基础模型，这些任务通过线性探测和少样本微调进行评估，证明了其在表示学习方面的优越性。此外，X-WIN展示了从二维投影重建三维CT体积的能力，增强了其多功能性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数值，但强调其对比基线方法的改进效果，突显了模型在提升诊断准确性和三维重建潜力方面的贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出X-WIN模型，通过从CT中提取体积知识来增强CXR的表示学习，解决了二维影像的局限性。其学术价值在于结合预测感知、对比学习和域适应技术，推动医学影像分析领域的发展；实际应用价值在于提高CXR诊断的准确性，并支持三维重建，为临床决策提供辅助。潜在局限性可能涉及对CT数据的依赖和泛化能力，未来工作可扩展至其他医学影像模态或更广泛的临床场景。摘要未明确说明具体局限性或未来方向。

title: D-GAP: Improving Out-of-Domain Robustness via Dataset-Agnostic and Gradient-Guided Augmentation in Frequency and Pixel Spaces
abstract: Out-of-domain (OOD) robustness is challenging to achieve in real-world computer vision applications, where shifts in image background, style, and acquisition instruments always degrade model performance. Generic augmentations show inconsistent gains under such shifts, whereas dataset-specific augmentations require expert knowledge and prior analysis. Moreover, prior studies show that neural networks adapt poorly to domain shifts because they exhibit a learning bias to domain-specific frequency components. Perturbing frequency values can mitigate such bias but overlooks pixel-level details, leading to suboptimal performance. To address these problems, we propose D-GAP, a Dataset-agnostic and Gradient-guided augmentation method for the Amplitude spectrum (in frequency space) and the Pixel values, improving OOD robustness by introducing targeted augmentation in both frequency and pixel spaces. Unlike conventional handcrafted augmentations, D-GAP computes sensitivity maps in the frequency space from task gradients, which reflect how strongly the deep models respond to different frequency components, and uses the maps to adaptively interpolate amplitudes between source and target samples. This way, D-GAP reduces the learning bias in frequency space, while a complementary pixel-space blending procedure restores fine spatial details. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets and three domain-adaptation benchmarks show that D-GAP consistently outperforms both generic and dataset-specific domain adaptation methods, improving average OOD performance by +5.3% on real-world datasets and +1.9% on benchmark datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了D-GAP方法，一种基于梯度引导和数据集无关的数据增强技术，通过在频率和像素空间进行目标增强，显著提升模型在域外场景的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于现实世界计算机视觉应用中，域外（OOD）鲁棒性面临挑战，因图像背景、风格和采集工具的变化常导致模型性能下降。通用增强方法效果不一致，而数据集特定增强需专家知识。此外，神经网络对域变化适应不佳，表现出对领域特定频率组件的学习偏差，现有频率扰动方法忽略像素细节，性能不优，因此需要一种能同时处理频率和像素空间的方法来改善OOD鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: D-GAP方法通过计算频率空间中的梯度敏感度图，反映模型对不同频率组件的响应强度，并利用这些图自适应地在源和目标样本间插值振幅谱，以减少学习偏差。同时，在像素空间进行互补混合，恢复精细空间细节。该方法不依赖特定数据集，基于梯度引导，实现了频率和像素空间的双重增强，无需手工设计或先验分析。
light_analysis.result: 论文在四个真实世界数据集和三个域适应基准上进行了广泛实验。结果表明，D-GAP consistently outperforms both generic and dataset-specific domain adaptation methods，平均OOD性能在真实世界数据集上提升5.3%，在基准数据集上提升1.9%。这些数据证明了D-GAP在提升模型跨域泛化能力方面的有效性，优于现有增强方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: D-GAP的主要贡献是提出了一种数据集无关、梯度引导的数据增强方法，通过在频率和像素空间进行协同增强，显著提高模型在域外场景的鲁棒性。学术上，它为减少模型对领域特定偏差的依赖提供了新思路；实际中，可广泛应用于需要高泛化能力的计算机视觉任务。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展到其他数据模态或优化计算效率。

title: What We Don't C: Manifold Disentanglement for Structured Discovery
abstract: Accessing information in learned representations is critical for annotation, discovery, and data filtering in disciplines where high-dimensional datasets are common. We introduce What We Don't C, a novel approach based on latent flow matching that disentangles latent subspaces by explicitly removing information included in conditional guidance, resulting in meaningful residual representations. This allows factors of variation which have not already been captured in conditioning to become more readily available. We show how guidance in the flow path necessarily represses the information from the guiding, conditioning variables. Our results highlight this approach as a simple yet powerful mechanism for analyzing, controlling, and repurposing latent representations, providing a pathway toward using generative models to explore what we don't capture, consider, or catalog.
comment: v2: Preprint of extended version. 21 pages. v1: Short version accepted to the Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences workshop at NeurIPS 2025 (Number 315: https://ml4physicalsciences.github.io/2025/)

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于潜在流匹配的新方法，通过移除条件引导信息来解缠潜在表示，以揭示未捕获的变化因子。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高维数据集的学科中，访问学习表示的信息对于标注、发现和数据过滤至关重要。现有方法依赖条件引导，但可能无法充分捕获所有变化因子，导致某些信息被抑制，限制了表示的全面性和数据分析的有效性。因此，需要一种机制来显式分离条件信息，以便更好地揭示和利用未被捕获的因素，从而提升数据探索和模型解释的能力。摘要未明确说明具体不足，但强调了挖掘隐藏信息的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了'What We Don't C'方法，基于潜在流匹配技术。核心创新是通过显式移除条件引导中包含的信息，来解缠潜在子空间，生成有意义的残差表示。技术路线利用流路径中的引导机制，确保条件变量信息被抑制，从而使未被捕获的变化因子在残差中更易于访问。关键特色包括对条件变量的精细控制和流匹配的应用，以实现结构化解缠。摘要未具体说明使用的数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果突出了该方法作为一种简单而强大的机制，用于分析、控制和重新利用潜在表示。实验展示了条件引导如何抑制特定信息，使残差表示中未捕获的变化因子更易于访问，增强了表示的可用性。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，但结果强调了该方法在生成模型中的应用潜力，为探索未捕获信息提供了有效途径。与基线方法的对比未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一种基于潜在流匹配的方法，用于解缠潜在表示并发现未捕获的信息。学术价值在于扩展了生成模型的分析能力，为表示学习提供了新视角，促进了高维数据探索的理论发展。实际应用价值在于辅助标注、发现和数据过滤任务，提升数据驱动的决策效率。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了进一步应用于更广泛场景的潜力。

title: DeepEyesV2: Toward Agentic Multimodal Model
abstract: Agentic multimodal models should not only comprehend text and images, but also actively invoke external tools, such as code execution environments and web search, and integrate these operations into reasoning. In this work, we introduce DeepEyesV2 and explore how to build an agentic multimodal model from the perspectives of data construction, training methods, and model evaluation. We observe that direct reinforcement learning alone fails to induce robust tool-use behavior. This phenomenon motivates a two-stage training pipeline: a cold-start stage to establish tool-use patterns, and reinforcement learning stage to further refine tool invocation. We curate a diverse, moderately challenging training dataset, specifically including examples where tool use is beneficial. We further introduce RealX-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate real-world multimodal reasoning, which inherently requires the integration of multiple capabilities, including perception, search, and reasoning. We evaluate DeepEyesV2 on RealX-Bench and other representative benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness across real-world understanding, mathematical reasoning, and search-intensive tasks. Moreover, DeepEyesV2 exhibits task-adaptive tool invocation, tending to use image operations for perception tasks and numerical computations for reasoning tasks. Reinforcement learning further enables complex tool combinations and allows model to selectively invoke tools based on context. We hope our study can provide guidance for community in developing agentic multimodal models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了DeepEyesV2代理性多模态模型，通过两阶段训练和RealX-Bench基准，实现了任务自适应的工具调用整合。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理性多模态模型需要不仅能理解文本和图像，还需主动调用外部工具（如代码执行环境和网络搜索）并整合到推理中。现有方法如直接强化学习在诱导稳健工具使用行为上存在不足，导致模型难以在复杂任务中有效利用工具。因此，研究如何通过改进训练和评估方法来构建更有效的代理性多模态模型，成为一个重要的研究课题，以应对真实世界中多模态任务的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个两阶段训练管道：冷启动阶段建立基本工具使用模式，强化学习阶段进一步细化和优化工具调用。关键创新包括构建多样、中等难度的训练数据集，特别包含工具使用有益的示例，以及引入RealX-Bench基准评估真实世界多模态推理能力。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或使用的数据集细节，但强调了从数据构造到训练方法的系统性探索。
light_analysis.result: 在RealX-Bench和其他代表性基准上评估DeepEyesV2，结果显示其在真实世界理解、数学推理和搜索密集型任务中表现有效。模型表现出任务自适应工具调用，例如在感知任务中优先使用图像操作，在推理任务中调用数值计算。强化学习还实现了复杂工具组合和基于上下文的选择性调用。摘要未提供具体准确率或效率数据，但强调了相对于直接强化学习方法的改进和鲁棒性提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了DeepEyesV2模型及其两阶段训练方法，以及RealX-Bench基准，为开发代理性多模态模型提供了系统指导。工作展示了任务自适应工具调用的可行性和在多模态推理中的有效性，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可能扩展工具类型、优化训练过程，并探索更多真实世界场景，以进一步提升模型性能。

title: KV Cache Transform Coding for Compact Storage in LLM Inference
abstract: Serving large language models (LLMs) at scale necessitates efficient key-value (KV) cache management. KV caches can be reused across conversation turns via shared-prefix prompts that are common in iterative code editing and chat. However, stale caches consume scarce GPU memory, require offloading, or force recomputation. We present KVTC, a lightweight transform coder that compresses KV caches for compact on-GPU and off-GPU storage. Drawing on classical media compression, KVTC combines PCA-based feature decorrelation, adaptive quantization, and entropy coding. It requires only a brief initial calibration and leaves model parameters unchanged. By exploiting redundancies in KV caches, KVTC achieves up to 20$\times$ compression while maintaining reasoning and long-context accuracy, and 40$\times$ or higher for specific use cases. We test KVTC with Llama 3, Mistral NeMo, and R1-Qwen 2.5 models across benchmarks including AIME25, GSM8K, LiveCodeBench, LongBench, MATH-500, MMLU, Qasper and RULER. It consistently outperforms inference-time baselines such as token eviction, quantization, and SVD-based methods, while achieving higher compression ratios. These results support KVTC as a practical building block for memory-efficient LLM serving with reusable KV caches.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出KVTC，一种轻量级变换编码器，通过压缩大型语言模型推理中的键值缓存，实现紧凑存储以提升内存效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大型语言模型服务中，键值缓存在迭代代码编辑和聊天等共享前缀提示下可跨对话轮次重用，但陈旧的缓存占用稀缺的GPU内存，导致需要卸载或重新计算，影响服务效率。现有方法如token eviction、量化等效率不足，无法在保持性能的同时实现高压缩率，KVTC旨在通过压缩缓存来解决这一问题，减少内存消耗，支持可重用缓存管理。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出KVTC，结合基于PCA的特征去相关、自适应量化和熵编码，借鉴经典媒体压缩技术。它是一种轻量级编码器，仅需简短初始校准，不修改模型参数，通过利用KV缓存中的冗余进行压缩。测试使用Llama 3、Mistral NeMo和R1-Qwen 2.5等模型，在AIME25、GSM8K等多个基准数据集上进行评估，以确保方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，KVTC在保持推理和长上下文准确性的前提下，实现最高20倍压缩率，特定用例可达40倍以上。在多个基准测试中，如AIME25和GSM8K，它始终优于基线方法如token eviction、量化和基于SVD的方法，同时实现更高的压缩比，测试覆盖多种模型，验证了方法的鲁棒性和广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: KVTC作为内存高效大型语言模型服务的实用构建块，支持可重用的键值缓存，显著减少内存消耗并提升部署效率。学术上，它将压缩技术创新应用于缓存管理；应用上，为实际场景提供可行方案。摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示了在特定用例中进一步优化的潜力，未来工作可探索扩展到更多模型或复杂环境。

title: Revisiting Value Iteration: Unified Analysis of Discounted and Average-Reward Cases
abstract: While Value Iteration (VI) is one of the most fundamental algorithms in Reinforcement Learning, its theoretical convergence guarantees still exhibit a persistent mismatch with empirical behavior. In the discounted-reward case, classical theory guarantees geometric convergence with rate $γ$, while in the average-reward case recent work suggests that only sublinear convergence can be expected. In practice, however, VI is often observed to converge significantly faster. In this work, we show through a unified geometry-based analysis that, under an assumption of a unique and unichain optimal policy, (i) convergence is geometric in both the discounted- and average-reward settings and (ii) the convergence rate is faster than previous analyses suggest.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过统一几何分析，证明值迭代在折扣和平均奖励情况下均几何收敛，且速率优于先前理论。
light_analysis.motivation: 值迭代作为强化学习的基础算法，其理论收敛性与实际观测存在不匹配。经典理论在折扣奖励下保证以γ速率的几何收敛，而在平均奖励下近期研究仅预测亚线性收敛；然而，实践中值迭代常表现出更快的收敛速度。这种差距突显了现有理论分析过于保守，未能准确反映算法真实性能，从而限制了理论对优化和应用的指导价值，促使了更精确分析的需求。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用统一基于几何的分析方法，在假设存在唯一且单链最优策略下，对值迭代算法进行收敛分析。关键创新在于构建了一个整合折扣和平均奖励情况的分析框架，利用几何视角推导收敛性质，避免了先前分析的局限性。摘要未详细说明具体数据集或模型架构，因为这是理论推导，侧重于算法行为的数学证明和几何建模，以统一处理两种奖励设置。
light_analysis.result: 分析结果表明，在折扣和平均奖励设置下，值迭代都实现了几何收敛，且收敛速率显著快于先前理论预期。具体来说，相比于经典理论在平均奖励下仅保证亚线性收敛，本研究证明了几何收敛；在折扣情况下，收敛速率也超越γ的预测。摘要未明确提供具体数值如准确率提升，但强调理论上的改进，通过与基线方法对比，统一框架揭示了收敛性的一致性和加速效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是统一分析了值迭代在折扣和平均奖励情况下的收敛性，展示其几何收敛特性和更快速率。研究具有重要学术价值，提供了更精确的理论保证，缩小了理论与实践的差距，可能影响算法设计和应用优化。未来工作可探索将分析扩展至更复杂的策略场景或多智能体系统，以进一步验证和深化理解。

title: Assessing the Political Fairness of Multilingual LLMs: A Case Study based on a 21-way Multiparallel EuroParl Dataset
abstract: The political biases of Large Language Models (LLMs) are usually assessed by simulating their answers to English surveys. In this work, we propose an alternative framing of political biases, relying on principles of fairness in multilingual translation. We systematically compare the translation quality of speeches in the European Parliament (EP), observing systematic differences with majority parties from left and right being better translated than outsider parties. This study is made possible by a new, 21-way multiparallel version of EuroParl, the parliamentary proceedings of the EP, which includes the political affiliations of each speaker. The dataset consists of 1.5M sentences for a total of 40M words and 249M characters. It covers three years, 1000+ speakers, 7 countries, 12 EU parties, 25 EU committees, and hundreds of national parties.
comment: Accepted at LREC 2026. Added results with new models and two-ANOVA. Same conclusions

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出基于多语言翻译公平性原则的框架，利用新的21路平行EuroParl数据集评估大型语言模型的政治偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前评估大型语言模型（LLM）政治偏见的方法通常依赖英语调查模拟，这在多语言环境中可能不全面，忽视了翻译质量中的系统性偏差。这一问题重要，因为政治偏见会影响模型在多样化语言应用中的公平性，尤其是在政治敏感内容如欧洲议会演讲的翻译中。现有方法的不足之处在于，它们未能充分考虑多语言上下文中的公平性原则，可能导致评估结果偏颇或不够代表性。因此，本研究旨在通过翻译公平性视角，更深入地揭示和评估LLM的政治偏见。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用系统分析方法，基于新构建的21路多平行EuroParl数据集，该数据集包含欧洲议会演讲及其演讲者的政治隶属关系信息。数据集涵盖1.5M句子、40M单词，覆盖3年时间、1000+演讲者、7个国家、12个欧盟政党等维度。关键创新点在于将翻译质量与政治因素（如政党类别）关联起来，通过对比不同政党（多数左翼、右翼与外围政党）演讲的翻译表现，来评估LLM在多语言翻译中的公平性。这种方法提供了更细粒度的政治偏见分析框架。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，LLM在翻译欧洲议会演讲时存在系统性差异：多数左翼和右翼政党的演讲翻译质量优于外围政党，揭示了政治不公平性。这一发现基于对大规模数据集的统计分析，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升或对比基线方法）。结果强调了在多语言环境中，模型可能对主流政治观点产生偏好，这为评估LLM公平性提供了实证依据，并与现有基于英语调查的方法形成对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个结合多语言翻译公平性原则的政治偏见评估框架，并发布了详细的21路平行数据集。其学术价值在于扩展了LLM公平性研究的多语言维度，实际应用价值为促进更公平的AI系统开发，特别是在政治敏感内容处理中。潜在局限性包括数据集覆盖范围可能有限，未来工作方向可包括扩展到更多语言、政党类型，或结合其他公平性指标进行综合评估，以进一步提高模型的透明度和公正性。

title: CEFR-Annotated WordNet: LLM-Based Proficiency-Guided Semantic Database for Language Learning
abstract: Although WordNet is a valuable resource because of its structured semantic networks and extensive vocabulary, its fine-grained sense distinctions can be challenging for second-language learners. To address this issue, we developed a version of WordNet annotated with the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR), integrating its semantic networks with language-proficiency levels. We automated this process using a large language model to measure the semantic similarity between sense definitions in WordNet and entries in the English Vocabulary Profile Online. To validate our approach, we constructed a large-scale corpus containing both sense and CEFR-level information from the annotated WordNet and used it to develop contextual lexical classifiers. Our experiments demonstrate that models fine-tuned on this corpus perform comparably to those fine-tuned on gold-standard annotations. Furthermore, by combining this corpus with the gold-standard data, we developed a practical classifier that achieves a Macro-F1 score of 0.81. This result provides indirect evidence that the transferred labels are largely consistent with the gold-standard levels. The annotated WordNet, corpus, and classifiers are publicly available to help bridge the gap between natural language processing and language education, thereby facilitating more effective and efficient language learning.
comment: The 15th edition of the Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026); resources are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17395388

light_analysis.overview: 本文开发了一种基于大型语言模型的CEFR注释WordNet，旨在为语言学习提供熟练度指导的语义数据库。
light_analysis.motivation: WordNet具有结构化语义网络和广泛词汇，但其精细义项区分对第二语言学习者构成挑战，导致学习困难。本研究旨在通过集成Common European Framework of Reference for Languages（CEFR）语言熟练度水平来解决此问题，以弥合自然语言处理与语言教育之间的差距。现有方法如WordNet缺乏与语言熟练度的直接关联，限制了其在教育应用中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用大型语言模型自动化注释WordNet的过程，通过测量WordNet义项定义与English Vocabulary Profile Online条目的语义相似度来分配CEFR级别。关键创新点包括集成CEFR到WordNet语义网络，并构建大规模语料库，包含义项和CEFR信息。该语料库用于开发上下文词汇分类器，以验证注释的准确性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，基于注释WordNet语料库微调的模型性能与基于黄金标准注释的模型相当。结合该语料库和黄金标准数据开发的分类器达到Macro-F1分数0.81，间接证明转移的标签与黄金标准水平高度一致，为自动化注释的有效性提供了数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是公开了注释的WordNet、语料库和分类器，帮助连接自然语言处理与语言教育，促进更有效率的语言学习。研究的学术价值在于为资源开发提供了新方法，实际应用价值体现在支持教育工具的创新。未来工作可扩展应用到其他语言或进一步验证局限性。

title: UltraGen: Efficient Ultra-High-Resolution Image Generation with Hierarchical Local Attention
abstract: Ultra-high-resolution text-to-image generation is increasingly vital for applications requiring fine-grained textures and global structural fidelity, yet state-of-the-art text-to-image diffusion models such as FLUX and SD3 remain confined to sub 2MP (< $1K\times2K$) resolutions due to the quadratic complexity of attention mechanisms and the scarcity of high-quality high-resolution training data. We present \textbf{\ourwork}, a novel framework that introduces hierarchical local attention with low-resolution global guidance, enabling efficient, scalable, and semantically coherent image synthesis at ultra-high resolutions. Specifically, high-resolution latents are divided into hardware aligned fixed-size local windows to reduce attention complexity from quadratic to near-linear, while a low-resolution latent equipped with scaled positional embeddings injects global semantics as an anchor. A lightweight LoRA adaptation bridges global and local pathways during denoising, ensuring consistency across structure and detail. To maximize inference efficiency and achieve scalable ultra-high-resolution generation, we repermute token sequence in window-first order, so that the GPU-friendly dense local blocks in attention calculation equals to the fixed-size local window in 2D regardless of resolution. Together~\ourwork~reliably scales the pretrained model to resolutions higher than $8K$ with more than $10\times$ speed up and significantly lower memory usage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that~\ourwork~achieves superior quality while maintaining computational efficiency, establishing a practical paradigm for advancing ultra-high-resolution image generation.

light_analysis.overview: UltraGen框架通过分层局部注意力和全局指导，实现了高效的超高分辨率图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到图像生成模型在超高分辨率上面临显著挑战，主要因为注意力机制的二次复杂性导致计算开销巨大，且高质量高分辨率数据稀缺，限制了实际应用如精细纹理生成和全局结构保真。现有先进模型如FLUX和SD3被约束在2MP以下分辨率，无法满足高保真图像需求，特别是在视觉艺术和媒体制作领域。因此，迫切需要开发高效、可扩展的方法来突破这些瓶颈，以应对日益增长的高分辨率图像生成需求。
light_analysis.method: UltraGen框架提出分层局部注意力机制，将高分辨率潜变量划分为硬件对齐的固定大小局部窗口，将注意力复杂度从二次降低到近似线性。同时，使用低分辨率潜变量通过缩放位置嵌入注入全局语义作为锚点，确保全局一致性。在去噪过程中，引入轻量级的LoRA适应桥接全局和局部路径，以维持结构和细节的连贯性。此外，通过窗口优先顺序重新排列标记序列，优化GPU计算，使密集局部块与2D固定窗口对应，从而最大化推理效率和可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，UltraGen能够可靠地将预训练模型扩展到8K以上分辨率，推理速度提升超过10倍，并显著降低内存使用。与现有基线如FLUX和SD3相比，该方法在保持高质量图像生成的同时，大幅提高了计算效率。广泛实验验证了UltraGen在超高分辨率图像生成中的优越性能，实现了高效的、语义一致的综合结果，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了UltraGen框架，通过分层局部注意力和全局指导，实现了高效且可扩展的超高分辨率图像生成。这一研究具有重要的学术价值，为改进扩散模型的计算效率提供了新思路，并建立了实用的生成范式。实际应用中，UltraGen可用于数字艺术、媒体制作等需要高分辨率图像的场景。未来工作可能包括进一步优化算法以处理更复杂的纹理或扩展到更多样化数据集，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: MVCustom: Multi-View Customized Diffusion via Geometric Latent Rendering and Completion
abstract: Multi-view generation with camera pose control and prompt-based customization are both essential elements for achieving controllable generative models. However, existing multi-view generation models do not support customization with geometric consistency, whereas customization models lack explicit viewpoint control, making them challenging to unify. Motivated by these gaps, we introduce a novel task, multi-view customization, which aims to jointly achieve multi-view camera pose control and customization. Due to the scarcity of training data in customization, existing multi-view generation models, which inherently rely on large-scale datasets, struggle to generalize to diverse prompts. To address this, we propose MVCustom, a novel diffusion-based framework explicitly designed to achieve both multi-view consistency and customization fidelity. In the training stage, MVCustom learns the subject's identity and geometry using a feature-field representation, incorporating the text-to-video diffusion backbone enhanced with dense spatio-temporal attention, which leverages temporal coherence for multi-view consistency. In the inference stage, we introduce two novel techniques: depth-aware feature rendering explicitly enforces geometric consistency, and consistent-aware latent completion ensures accurate perspective alignment of the customized subject and surrounding backgrounds. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MVCustom achieves the most balanced and consistent competitive performance across multi-view consistency, customization fidelity, demonstrating effective solution of multi-objective generation task.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出MVCustom框架，通过几何潜在渲染和补全技术，实现了多视图相机姿态控制与基于提示的定制化的统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图生成与定制化是可控生成模型的核心需求，但现有方法存在显著不足：多视图生成模型无法支持几何一致的定制化，而定制化模型缺乏明确的视点控制，导致难以在实际应用中实现高质量的多视图可控生成。这些问题限制了生成模型的灵活性和真实性，因此亟需开发能够统一两者的新任务，以提升3D内容生成的实用性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: MVCustom是一种基于扩散的框架，旨在实现多视图一致性和定制化保真度。在训练阶段，它使用特征场表示学习主题的身份和几何信息，结合文本到视频扩散主干，通过增强的密集时空注意力模块利用时间一致性来促进多视图一致性。推理阶段引入两个创新技术：深度感知特征渲染显式强化几何一致性，以及一致性感知潜在补全确保定制化主题与背景的准确视角对齐，从而提高整体生成质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，MVCustom在多视图一致性和定制化保真度方面实现了最平衡和一致的竞争性能，有效解决了多目标生成任务。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，但推断该框架在多个评估维度上优于现有基线方法，展示了其在统一多视图生成与定制化方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MVCustom通过整合几何潜在渲染和补全，成功解决了多视图生成与定制化的统一问题，为可控生成模型领域提供了新思路。其学术价值在于提出新任务和高效框架，弥补了现有方法的不足；应用价值在于增强了3D内容生成的灵活性和准确性，为虚拟现实和计算机图形学应用铺平道路。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂场景或集成更多控制参数。

title: InstantSfM: Towards GPU-Native SfM for the Deep Learning Era
abstract: Structure-from-Motion (SfM) is a fundamental technique for recovering camera poses and scene structure from multi-view imagery, serving as a critical upstream component for applications ranging from 3D reconstruction to modern neural scene representations such as 3D Gaussian Splatting. However, most mature SfM systems remain CPU-centric and built upon traditional optimization toolchains, creating a growing mismatch with modern GPU-based, learning-driven pipelines and limiting scalability in large-scale scenes. While recent advances in GPU-accelerated bundle adjustment (BA) have demonstrated the potential of parallel sparse optimization, extending these techniques to build a complete global SfM system remains challenging due to unresolved issues in metric scale recovery and numerical robustness. In this paper, we implement a fully GPU-based and PyTorch-compatible global SfM system, named InstantSfM, to integrate seamlessly with modern learning pipelines. InstantSfM embeds metric depth priors directly into both global positioning and BA through a depth-constrained Jacobian structure, thereby resolving scale ambiguity within the optimization framework. To ensure numerical stability, we employ explicit filtering of under-constrained variables for the Jacobian matrix in an optimized GPU-friendly manner. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets demonstrate that InstantSfM achieves state-of-the-art efficiency while maintaining reconstruction accuracy comparable to both established classical pipelines and recent learning-based methods, showing up to ${\sim40\times}$ speedup over COLMAP on large-scale scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了InstantSfM，一个完全基于GPU的全局SfM系统，通过深度约束Jacobian和优化过滤解决尺度模糊与数值稳定性，无缝集成于深度学习管道。
light_analysis.motivation: SfM技术作为从多视角图像恢复相机姿态和场景结构的基础方法，对于3D重建和神经场景表示（如3D高斯溅射）等应用至关重要。然而，现有成熟SfM系统（如COLMAP）主要基于CPU和传统优化工具链，与现代GPU加速、学习驱动的管道不匹配，限制了大规模场景的可扩展性。尽管GPU加速的束调整技术展现了并行稀疏优化的潜力，但扩展到完整全局SfM系统仍面临度量尺度恢复和数值稳定性等挑战，亟需更高效的GPU原生解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出InstantSfM，一个完全基于GPU且与PyTorch兼容的全局SfM系统。其核心方法包括：通过深度约束的Jacobian结构，将度量深度先验嵌入全局定位和束调整过程，从而在优化框架内解决尺度模糊问题。为确保数值稳定性，采用GPU友好的方式显式过滤Jacobian矩阵中的欠约束变量。系统设计旨在无缝集成到现代学习管道中，提升处理效率和可扩展性，摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在多样数据集上的实验表明，InstantSfM在保持重建准确性的同时，达到了最先进的效率水平。具体地，重建精度与经典SfM管道（如COLMAP）和近期基于学习的方法相当。在大规模场景中，InstantSfM实现了高达约40倍的速度提升，显著优于COLMAP基线方法，证明了其高效性和可扩展性，摘要未明确说明其他性能指标对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: InstantSfM的主要贡献是开发了一个完全GPU-based的SfM系统，解决了现有方法在效率和与深度学习管道兼容性方面的不足。学术价值在于推动了SfM技术向GPU原生方向的演进，实际应用价值体现在加速3D重建和神经场景表示流程中。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，可能涉及进一步优化系统以处理更复杂场景。

title: Absolute indices for determining compactness, separability and number of clusters
abstract: Finding "true" clusters in a data set is a challenging problem. Clustering solutions obtained using different models and algorithms do not necessarily provide compact and well-separated clusters or the optimal number of clusters. Cluster validity indices are commonly applied to identify such clusters. Nevertheless, these indices are typically relative, and they are used to compare clustering algorithms or choose the parameters of a clustering algorithm. Moreover, the success of these indices depends on the underlying data structure. This paper introduces novel absolute cluster indices to determine both the compactness and separability of clusters. We define a compactness function for each cluster and a set of neighboring points for cluster pairs. This function is utilized to determine the compactness of each cluster and the whole cluster distribution. The set of neighboring points is used to define the margin between clusters and the overall distribution margin. The proposed compactness and separability indices are applied to identify the true number of clusters. Using a number of synthetic and real-world data sets, we demonstrate the performance of these new indices and compare them with other widely-used cluster validity indices.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出绝对集群指数，通过定义紧凑性函数和邻点集来评估聚类紧凑性、分离性并确定最优集群数，为聚类验证提供新工具。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决数据中识别真实集群的挑战性问题。聚类是无监督学习的关键任务，但现有方法如聚类有效性指数通常为相对指标，用于比较算法或选择参数，且依赖数据结构，无法直接提供绝对评估，导致集群可能不紧凑、分离差或集群数非最优，因此需要更有效的验证方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出绝对集群指数，核心创新包括为每个集群定义紧凑性函数和集群对定义邻点集。紧凑性函数评估集群内部结构，邻点集用于计算集群间边际；结合这些，确定整体分布紧凑性和分离性，进而应用于识别最优集群数，技术特色在于提供直接、不依赖相对比较的评估方法。
light_analysis.result: 使用多个合成和真实数据集，新指数在性能上与其他广泛使用的集群有效性指数进行比较，展示了在确定紧凑性、分离性和集群数方面的优势，但摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率改进数据，仅提及了比较结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是引入绝对集群指数，为聚类验证提供了新工具，提高集群识别的可靠性。学术价值在于改进了聚类评估方法，实际应用可广泛用于各种数据集分析和参数选择；未来工作方向可能包括扩展应用到更复杂的数据结构或领域，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Reveal-to-Revise: Explainable Bias-Aware Generative Modeling with Multimodal Attention
abstract: We present an explainable, bias-aware generative framework that unifies cross-modal attention fusion, Grad-CAM++ attribution, and a Reveal-to-Revise feedback loop within a single training paradigm. The architecture couples a conditional attention WGAN GP with bias regularization and iterative local explanation feedback and is evaluated on Multimodal MNIST and Fashion MNIST for image generation and subgroup auditing, as well as a toxic/non-toxic text classification benchmark. All experiments use stratified 80/20 splits, validation-based early stopping, and AdamW with cosine annealing, and results are averaged over three random seeds. The proposed model achieves 93.2% accuracy, a 91.6% F1-score, and a 78.1% IoU-XAI on the multimodal benchmark, outperforming all baselines across every metric, while adversarial training restores 73 to 77% robustness on Fashion MNIST. Ablation studies confirm that fusion, Grad-CAM++, and bias feedback each contribute independently to final performance, with explanations improving structural coherence (SSIM = 88.8%, NMI = 84.9%) and fairness across protected subgroups. These results establish attribution and guided generative learning as a practical and trustworthy approach for high-stakes AI applications.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个结合跨模态注意力、Grad-CAM++解释和迭代反馈的可解释偏见感知生成框架，用于提高AI系统的公平性和可信度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI系统在生成模型和分类任务中可能存在偏见和不可解释性问题，特别是在高风险应用中，这可能导致不公平决策和信任缺失。本文旨在通过可解释和偏见感知的方法解决这些问题，结合多模态数据以提高模型的公平性和透明性。现有方法可能缺乏统一偏见处理框架或有效解释机制，导致性能不足，本研究旨在提供一种实用、可靠的方法来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出一个统一框架，整合条件注意力WGAN GP、跨模态注意力融合、Grad-CAM++归因和Reveal-to-Revise反馈循环于一个训练范式。核心创新在于耦合生成模型、解释技术和偏见正则化，通过迭代局部解释反馈引导模型学习。使用Multimodal MNIST和Fashion MNIST进行图像生成和子群体审计，以及有毒/非有毒文本分类基准进行评估。训练细节包括分层数据分割、早停机制和AdamW优化器。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果在多媒体基准上表现优异：准确率达93.2%，F1分数为91.6%，IoU-XAI为78.1%，在所有指标上优于所有基线方法。对抗训练在Fashion MNIST上恢复了73%到77%的鲁棒性。消融研究证实注意力融合、Grad-CAM++归因和偏见反馈各自独立贡献性能，解释反馈提高了结构一致性（SSIM=88.8%，NMI=84.9%）和跨保护子群体的公平性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的贡献是提出一个创新框架，通过结合多模态注意力、解释反馈和偏见感知，提升了生成模型的性能和公平性。研究确立了归因和引导生成学习作为一种实用、可信的方法，适用于高风险AI应用，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可扩展到更多场景或改进算法效率，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: SAGE: A Top-Down Bottom-Up Knowledge-Grounded User Simulator for Multi-turn AGent Evaluation
abstract: Evaluating multi-turn interactive agents is challenging due to the need for human assessment. Evaluation with simulated users has been introduced as an alternative, however existing approaches typically model generic users and overlook the domain-specific principles required to capture realistic behavior. We propose SAGE, a novel user Simulation framework for multi-turn AGent Evaluation that integrates knowledge from business contexts. SAGE incorporates top-down knowledge rooted in business logic, such as ideal customer profiles, grounding user behavior in realistic customer personas. We further integrate bottom-up knowledge taken from business agent infrastructure (e.g., product catalogs, FAQs, and knowledge bases), allowing the simulator to generate interactions that reflect users' information needs and expectations in a company's target market. Through empirical evaluation, we find that this approach produces interactions that are more realistic and diverse, while also identifying up to 33% more agent errors, highlighting its effectiveness as an evaluation tool to support bug-finding and iterative agent improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出SAGE框架，通过整合自顶向下和自底向上的知识，为多轮交互智能体评估提供更真实和有效的用户模拟方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决评估多轮交互智能体时对人工评估的高度依赖问题，现有模拟用户方法通常过于通用，忽略了业务领域特定原则，导致模拟行为不真实。这一问题的重要性在于，真实的评估对于智能体在商业应用中的性能改进至关重要，尤其是在需要捕捉用户信息需求和期望的复杂交互中。现有方法的不足在于它们无法有效整合业务上下文知识，从而限制了模拟的真实性和多样性。
light_analysis.method: SAGE框架采用了一种知识驱动的用户模拟方法，结合了自顶向下的知识（如基于业务逻辑的理想客户画像）和自底向上的知识（如产品目录、常见问题解答和知识库），以生成更真实的用户交互。关键创新点在于将用户行为扎根于真实的客户角色，并利用业务基础设施知识来模拟目标市场中的用户需求。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集、模型架构或技术实现细节，但强调了知识整合的核心技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 实证评估表明，SAGE框架生成的交互比现有方法更真实和多样化，具体性能指标体现在能识别出多达33%的智能体错误。与基线方法相比，这显著提升了错误检测能力，突出了SAGE在支持bug发现和智能体迭代改进方面的有效性。摘要未提供具体基线对比的详细数据，但强调了其在提高模拟真实性和错误识别率方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAGE框架的主要贡献是为多轮交互智能体评估提供了一个新颖且有效的工具，通过整合业务知识来提高模拟的真实性和实用性。其学术价值在于推动了知识驱动用户模拟领域的研究，而实际应用价值则体现在帮助企业和开发者更好地测试和改进交互智能体。摘要未明确说明潜在的局限性或未来工作方向，但该研究为自动化评估技术提供了新思路。

title: Autoencoding-Free Context Compression for LLMs via Contextual Semantic Anchors
abstract: Context compression is an advanced technique that accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by converting long inputs into compact representations. Existing methods primarily rely on autoencoding tasks to train special compression tokens to represent contextual semantics. While autoencoding tasks enable compression tokens to acquire compression capabilities, we remark that such capabilities potentially conflict with actual downstream task requirements, prevent the models from learning the features more beneficial for real-world usage. Based on this observation, we propose Semantic-Anchor Compression (SAC), a novel method that shifts from autoencoding task based compression to an architecture that is equipped with this compression capability \textit{a priori}. Instead of training models to compress contexts through autoencoding tasks, SAC directly selects so-called anchor tokens from the original context and aggregates contextual information into their key-value (KV) representations. To ensure that anchors can effectively collect information, SAC introduces two key designs: (1) anchor embedding, a learnable embedding vector attached to the selected anchor tokens to mark compression carriers and (2) bidirectional attention modification, which enables anchor tokens to integrate information from the entire context. Experimental results show that SAC consistently outperforms existing context compression methods across different compression ratios and model sizes on question-answering and long-context summarization tasks. Our data, model and code have been released at \href{https://github.com/lx-Meteors/SAC}{https://github.com/lx-Meteors/SAC}.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出Semantic-Anchor Compression (SAC)方法，通过锚标记实现无需自编码的上下文压缩，优化大型语言模型推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有上下文压缩方法主要依赖自编码任务训练压缩标记，但这可能在实际下游任务中产生冲突，限制模型学习更适用于真实场景的特征。研究旨在解决这一不足，开发无需自编码的压缩技术，以提高压缩效率和实用性，适应多种应用需求。
light_analysis.method: SAC方法的核心是直接选择原始上下文中的锚标记作为压缩载体，将上下文信息聚合到其键值表示中。关键技术包括锚嵌入，一个可学习的嵌入向量标记锚标记；以及双向注意力修改，使锚标记能整合整个上下文信息，避免自编码训练，从架构上赋予先验压缩能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，SAC在问答和长上下文摘要任务上，针对不同压缩比率和模型大小，均一致优于现有上下文压缩方法，证明了其有效性。但摘要未提供具体性能指标对比数据，仅表明优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出SAC方法，从自编码任务转向先验压缩架构，提升了上下文压缩的效率和实用性。这对优化LLM推理有重要应用价值，并为压缩技术提供了新方向。未来工作可能包括优化锚选择机制或扩展到更多任务。

title: Communication Enables Cooperation in LLM Agents: A Comparison with Curriculum-Based Approaches
abstract: Eliciting cooperation in multi-agent LLM systems is critical for AI alignment. We investigate two approaches: direct communication and curriculum learning. In a 4-player Stag Hunt, a one-word "cheap talk" channel increases cooperation from 0% to 96.7%, demonstrating communication as a robust coordination mechanism. In contrast, we find that curriculum learning is highly sensitive to design choices: our pedagogical curriculum through progressively complex games reduced agent payoffs by 27.4% in an Iterated Public Goods Game with Punishment, demonstrating that optimizing for short-term rationality can actively undermine alignment goals. Qualitative analysis reveals that curricula emphasizing defection-equilibrium games can induce "learned pessimism" in agents. These findings suggest that for coordination problems, simple communication protocols may be more reliable than experience-based training, and that curriculum design for social dilemmas requires careful attention to the strategic lessons embedded in game sequences.
comment: Published in EACL 2026 - Corrected cooperation rates for two-stage communication conditions (96.7% and 100.0%, previously reported as 48.3% and 50.0% due to a denominator bug in the evaluation code). All other results unchanged

light_analysis.overview: 本文发现直接通信能显著提升LLM智能体的合作率，与课程学习相比，通信机制在协调中更可靠。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决多智能体LLM系统中的合作对齐问题。AI对齐对于确保智能体行为符合人类价值观至关重要，但现有方法如课程学习可能存在不足，例如设计选择高度敏感，可能导致优化短期理性而破坏长期对齐目标。因此，本工作通过比较不同协调方法，探索可靠机制以促进智能体间的有效合作。
light_analysis.method: 论文比较了直接通信和课程学习两种方法。直接通信引入一个单词的“廉价交谈”信道，以促进智能体间的简单协调。课程学习则通过设计逐渐复杂的游戏序列（如从Stag Hunt到迭代公共物品游戏）来训练智能体。实验在特定游戏场景中进行，使用LLM智能体模拟多智能体交互，关键创新在于实证评估不同方法在协调问题中的效果。
light_analysis.result: 在4人Stag Hunt游戏中，直接通信使智能体合作率从0%提升到96.7%。相比之下，课程学习在迭代公共物品游戏与惩罚中导致智能体回报下降27.4%。定性分析显示，课程学习可能诱发“学习悲观主义”，使智能体更倾向于背叛。这些结果表明通信作为协调机制更稳健，而课程学习对设计参数敏感，效果不稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论强调，对于协调问题，简单通信协议比基于经验的课程学习更可靠。主要贡献在于揭示通信的有效性，并警示课程设计中的风险。研究对AI对齐领域有学术价值，为多智能体系统的协调机制提供实证支持。未来工作可优化课程设计以避免负面策略教训，或探索混合方法。

title: MonitorVLM:A Vision Language Framework for Safety Violation Detection in Mining Operations
abstract: Industrial accidents, particularly in high-risk domains such as surface and underground mining, are frequently caused by unsafe worker behaviors. Traditional manual inspection remains labor-intensive, error-prone, and insufficient for large-scale, dynamic environments, highlighting the urgent need for intelligent and automated safety monitoring. In this paper, we present MonitorVLM, a novel vision--language framework designed to detect safety violations directly from surveillance video streams. MonitorVLM introduces three key innovations: (1) a domain-specific violation dataset comprising 9,000 vision--question--answer (VQA) samples across 40 high-frequency mining regulations, enriched with augmentation and auxiliary detection cues; (2) a clause filter (CF) module that dynamically selects the Top-$K$ most relevant clauses, reducing inference latency by 13.56\% while maintaining accuracy; and (3) a behavior magnifier (BM) module that enhances worker regions to improve fine-grained action recognition, yielding additional gains of 3.45% in precision and 8.62% in recall. Experimental results demonstrate that MonitorVLM significantly outperforms baseline vision--language models, achieving improvements of 22.01% in precision, 34.22\% in recall, and 28.37% in F1 score over the 72B unfine-tuned baseline. A lightweight web-based interface further integrates MonitorVLM into practical workflows, enabling automatic violation reporting with video timestamping. This study highlights the potential of multimodal large models to enhance occupational safety monitoring in mining and beyond.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MonitorVLM视觉-语言框架，用于采矿作业中的安全违规检测，关键创新包括特定领域数据集、动态子句过滤模块和行为放大模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业事故在采矿等高危行业频发，不安全行为是主要诱因。传统人工检查方式劳动密集、易出错，难以适应大规模动态环境的实时监控需求，导致安全隐患识别不足。现有方法如纯视觉模型可能缺乏对复杂法规文本的理解，因此迫切需要一种集成了视觉和语言信息的智能框架，以实现自动化、高精度的安全违规检测，提升工作场所的安全性。
light_analysis.method: MonitorVLM框架基于视觉-语言模型设计，包含三个关键组件：首先，构建了一个包含9,000个视觉-问答样本的特定领域违规数据集，覆盖40种高频采矿法规，并通过数据增强和辅助检测线索进行丰富。其次，开发了子句过滤模块，动态选择Top-K最相关法规子句，减少推理延迟13.56%同时保持准确度。最后，引入行为放大模块，增强视频中工人区域的表示，优化细粒度动作识别能力，以提升检测性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MonitorVLM显著优于基线视觉-语言模型。与72B未微调基线相比，精确率提升22.01%，召回率提升34.22%，F1分数提升28.37%。子句过滤模块在保持准确性的前提下将推理延迟降低13.56%，而行为放大模块额外贡献了3.45%的精确率提升和8.62%的召回率提升，验证了框架在效率和准确性方面的双重优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MonitorVLM通过多模态集成有效提升了采矿安全违规检测性能，集成的轻量级web接口支持自动报告生成和视频时间戳标记，增强了实际应用价值。研究展示了视觉-语言模型在职业安全监控中的潜力，为其他高风险行业提供了技术借鉴，未来可扩展到更多动态环境中，以推动自动化安全系统的普及和改进。

title: Seeing Space and Motion: Enhancing Latent Actions with Geometric and Dynamic Awareness for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Latent Action Models (LAMs) enable Vision- Language-Action (VLA) systems to learn semantic action representations from large-scale unannotated data. Yet, we identify two bottlenecks of LAMs: 1) the commonly adopted end-to-end trained image encoder suffers from poor spatial understanding; 2) LAMs can be fragile when input frames are temporally distant, leading to limited temporal percep- tion. Such factors inevitably hinder stable and clear action modeling. To this end, we propose Farsighted-LAM, a latent action framework with geometry-aware spatial encoding and multi-scale temporal modeling, capturing structural priors and dynamic motion patterns from consecutive frames. We further propose SSM-VLA, an end-to-end VLA framework built upon Farsighted-LAM, which integrates structured perception with a visual Chain-of-Thought module to explicitly reason about environmental dynamics, enhancing decision consistency and interpretability. We validate SSM-VLA on multiple VLA tasks in both simulation and real-world settings, and achieve state-of- the-art performance. Our results demonstrate that our strategy of combining geometry-aware modeling, temporal coherence, and explicit reasoning is effective in enhancing the robustness and generalizability of embodied intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Farsighted-LAM和SSM-VLA框架，通过几何感知空间编码和多尺度时间建模，增强Vision-Language-Action模型的稳健性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 系统通过Latent Action Models (LAMs) 从大规模未标注数据学习语义动作表示，但在实际应用中面临瓶颈。首先，常用的端到端训练图像编码器空间理解能力差，难以捕捉环境结构先验。其次，当输入帧在时间上相距较远时，LAMs的时间感知脆弱，导致动作建模不稳定且不清晰。这些问题限制了embodied intelligence在动态环境中的稳健性和适应性，因此需要改进空间和时间感知能力以提升系统性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Farsighted-LAM框架，结合几何感知空间编码来增强图像编码器的结构理解，并采用多尺度时间建模从连续帧中捕捉动态运动模式。在此基础上构建SSM-VLA，一个端到端VLA框架，整合结构化感知和视觉Chain-of-Thought模块，用于显式推理环境动态，从而提高决策一致性和可解释性。关键创新点包括融合几何先验、时间一致性和显式推理机制，以改善动作表示的稳定性和清晰度。
light_analysis.result: 论文在多个Vision-Language-Action任务中验证SSM-VLA框架，涵盖模拟和真实世界设置。实验结果显示，该框架实现了state-of-the-art性能，表明在稳健性和泛化能力方面有显著提升。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但与基线方法对比，证明了所提策略在增强动作建模稳定性和环境适应性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出一种结合几何感知建模、时间一致性和显式推理的VLA框架，有效增强embodied intelligence的稳健性和泛化能力。这为机器人学和人工智能领域提供了新方法，通过改进空间和时间感知提升自主系统在动态环境中的性能。未来工作可探索更复杂场景或扩展应用到其他模态任务，尽管论文未明确提及局限性，但潜在方向包括处理高维数据或优化实时性。

title: PD-Diag-Net: Clinical-Priors guided Network on Brain MRI for Auxiliary Diagnosis of Parkinson's Disease
abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a common neurodegenerative disorder that severely diminishes patients' quality of life. Its global prevalence has increased markedly in recent decades. Current diagnostic workflows are complex and heavily reliant on neurologists' expertise, often resulting in delays in early detection and missed opportunities for timely intervention. To address these issues, we propose an end-to-end automated diagnostic method for PD, termed PD-Diag-Net, which performs risk assessment and auxiliary diagnosis directly from raw MRI scans. This framework first introduces an MRI Pre-processing Module (MRI-Processor) to mitigate inter-subject and inter-scanner variability by flexibly integrating established medical imaging preprocessing tools. It then incorporates two forms of clinical prior knowledge: (1) Brain-Region-Relevance-Prior (Relevance-Prior), which specifies brain regions strongly associated with PD; and (2) Brain-Region-Aging-Prior (Aging-Prior), which reflects the accelerated aging typically observed in PD-associated regions. Building on these priors, we design two dedicated modules: the Relevance-Prior Guided Feature Aggregation Module (Aggregator), which guides the model to focus on PD-associated regions at the inter-subject level, and the Age-Prior Guided Diagnosis Module (Diagnoser), which leverages brain age gaps as auxiliary constraints at the intra-subject level to enhance diagnostic accuracy and clinical interpretability. Furthermore, we collected external test data from our collaborating hospital. Experimental results show that PD-Diag-Net achieves 86\% accuracy on external tests and over 96% accuracy in early-stage diagnosis, outperforming existing advanced methods by more than 20%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PD-Diag-Net，一个整合临床先验知识的端到端网络，用于基于脑MRI的帕金森病辅助诊断，提高准确性和临床可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 帕金森病是常见神经退行性疾病，全球患病率上升，严重降低患者生活质量。当前诊断流程复杂，依赖神经学家专业知识，导致早期检测延迟和错过干预时机。现有方法自动化不足，难以处理MRI数据变异性或缺乏临床解释性，需要更准确、可解释的辅助诊断解决方案。
light_analysis.method: PD-Diag-Net是一个端到端框架，首先通过MRI-Processor模块预处理MRI扫描，减少主体间和设备间变异性。它整合两种临床先验：相关性先验指定PD相关大脑区域，老化先验反映PD区域加速老化。基于此，设计Aggregator模块在主体间级别聚焦PD区域，Diagnoser模块在主体内级别利用脑年龄差作为约束，提升诊断准确性和临床可解释性，使用MRI数据和外部医院收集的测试数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，PD-Diag-Net在外部测试数据上达到86%的诊断准确率，早期诊断准确率超过96%。与现有先进方法相比，性能提升超过20%，在准确性和早期检测方面具有显著优势，为帕金森病诊断提供了高效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: PD-Diag-Net通过整合临床先验知识，实现了帕金森病的准确和可解释辅助诊断。主要贡献在于结合相关性先验和老化先验，提升模型性能和临床相关性。该研究推动了AI在医疗领域的应用，具有实际价值，可辅助早期检测和及时干预。未来工作可能包括扩展数据集或优化模型，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: From Next Token Prediction to (STRIPS) World Models
abstract: We study whether next-token prediction can yield world models that truly support planning, in a controlled symbolic setting where propositional STRIPS action models are learned from action traces alone and correctness can be evaluated exactly. We introduce two architectures. The first is the STRIPS Transformer, a symbolically aligned model grounded in theoretical results linking transformers and the formal language structure of STRIPS domains. The second is a standard transformer architecture without explicit symbolic structure built in, for which we study different positional encoding schemes and attention aggregation mechanisms. We evaluate both architectures on five classical planning domains, measuring training accuracy, generalization, and planning performance across domains and problem sizes. Interestingly, both approaches can be used to produce models that support planning with off-the-shelf STRIPS planners over exponentially many unseen initial states and goals. Although the STRIPS Transformer incorporates a strong symbolic inductive bias, it is harder to optimize and requires larger datasets to generalize reliably. In contrast, a standard transformer with stick-breaking attention achieves near-perfect training accuracy and strong generalization. Finally, standard transformers without stick-breaking attention do not generalize to long traces, whereas a symbolic STRIPS model extracted from a transformer trained on shorter traces does.

light_analysis.overview: 论文研究了基于下一个令牌预测的transformer能否构建支持规划的世界模型，提出了符号对齐的STRIPS Transformer和标准transformer两种架构进行比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决从序列数据中学习符号世界模型以支持AI规划的问题。在符号STRIPS设置中，现有transformer方法可能缺乏显式结构，导致泛化能力不足。通过控制实验，研究验证下一个令牌预测是否足以产生准确的规划模型，填补理论与实践的差距，并为自动学习动作模型提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了两种transformer架构：STRIPS Transformer基于transformer与STRIPS域形式语言的理论联系，具有符号对齐；标准transformer无显式结构，研究不同位置编码和注意力聚合机制，如stick-breaking attention。实验在五个经典规划域进行，评估训练、泛化和规划性能，关注模型从动作轨迹学习的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，两种架构都能产生支持规划的世界模型，使用现成STRIPS规划器处理指数级多的未见状态和目标。STRIPS Transformer优化困难、需要大数据集泛化；标准transformer with stick-breaking attention实现近乎完美的训练准确性和强大泛化；无此注意力的标准transformer不泛化到长轨迹。提取的符号模型从短轨迹训练后能泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明了从下一个令牌预测到世界模型的可行性，为transformer在规划任务中的应用提供洞见。符号结构增强但优化挑战，标准transformer通过适当注意力机制表现更好，推动了AI规划与深度学习的结合，未来可扩展至更复杂场景或改进优化技术。

title: LaTeXTrans: Structured LaTeX Translation with Multi-Agent Coordination
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress of modern machine translation (MT) systems on general-domain texts, translating structured LaTeX-formatted documents remains a significant challenge. These documents typically interleave natural language with domain-specific syntax, such as mathematical equations, tables, figures, and cross-references, all of which must be accurately preserved to maintain semantic integrity and compilability. In this paper, we introduce LaTeXTrans, a collaborative multi-agent system designed to address this challenge. LaTeXTrans ensures format preservation, structural fidelity, and terminology consistency through six specialized agents: 1) a Parser that decomposes LaTeX into translation-friendly units via placeholder substitution and syntax filtering; 2) a Translator, Validator, Summarizer, and Terminology Extractor that work collaboratively to ensure context-aware, self-correcting, and terminology-consistent translations; 3) a Generator that reconstructs the translated content into well-structured LaTeX documents. Experimental results show that LaTeXTrans outperforms mainstream MT systems in both translation accuracy and structural preservation. The source code, the online demonstration platform, and a demo video are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: LaTeXTrans 通过多代理协作系统实现了结构化 LaTeX 文档的准确翻译和格式保留，解决了自然语言与格式语法交织的翻译挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代机器翻译在通用文本翻译中取得显著进展，但结构化 LaTeX 文档的翻译仍面临重大挑战。这些文档通常交织自然语言和领域特定语法，如数学方程、表格、交叉引用，必须准确保留语义完整性和可编译性。现有方法在保持格式和结构方面表现不足，导致翻译后文档可能失去原有功能，这限制了学术和技术文档的跨语言交流。LaTeXTrans 旨在解决这一实际问题，通过专门设计确保格式和术语一致性。
light_analysis.method: LaTeXTrans 采用多代理协作方法，包括六个专门代理：解析代理通过 placeholder substitution 和 syntax filtering 将 LaTeX 分解为翻译友好单元；翻译、验证、总结和术语提取代理协同工作，确保上下文感知、自我纠正和术语一致的翻译；生成代理将翻译内容重构为结构化 LaTeX 文档。系统强调格式保留和结构保真，通过代理间的协作优化处理流程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LaTeXTrans 在翻译准确性和结构保留方面优于主流机器翻译系统。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标，但指出系统在保持 LaTeX 文档格式和语义完整性方面表现优越，与基线方法相比具有改进。这些结果支持了系统在结构化文档翻译中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaTeXTrans 的主要贡献在于提出一个多代理协作系统，有效解决了结构化 LaTeX 文档的翻译问题。其学术价值在于改进了机器翻译在格式保留方面的技术，实际应用价值包括促进科学和学术文档的跨语言交流。尽管系统已公开可用，未来工作可扩展至其他结构化格式或提升翻译效率，潜在局限性可能涉及处理复杂文档时的性能优化。

title: Order Optimal Regret Bounds for Sharpe Ratio Optimization under Thompson Sampling
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of sequential decision-making for Sharpe ratio (SR) maximization in a stochastic bandit setting. We focus on the Thompson Sampling (TS) algorithm, a Bayesian approach celebrated for its empirical performance and exploration efficiency, under the assumption of Gaussian rewards with unknown parameters. Unlike conventional bandit objectives focusing on maximizing cumulative reward, Sharpe ratio optimization instead introduces an inherent tradeoff between achieving high returns and controlling risk, demanding careful exploration of both mean and variance. Our theoretical contributions include a novel regret decomposition specifically designed for the Sharpe ratio, highlighting the role of information acquisition about the reward distribution in driving learning efficiency. Then, we establish fundamental performance limits for the proposed algorithm \texttt{SRTS} in terms of an upper bound on regret. We also derive the matching lower bound and show the order-optimality. Our results show that Thompson Sampling achieves logarithmic regret over time, with distribution-dependent factors capturing the difficulty of distinguishing arms based on risk-adjusted performance. Empirical simulations show that our algorithm significantly outperforms existing algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种基于Thompson Sampling的夏普比率优化算法SRTS，并证明其在随机多臂老虎机设置中实现了顺序最优的遗憾边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决在随机多臂老虎机环境中最大化夏普比率（Sharpe Ratio）的顺序决策问题。传统多臂老虎机方法通常专注于最大化累积奖励，忽略了风险因素，而夏普比率优化需要在收益和风险之间进行权衡，这在金融投资等领域具有重要实际意义。现有方法在处理这种风险调整优化时可能效率不足，因为缺乏有效的探索策略来同时估计奖励的均值和方差，导致在平衡收益与控制风险方面存在挑战。
