light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于Thompson Sampling（TS）算法，这是一种贝叶斯方法，假设奖励服从未知参数的高斯分布。核心创新是提出了一个专门针对夏普比率的遗憾分解框架，强调奖励分布信息获取对学习效率的关键作用。具体技术路线包括设计算法SRTS，通过高斯先验对奖励均值和方差进行建模，并利用TS的探索机制来优化夏普比率。关键细节涉及在每次决策中采样奖励参数，以平衡探索和利用，从而有效处理风险调整目标。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，SRTS算法实现了对数级别的遗憾增长，其遗憾上界与分布依赖因子相关，这些因子反映了基于风险调整性能区分臂的难度。同时，研究推导了匹配的遗憾下界，证明了算法的顺序最优性。在实证模拟中，SRTS算法显著优于现有基线方法，展现出更好的性能，但摘要未明确说明具体数据如准确率提升数值，仅提到显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于扩展了Thompson Sampling到夏普比率优化领域，提出了SRTS算法并提供了严格的理论分析，证明了其顺序最优性。这项研究的学术价值在于丰富了风险调整顺序决策的理论框架，实际应用价值包括在金融投资和资源分配等场景中实现更稳健的决策。未来工作可能涉及扩展到非高斯奖励分布或更复杂的风险度量，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性或方向。

title: The Yokai Learning Environment: Tracking Beliefs Over Space and Time
abstract: The ability to cooperate with unknown partners is a central challenge in cooperative AI and widely studied in the form of zero-shot coordination (ZSC), which evaluates an algorithm by measuring the performance of independently trained agents when paired. The Hanabi Learning Environment (HLE) has become the dominant benchmark for ZSC, but recent work has achieved near-perfect inter-seed cross-play performance, limiting its ability to track algorithmic progress. We introduce the Yokai Learning Environment (YLE) - an open-source multi-agent RL benchmark in which effective collaboration requires building common ground by tracking and updating beliefs over moving cards, reasoning under ambiguous hints, and deciding when to terminate the game based on inferred shared knowledge - features absent in the HLE, where beliefs are tied to hand slots and hints are truthful by rule. We evaluate the leading ZSC methods, including High-Entropy IPPO, Other-Play, and Off-Belief Learning, which achieve near-perfect inter-seed cross-play in the HLE, and show that in the YLE they exhibit persistent SP-XP gaps, degraded early-ending calibration, and weaker belief representations in cross-play, indicating failure to maintain consistent internal models with unseen partners. Methods that perform best in the HLE do not perform best in the YLE, indicating that progress measured on a single benchmark may not generalise. Together, these results establish YLE as a challenging new ZSC benchmark.
comment: A previous version was presented as an oral presentation at the the ToM IJCAI 2025 Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入了Yokai学习环境（YLE），作为一个新的多智能体强化学习基准，用于评估零样本协调算法，解决了现有Hanabi学习环境的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在合作AI领域，零样本协调（ZSC）是评估算法与未知伙伴合作能力的关键挑战，通常通过独立训练智能体配对性能来度量。Hanabi学习环境（HLE）已成为主要ZSC基准，但近期算法实现近乎完美的种子间交叉性能，导致其难以有效跟踪算法进展。HLE中信念绑定到手牌槽位且提示真实，而实际合作需处理移动卡牌的动态信念、模糊提示推理和基于共享知识的决策，因此急需新基准来更真实地评估ZSC算法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Yokai学习环境（YLE），一个开源的多智能体强化学习基准。在YLE中，智能体需通过跟踪移动卡牌的信念更新、在模糊提示下进行推理以及根据推断的共享知识决定游戏终止来建立共同基础，这些特征在HLE中缺乏。研究评估了现有领先ZSC方法，如High-Entropy IPPO、Other-Play和Off-Belief Learning，这些方法在HLE中表现优异，以测试它们在YLE中的适应性，突出新基准的技术挑战。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在YLE中，这些ZSC方法表现出持续的SP-XP性能间隙、早结束校准退化以及在交叉游戏中较弱的信念表示，表明它们无法与未见伙伴保持一致的内部模型。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与HLE对比发现，在HLE中表现最好的方法在YLE中并不占优，这揭示了算法在单一基准上的进展可能无法泛化到更复杂环境，强调了多基准评估的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是建立了YLE作为一个具有挑战性的新ZSC基准，推动了合作AI研究向更真实场景发展。其学术价值在于强调算法泛化能力的评估，避免过拟合单一基准；实际应用价值在于提升多智能体系统在动态环境中的协作性能。局限性包括尚未全面测试所有潜在算法，未来工作可能包括开发更强大的ZSC方法以适应YLE的复杂性，并扩展基准多样性以促进广泛研究。

title: DSER: Spectral Epipolar Representation for Efficient Light Field Depth Estimation
abstract: Dense light field depth estimation remains challenging due to sparse angular sampling, occlusion boundaries, textureless regions, and the cost of exhaustive multi-view matching. We propose \emph{Deep Spectral Epipolar Representation} (DSER), a geometry-aware framework that introduces spectral regularization in the epipolar domain for dense disparity reconstruction. DSER models frequency-consistent EPI structure to constrain correspondence estimation and couples this prior with a hybrid inference pipeline that combines least squares gradient initialization, plane-sweeping cost aggregation, and multiscale EPI refinement. An occlusion-aware directed random walk further propagates reliable disparity along edge-consistent paths, improving boundary sharpness and weak-texture stability. Experiments on benchmark and real-world light field datasets show that DSER achieves a strong accuracy-efficiency trade-off, producing more structurally consistent depth maps than representative classical and hybrid baselines. These results establish spectral epipolar regularization as an effective inductive bias for scalable and noise-robust light field depth estimation.

light_analysis.overview: DSER 提出一种基于光谱极线正则化的几何感知框架，有效提升光场深度估计的精度和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 密集光场深度估计面临稀疏角度采样、遮挡边界、纹理less区域和多视图匹配成本等挑战，导致现有方法在效率和准确性上不足，难以处理复杂场景。本研究旨在通过引入光谱正则化来解决这些问题，改善深度重建的稳定性和可扩展性，以应对实际应用中的噪声和不确定性。
light_analysis.method: DSER 在极线域引入光谱正则化，建模频率一致的 EPI 结构来约束对应估计。该方法结合混合推理管道，包括最小二乘梯度初始化、平面扫描成本聚合和多尺度 EPI 细化，并通过遮挡感知的定向随机漫步在边缘一致路径上传播可靠视差，以提升边界清晰度和弱纹理区域的稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在基准和真实世界光场数据集上的实验显示，DSER 在精度和效率之间实现了强权衡，比代表性经典和混合基线方法产生更结构一致的深度图，显示出优越的性能改进，但摘要未提供具体数值数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了光谱极线正则化作为有效归纳偏置的价值，促进了可扩展和噪声鲁棒的光场深度估计。主要贡献包括提升深度估计的结构一致性和效率，为计算机视觉和增强现实等应用提供潜力，未来可探索更复杂场景下的扩展性改进。

title: IntrinsicWeather: Controllable Weather Editing in Intrinsic Space
abstract: We present IntrinsicWeather, a diffusion-based framework for controllable weather editing in intrinsic space. Our framework includes two components based on diffusion priors: an inverse renderer that estimates material properties, scene geometry, and lighting as intrinsic maps from an input image, and a forward renderer that utilizes these geometry and material maps along with a text prompt that describes specific weather conditions to generate a final image. The intrinsic maps enhance controllability compared to traditional pixel-space editing approaches. We propose an intrinsic map-aware attention mechanism that improves spatial correspondence and decomposition quality in large outdoor scenes. For forward rendering, we leverage CLIP-space interpolation of weather prompts to achieve fine-grained weather control. We also introduce a synthetic and a real-world dataset, containing 38k and 18k images under various weather conditions, each with intrinsic map annotations. IntrinsicWeather outperforms state-of-the-art pixel-space editing approaches, weather restoration methods, and rendering-based methods, showing promise for downstream tasks such as autonomous driving, enhancing the robustness of detection and segmentation in challenging weather scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: IntrinsicWeather是一个基于扩散的框架，通过在内在空间中进行可控天气编辑，显著提升了编辑质量和可控性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决计算机视觉中天气编辑的可控性问题。传统像素空间编辑方法在处理复杂天气场景时，可控性不足，导致编辑效果受限，影响了实际应用如自动驾驶中的算法鲁棒性。恶劣天气条件会降低检测和分割模型的性能，因此需要一种更精确的方法来增强天气编辑的可控性，以提升下游任务的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法基于扩散模型框架，包含两个关键组件：一个逆渲染器用于从输入图像估计内在映射（包括材质属性、场景几何和光照），以及一个前向渲染器利用这些映射和文本提示生成编辑后的图像。创新点包括内在映射感知的注意力机制，以改善大型室外场景的空间对应和解耦质量，以及使用CLIP空间插值实现细粒度天气控制。数据集方面，引入了合成数据集（38k图像）和真实世界数据集（18k图像），均带有内在映射标注。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，IntrinsicWeather在可控天气编辑任务中优于当前最先进的像素空间编辑方法、天气恢复方法和基于渲染的方法。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能数据如准确率提升，但对比表明框架在编辑质量和可控性上具有优势。在合成和真实数据集上的验证证实了其有效性，能够生成更自然和可控的天气编辑图像，为下游应用如自动驾驶提供了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了IntrinsicWeather框架，通过在内在空间中编辑天气，增强了可控性和编辑质量。学术上，它整合了扩散模型、逆渲染和CLIP技术，为可控图像编辑领域提供了新方向。实际应用中，框架显示出在自动驾驶等任务中的潜力，能提升算法在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多天气类型、提高实时性能，或与其他视觉任务结合以进一步验证效果。

title: Speech-to-LaTeX: New Models and Datasets for Converting Spoken Equations and Sentences
abstract: Conversion of spoken mathematical expressions is a challenging task that involves transcribing speech into a strictly structured symbolic representation while addressing the ambiguity inherent in the pronunciation of equations. Although significant progress has been achieved in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and language models (LM), the problem of converting spoken mathematics into LaTeX remains underexplored. This task directly applies to educational and research domains, such as lecture transcription or note creation. Based on ASR post-correction, prior work requires 2 transcriptions, focuses only on isolated equations, has a limited test set, and provides neither training data nor multilingual coverage. To address these issues, we present the first fully open-source large-scale dataset, comprising over 66,000 human-annotated audio samples of mathematical equations and sentences in English and Russian, drawn from diverse scientific domains. In addition to the ASR post-correction models and few-shot prompting, we apply audio language models, demonstrating comparable character error rate (CER) results on the MathSpeech benchmark (28% vs. 30%) for the equations conversion. In contrast, on the proposed S2L-equations benchmark, our models outperform the MathSpeech model by a substantial margin of more than 36 percentage points, even after accounting for LaTeX formatting artifacts (27% vs. 64%). We establish the first benchmark for mathematical sentence recognition (S2L-sentences) and achieve an equation CER of 40%. This work lays the groundwork for future advances in multimodal AI, with a particular focus on mathematical content recognition.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出首个开源大规模数据集并应用音频语言模型，显著提升语音数学表达式到LaTeX的转换性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决将语音数学表达式转换为结构化LaTeX表示的挑战性问题，这在教育和研究领域如讲座转录中具有重要应用。现有基于自动语音识别后校正的方法存在需多次转录、仅处理孤立方程、测试集有限、缺乏训练数据和多语言覆盖等不足，限制了技术的实际部署和效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了首个开源大规模数据集，包含超过66,000个人工标注的数学方程和句子音频样本，覆盖英语和俄语，并来自多样科学领域。研究方法整合了音频语言模型，并与基于自动语音识别后校正和少样本提示的方法进行比较，以探索最优转换策略，提升模型鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.result: 在MathSpeech基准测试中，模型在方程转换上取得28%字符错误率，与基准方法30%相当；在提出的S2L-equations基准上，模型性能大幅超越MathSpeech模型，字符错误率从64%降至27%，提升超过36个百分点，即使考虑LaTeX格式影响。此外，建立了数学句子识别基准，实现方程字符错误率40%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过开发新数据集和模型，显著推进了语音数学表达式到LaTeX的转换技术，不仅解决了现有方法的局限性，还为多模态人工智能在数学内容识别领域提供了重要基础。研究具有推动教育技术发展和促进科研应用的潜力，未来可扩展至更多语言和复杂数学场景。

title: A Survey on Interpretability in Visual Recognition
abstract: Visual recognition models have achieved unprecedented success in various tasks. While researchers aim to understand the underlying mechanisms of these models, the growing demand for deployment in safety-critical areas like autonomous driving and medical diagnostics has accelerated the development of eXplainable AI (XAI). Distinct from generic XAI, visual recognition XAI is positioned at the intersection of vision and language, which represent the two most fundamental human modalities and form the cornerstones of multimodal intelligence. This paper provides a systematic survey of XAI in visual recognition by establishing a multi-dimensional taxonomy from a human-centered perspective based on intent, object, presentation, and methodology. Beyond categorization, we summarize critical evaluation desiderata and metrics, conducting an extensive qualitative assessment across different categories and demonstrating quantitative benchmarks within specific dimensions. Furthermore, we explore the interpretability of Multimodal Large Language Models and practical applications, identifying emerging trends and opportunities. By synthesizing these diverse perspectives, this survey provides an insightful roadmap to inspire future research on the interpretability of visual recognition models.
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)

light_analysis.overview: 本论文系统综述了视觉识别中的可解释AI，建立了以人为中心的多维分类法，并探索了多模态大语言模型的解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着视觉识别模型在自动驾驶和医疗诊断等安全关键领域的广泛应用，模型的可解释性变得至关重要。现有通用XAI方法往往忽视了视觉与语言结合的多模态特性，导致在解释视觉模型时缺乏针对性。这问题的重要性在于，不透明的模型可能引发安全风险和伦理担忧，限制了其在实际部署中的可靠性。因此，需要专门针对视觉识别的可解释性研究，以弥补现有方法的不足，提升模型的透明度和用户信任。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个系统性综述框架，通过建立基于意图、对象、呈现和方法的四维分类法，从以人为中心的角度组织视觉识别XAI的研究。关键创新点包括整合多模态视角，强调视觉和语言的交叉点，并总结评估标准和指标如定性和定量基准。此外，综述涵盖了多模态大语言模型的解释性分析和实际应用场景，使用了广泛的文献分析作为基础，但未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验性能指标，但论文进行了广泛的评估，包括对不同XAI分类法的定性和定量分析。综述提供了比较基准，展示了不同方法在解释性方面的优势和局限，但没有报告如准确率提升或效率改进的具体数据。与基线方法的对比主要通过分类和评估标准实现，强调了多维度视角下的差异，为未来研究提供了参考框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述为视觉识别可解释性研究提供了全面的路线图，系统化整理了现有知识并突出了新兴趋势如多模态大语言模型的应用。其学术价值在于建立了分类法和评估标准，促进了该领域的结构化发展；实际应用价值在于支持安全关键领域的模型部署，增强可解释性以提升安全性和可信度。潜在局限性包括未涵盖所有新兴技术，未来方向可能涉及更多跨模态研究和实际集成挑战。

title: Silhouette-Driven Instance-Weighted $k$-means
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental unsupervised learning task with applications across a wide range of domains. Popular algorithms such as $k$-means are efficient and widely used, but can be sensitive to outliers, ambiguous boundary points, and heterogeneous cluster geometry, which may distort centroid estimates and yield suboptimal partitions. We introduce K-Sil, a silhouette-driven $k$-means variant that, at each iteration, weights points using a centroid-margin proxy for the silhouette score, emphasizing confidently assigned instances while down-weighting borderline or noisy regions. Centroid updates take the form of a softmax-weighted mean, and an adaptive temperature automatically calibrates the sharpness of the weight distribution using a cluster-balanced, macro-averaged, silhouette criterion. Under standard separation conditions, we establish a local convergence result for the induced weighted centroid updates. Experiments on 15 real-world datasets spanning tabular, biomedical, text, and image representations show consistent gains in internal validation metrics and typical improvements in external validation metrics over $k$-means and competitive instance-weighted baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了K-Sil，一个基于轮廓驱动的实例加权k-means变体，通过自适应加权机制提高聚类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类是无监督学习的基础任务，应用广泛，但常用算法如k-means对离群点、边界模糊点和异构聚类几何敏感，导致质心估计失真和分区次优。现有方法在复杂数据中可能效果不佳，因此需要改进加权机制来增强鲁棒性和准确性，以应对实际应用中的噪声和不确定性。
light_analysis.method: K-Sil方法在每个迭代中，使用轮廓得分的质心-边界代理对数据点进行加权，强调自信分配的实例，而降低边界或噪声区域的权重。质心更新采用软最大加权平均，并通过自适应温度自动校准权重分布的锐度，基于聚类平衡的宏平均轮廓准则。在标准分离条件下，该方法确保了局部收敛结果，增强了算法的稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在15个真实数据集上进行，涵盖表格、生物医学、文本和图像表示。K-Sil在内部验证指标上表现出一致增益，并在外部验证指标上通常优于k-means及其他竞争实例加权基线，但没有提供具体数值。摘要未明确说明详细性能数据，但强调了聚类准确性的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了K-Sil算法，通过轮廓驱动的加权机制改进了k-means，有理论收敛保证和实践应用价值。研究为聚类任务提供了更鲁棒的解决方案，但可能存在计算复杂度增加等局限性，未来工作可进一步优化效率和扩展到更广泛的数据类型。

title: Sequential-Parallel Duality in Prefix Scannable Models
abstract: Modern neural sequence models are designed to meet the dual mandate of parallelizable training and fast sequential inference. Recent developments have given rise to various models, such as Gated Linear Attention (GLA) and Mamba, that achieve such ``sequential-parallel duality.'' This raises a natural question: can we characterize the full class of neural sequence models that support near-constant-time parallel evaluation and linear-time, constant-space sequential inference? We begin by describing a broad class of such models -- state space models -- as those whose state updates can be computed using the classic parallel prefix scan algorithm with a custom associative aggregation operator. We then define a more general class, Prefix-Scannable Models (PSMs), by relaxing the state aggregation operator to allow arbitrary (potentially non-associative) functions such as softmax attention. This generalization unifies many existing architectures, including element-wise RNNs (e.g., Mamba) and linear transformers (e.g., GLA, Mamba2, mLSTM), while also introducing new models with softmax-like operators that achieve O(1) amortized compute per token and log(N) memory for sequence length N. We empirically evaluate such models on illustrative small-scale language modeling and canonical synthetic tasks, including state tracking and associative recall. Empirically, we find that PSMs retain the expressivity of transformer-based architectures while matching the inference efficiency of state space models -- in some cases exhibiting better length generalization than either.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文定义了前缀可扫描模型（PSMs），统一了支持序列-并行二重性的神经序列模型类，实现高效并行训练和顺序推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代神经序列模型需兼顾并行训练和快速顺序推理，现有模型如GLA和Mamba虽实现此目标，但缺乏系统性理论框架来完整表征这类模型。本研究旨在解决如何界定所有支持近恒定时间并行评估和线性时间、常数空间顺序推理的模型类，以填补理论空白，推动模型设计。这个问题的重要性在于它能促进对高效AI模型的理解，并为未来优化提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文从状态空间模型入手，将其描述为可用前缀扫描算法更新的模型类，其中聚合操作符需满足结合律。接着，推广到前缀可扫描模型（PSMs），通过放宽聚合操作符为任意函数（如非结合的softmax注意力），统一了元素级RNNs（如Mamba）和线性变换器（如GLA, Mamba2）。这一创新引入了新模型，实现O(1)摊销计算和log(N)内存，技术特色在于利用前缀扫描算法的变体处理更广泛的函数类。
light_analysis.result: 在语言建模和合成任务（如状态跟踪和关联回忆）的实证评估中，PSMs表现出保持变换器架构表达能力的同时，匹配状态空间模型的推理效率。具体而言，某些情况下，PSMs展现出更好的长度泛化性能，优于基线方法，但摘要未提供具体数据指标如准确率数字。实验验证了PSMs在效率和泛化方面的潜力，强化了其作为统一框架的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是定义了前缀可扫描模型（PSMs），为序列-并行二重性提供了系统性理论框架，统一了多种现有架构并引入新模型。学术上，这有助于深化对高效序列模型的理解，实际应用上可能推动更快速、节省内存的AI系统开发。未来工作可扩展至更多任务验证，并探索PSMs在其他领域的适用性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Learning What Reinforcement Learning Can't: Interleaved Online Fine-Tuning for Hardest Questions
abstract: Recent advances in large language model (LLM) reasoning have shown that sophisticated behaviors such as planning and self-reflection can emerge through reinforcement learning (RL). However, despite these successes, RL in its current form remains insufficient to induce capabilities that exceed the limitations of the base model, as it is primarily optimized based on existing knowledge of the model rather than facilitating the acquisition of new information. To address this limitation, we employ supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to learn what RL cannot, which enables the incorporation of new knowledge and reasoning patterns by leveraging high-quality demonstration data. We analyze the training dynamics of RL and SFT for LLM reasoning and find that RL excels at maintaining and improving performance on questions within the model's original capabilities, while SFT is more effective at enabling progress on questions beyond the current scope of the model. Motivated by the complementary strengths of RL and SFT, we introduce a novel training approach, \textbf{ReLIFT} (\textbf{Re}inforcement \textbf{L}earning \textbf{I}nterleaved with Online \textbf{F}ine-\textbf{T}uning). In ReLIFT, the model is primarily trained using RL, but when it encounters challenging questions, high-quality solutions are collected for fine-tuning, and the training process alternates between RL and fine-tuning to enhance the model's reasoning abilities. ReLIFT achieves an average improvement of over +5.2 points across five competition-level benchmarks and one out-of-distribution benchmark compared to other zero-RL models. Furthermore, we demonstrate that ReLIFT outperforms both RL and SFT while using only 13\% of the detailed demonstration data, highlighting its scalability. These results provide compelling evidence that ReLIFT overcomes the fundamental limitations of RL and underscores the significant potential.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种名为ReLIFT的新训练方法，通过交替使用强化学习和在线微调来克服LLM推理中RL的局限性，显著提升模型处理超越原有能力范围问题的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期，大型语言模型（LLM）通过强化学习（RL）展现出规划与自我反思等复杂推理能力，但RL优化基于模型现有知识，无法引入新信息以超越基础模型的能力范围。监督微调（SFT）能利用高质量演示数据学习新知识和推理模式，但在模型原有能力内的问题上表现不如RL。RL和SFT的互补优势未被充分利用，导致模型在挑战性推理任务上受限，因此本研究旨在结合两者以解决RL的不足并提升整体推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了ReLIFT方法，通过在线交替训练结合RL和SFT。在RL训练过程中，当模型遇到挑战性问题时，收集高质量解决方案进行监督微调，然后切换回RL训练，形成交替循环以增强推理能力。该方法的关键创新点在于动态结合RL的优化能力和SFT的知识引入机制，实现了互补优势。摘要未明确说明使用的具体模型架构和数据集细节，但强调了在线交替训练的机制作为核心特色。
light_analysis.result: 在实验中，ReLIFT在五个竞争级基准测试和一个分布外基准测试上取得了平均超过+5.2点的性能提升，优于其他不使用RL的模型。同时，ReLIFT仅使用13%的详细演示数据就表现优于单独使用RL或SFT，展示了其高效性和可扩展性。这些结果验证了ReLIFT在克服RL局限性方面的有效性，并通过具体指标对比凸显了其性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReLIFT方法有效克服了RL在LLM推理中的根本局限性，通过交替RL和在线微调显著提升了模型处理超越能力范围问题的性能。这项研究提供了新的训练策略，具有重要的学术价值，并为未来LLM推理能力的扩展提供了方向。尽管摘要未明确提及局限性，但该方法可能依赖于高质量演示数据的可用性，未来工作可探索在更广泛任务中的应用和进一步优化算法。

title: Comparative Analysis of Modern Machine Learning Models for Retail Sales Forecasting
abstract: Accurate demand forecasting is critical for brick-and-mortar retailers to optimize inventory management and minimize costs. This study evaluates statistical baselines, tree-based ensembles (XGBoost and LightGBM), and deep learning architectures (N-BEATS, N-HiTS, and the Temporal Fusion Transformer) on retail sales data characterized by intermittent demand, substantial missingness, and frequent product turnover. Models are compared across four configurations varying by aggregation level and imputation strategy, using evaluation protocols that reflect typical deployment patterns for each model class. Localized tree-based methods achieve superior performance, with XGBoost attaining the lowest RMSE of 4.833. While SAITS-based imputation improved neural network performance in aggregated settings, these models remained inferior to ensemble methods. The results suggest that, under the studied constraints, model selection should prioritize alignment with problem characteristics over architectural sophistication.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过比较多种机器学习模型，发现局部树基方法在零售销售预测中表现最佳，强调模型选择应基于问题特征而非架构复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 实体零售商需要准确需求预测来优化库存管理并降低成本，尤其在面临间歇性需求、数据缺失和频繁产品周转的挑战时。现有预测方法（如统计模型和复杂深度学习）在处理这些特性时可能不足，缺乏系统比较。本研究旨在评估不同模型类（统计基线、树基集成和深度学习）在零售数据中的性能，填补实际应用中的知识空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究使用零售销售数据集，其特点为间歇性需求、大量缺失和频繁产品周转。评估模型包括统计基线、树基集成（XGBoost和LightGBM）和深度学习架构（N-BEATS、N-HiTS和Temporal Fusion Transformer）。通过四种配置（基于不同聚合级别和插补策略）进行比较，评估协议模拟了各模型类的典型部署模式。关键创新在于综合考虑问题特征进行多模型系统分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，局部树基方法性能最优，其中XGBoost达到最低均方根误差（RMSE）为4.833。基于SAITS的插补策略在聚合设置中提升了神经网络的预测效果，但这些模型仍不如树基集成方法。与统计基线和深度学习模型相比，集成方法展现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结论表明，在零售销售预测场景中，模型选择应优先考虑与问题特征的契合，而非追求架构的复杂性。这为实际应用提供了实用指导，强调了基于数据特性选择模型的学术和商业价值。局限性包括数据集特定性，未来工作可扩展至其他领域或优化预处理技术。

title: Average Calibration Losses for Reliable Uncertainty in Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Deep neural networks for medical image segmentation are often overconfident, compromising both reliability and clinical utility. In this work, we propose differentiable formulations of marginal L1 Average Calibration Error (mL1-ACE) as an auxiliary loss that can be computed on a per-image basis. We compare both hard- and soft-binning approaches to directly improve pixel-wise calibration. Our experiments on four datasets (ACDC, AMOS, KiTS, BraTS) demonstrate that incorporating mL1-ACE significantly reduces calibration errors, particularly Average Calibration Error (ACE) and Maximum Calibration Error (MCE), while largely maintaining high Dice Similarity Coefficients (DSCs). We find that the soft-binned variant yields the greatest improvements in calibration over the DSC plus cross-entropy loss baseline but often compromises segmentation performance, with hard-binned mL1-ACE maintaining segmentation performance, albeit with weaker calibration improvement. To gain further insight into calibration performance and its variability across an imaging dataset, we introduce dataset reliability histograms, an aggregation of per-image reliability diagrams. The resulting analysis highlights improved alignment between predicted confidences and true accuracies. Overall, our approach provides practitioners with explicit control over the calibration-accuracy trade-off, enabling more reliable integration of deep learning methods into clinical workflows. We share our code here: https://github.com/cai4cai/Average-Calibration-Losses
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures, IEEE TMI submission. This version originally appeared in error as arXiv:2403.06759(v2)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种基于边缘L1平均校准误差的可微分辅助损失函数，用于提升医疗图像分割模型的校准可靠性，实现不确定性估计的改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医疗图像分割中，深度神经网络常常产生过于自信的预测，导致不确定性估计不可靠，这会严重影响临床决策的准确性和安全性。现有方法往往关注分割准确性而忽略校准问题，使得模型输出难以在实际应用中信任。解决这一问题对促进深度学习在临床工作流程中的集成至关重要，因为它直接关系到诊断和治疗的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出可微分的边缘L1平均校准误差作为辅助损失，可在每个图像基础上计算，以优化像素级校准。核心方法包括硬binning和软binning两种变体：硬binning通过离散化处理，软binning通过连续近似，直接针对预测置信度进行校准。实验在四个公开数据集（ACDC、AMOS、KiTS、BraTS）上进行，结合分割模型，对比这些损失与基线（DSC加交叉熵损失）的效果，关键创新在于损失的可微分设计和每个图像的独立计算方式。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，结合mL1-ACE显著减少了校准误差，特别是平均校准误差和最大校准误差，同时基本保持了高Dice相似系数。与基线相比，软binning变体在校准改进方面表现最优，但通常导致分割性能下降；而硬binning变体则保持分割性能稳定，仅在校准改进上较弱。进一步通过数据集可靠性直方图分析，验证了预测置信度与真实准确度之间对齐的改善，证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提供了一种控制校准-准确性权衡的显式方法，使医疗图像分割模型的不确定性估计更加可靠，促进了深度学习在临床工作流程中的安全集成。实际应用中，这有助于提升诊断工具的可信度，未来工作可探索在不同数据集上的泛化性和校准方法的进一步优化，以应对更复杂的医疗场景。

title: Consistency-based Abductive Reasoning over Perceptual Errors of Multiple Pre-trained Models in Novel Environments
abstract: The deployment of pre-trained perception models in novel environments often leads to performance degradation due to distributional shifts. Although recent artificial intelligence approaches for metacognition use logical rules to characterize and filter model errors, improving precision often comes at the cost of reduced recall. This paper addresses the hypothesis that leveraging multiple pre-trained models can mitigate this recall reduction. We formulate the challenge of identifying and managing conflicting predictions from various models as a consistency-based abduction problem, building on the idea of abductive learning (ABL) but applying it to test-time instead of training. The input predictions and the learned error detection rules derived from each model are encoded in a logic program. We then seek an abductive explanation--a subset of model predictions--that maximizes prediction coverage while ensuring the rate of logical inconsistencies (derived from domain constraints) remains below a specified threshold. We propose two algorithms for this knowledge representation task: an exact method based on Integer Programming (IP) and an efficient Heuristic Search (HS). Through extensive experiments on a simulated aerial imagery dataset featuring controlled, complex distributional shifts, we demonstrate that our abduction-based framework outperforms individual models and standard ensemble baselines, achieving, for instance, average relative improvements of approximately 13.6\% in F1-score and 16.6\% in accuracy across 15 diverse test datasets when compared to the best individual model. Our results validate the use of consistency-based abduction as an effective mechanism to robustly integrate knowledge from multiple imperfect models in challenging, novel scenarios.
comment: Accepted to AAAI 2026. Code available at https://github.com/lab-v2/EDCR_PyReason_AirSim

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出基于一致性的溯因推理框架，通过集成多个预训练模型的预测，在新环境中平衡感知任务的精度和召回率，应用于测试时优化模型冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练感知模型在新环境中常因分布偏移导致性能下降。现有方法使用逻辑规则检测错误以提高精度，但往往以召回率为代价，导致整体性能不均衡。本研究旨在利用多个预训练模型来缓解召回率下降，解决模型在挑战性新颖场景中的不确定性管理问题，强调需要更稳健的集成方法来处理冲突预测和误差累积。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法将多模型冲突预测问题建模为基于一致性的溯因推理。首先，将各模型的输入预测和学到的错误检测规则编码为逻辑程序；然后，寻找一个预测子集作为溯因解释，以最大化预测覆盖率，同时确保由领域约束衍生的逻辑不一致性率低于指定阈值。关键创新包括应用溯因学习（ABL）于测试时而非训练，并开发两种算法：基于整数规划（IP）的精确方法和启发式搜索（HS），使用模拟航空影像数据集模拟复杂分布偏移进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟航空影像数据集上进行的实验显示，该框架显著优于个体模型和标准集成基线。具体地，在15个多样测试数据集中，平均相对F1分数提升约13.6%，准确率提升16.6%，相较于最佳个体模型。这证明了基于一致性的溯因推理在有效整合多个不完美模型预测方面的性能优势，同时控制误差率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结论验证了基于一致性的溯因推理作为集成多个不完美模型知识的有效机制，提升了在新环境中的鲁棒性。学术上，提供了一种新颖的推理方法处理模型冲突和不确定性；实际应用中，可增强感知系统的适应性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模型类型或真实世界数据集，以进一步提高泛化能力。

title: LLLMs: A Data-Driven Survey of Evolving Research on Limitations of Large Language Models
abstract: Large language model (LLM) research has grown rapidly, along with increasing concern about their limitations. In this survey, we conduct a data-driven, semi-automated review of research on limitations of LLMs (LLLMs) from 2022 to early 2025 using a bottom-up approach. From a corpus of 250,000 ACL and arXiv papers, we identify 14,648 relevant papers using keyword filtering, LLM-based classification, validated against expert labels, and topic clustering (via two approaches, HDBSCAN+BERTopic and LlooM). We find that the share of LLM-related papers increases over fivefold in ACL and nearly eightfold in arXiv between 2022 and 2025. Since 2022, LLLMs research grows even faster, reaching over 30% of LLM papers by 2025. Reasoning remains the most studied limitation, followed by generalization, hallucination, bias, and security. The distribution of topics in the ACL dataset stays relatively stable over time, while arXiv shifts toward security risks, alignment, hallucinations, knowledge editing, and multimodality. We offer a quantitative view of trends in LLLMs research and release a dataset of annotated abstracts and a validated methodology, available at: https://github.com/a-kostikova/LLLMs-Survey.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过数据驱动方法量化分析了LLM限制研究的趋势，并发布了标注数据集和方法论。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型研究的快速扩张，对其局限性如推理、泛化、幻觉、偏见和安全的担忧不断增加。现有综述多依赖定性分析，缺乏系统性、基于大数据的量化视角来跟踪研究演变。本调查旨在弥补这一不足，通过数据驱动方式系统探索2022至2025年初LLMs限制研究的发展，揭示主题分布和趋势变化，为学术社区提供更全面的参考框架。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用自下而上的数据驱动半自动化综述方法。核心流程包括：从250,000篇ACL和arXiv论文中，通过关键词过滤识别相关研究；使用基于LLM的分类系统进行细粒度筛选，并借助专家标签验证准确性；结合两种主题聚类技术（HDBSCAN+BERTopic和LlooM）进行趋势分析。该方法创新性地集成自动化工具和人工监督，提高了大规模文献分析的效率和可靠性，并发布了开源数据集和验证方法。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，2022至2025年间，LLM相关论文在ACL会议中增长超过五倍，arXiv预印本中增长近八倍；LLMs限制研究（LLLMs）增速更快，到2025年占LLM论文的30%以上。推理是最常研究的限制，其次是泛化、幻觉、偏见和安全性。ACL主题分布相对稳定，而arXiv则向安全风险、对齐、幻觉、知识编辑和多模态方向转移。这些数据提供了LLMs限制研究的量化趋势视图，但摘要未明确说明与基线方法的对比情况。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是通过数据驱动方法系统性分析了LLMs限制研究的演变，揭示了关键主题趋势，并发布了开源数据集和方法论。学术上，它补充了传统定性综述，为未来研究提供基准和参考；实际应用中，帮助研究者聚焦重要限制领域，指导技术发展方向。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性，但数据依赖性和方法偏差可能影响结果；未来工作可扩展数据集或改进分析技术。

title: Training with Pseudo-Code for Instruction Following
abstract: Despite rapid advances in the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), they continue to struggle with following relatively simple and unambiguous instructions, particularly when compositional structure is involved. Recent work suggests that models may follow instructions more effectively when they are expressed in pseudo-code rather than natural language. However, writing pseudo-code programs can be tedious, and relying on few-shot demonstrations or inference-time code prompting is often unnatural for non-expert users of LLMs. To overcome these limitations, we propose a training time approach that fine-tunes LLMs using instruction-tuning data augmented with pseudo-code representations of natural language instructions paired with final responses. We evaluate our method on 12 publicly available benchmarks spanning instruction-following, mathematical reasoning, and commonsense reasoning, across six base models. Our results show that models trained with pseudo-code follow instructions more reliably, achieving relative gains of 8-21\% on instruction following benchmarks, while largely preserving and in some cases improving performance on mathematical and commonsense reasoning tasks, with an average gain of up to 30\% across all evaluated benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种通过在训练时使用伪代码增强指令数据来微调大型语言模型的方法，以显著提升其遵循指令的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在处理简单和明确的指令时仍存在困难，尤其是在涉及组合结构的情况下，这限制了其在实际应用中的可靠性和易用性。现有方法如基于伪代码的指令表达虽然有效，但需要手动编写伪代码，过程繁琐，且依赖少样本演示或推理时代码提示，对非专家用户不够友好。这些不足促使研究者探索一种更便捷的优化指令跟随能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: 该方法的核心创新点在于训练阶段的微调策略，使用指令调整数据集，并增强伪代码表示：将自然语言指令转换为伪代码形式，与其对应的最终响应配对，以此来训练大型语言模型。具体实施中，涵盖了六个基础模型，技术路线侧重于伪代码的数据增强和微调过程，旨在改善模型的指令理解能力，而不显著改变其原始架构。这种方法通过训练时间优化，简化了用户使用流程。
light_analysis.result: 在12个公开基准上的实验表明，使用伪代码训练的模型在指令跟随任务中表现更可靠，实现了相对性能提升8-21%，同时数学推理和常识推理任务的性能基本保持或在某些情况下有所改善。总体平均增益高达30%，该结果基于六个基础模型与基线方法的对比，显示了该方法在多种任务上的有效性，具体数据包括基准测试的广泛覆盖和显著的提升幅度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种创新的伪代码训练方法，有效提升了大型语言模型的指令跟随可靠性，同时兼容其他推理任务。其学术价值在于为模型优化提供了新方向，增强了可解释性和用户友好性；实际应用价值体现在简化了模型训练和使用流程。未来工作可探索伪代码表示在更多任务中的泛化性，或结合其他技术进一步改进性能。

title: Panda: A pretrained forecast model for chaotic dynamics
abstract: Chaotic systems are intrinsically sensitive to small errors, challenging efforts to construct predictive data-driven models of real-world dynamical systems such as fluid flows or neuronal activity. Prior efforts comprise either specialized models trained on individual time series, or foundation models trained on vast time series databases with little underlying dynamical structure. Motivated by dynamical systems theory, we present Panda, Patched Attention for Nonlinear DynAmics. We train Panda on a novel synthetic, extensible dataset of $2 \times 10^4$ chaotic dynamical systems that we discover using an evolutionary algorithm. Trained purely on simulated data, Panda exhibits emergent properties: zero-shot forecasting of unseen chaotic systems preserving both short-term accuracy and distributional measures, nonlinear resonance patterns in attention heads, and effective prediction of real-world experimental time series. Despite having been trained only on low-dimensional ordinary differential equations, Panda spontaneously develops the ability to predict partial differential equations without retraining. We also demonstrate a neural scaling law for differential equations, underscoring the potential of pre-trained models for probing abstract mathematical domains like nonlinear dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: Panda是一个基于注意力机制的预训练模型，用于混沌动力学的预测，展现出零样本预测和涌现属性。
light_analysis.motivation: 混沌系统对微小误差固有敏感，使得构建数据驱动的预测模型在真实世界动力学系统（如流体流动或神经元活动）中具有挑战性。现有方法包括针对单个时间序列训练的专门模型，或基于大规模时间序列数据库的基础模型，但这些方法缺乏对底层动力学结构的考虑，限制了模型的泛化能力和实用性。因此，需要一种能够处理广泛混沌系统的通用预测框架。
light_analysis.method: Panda（Patched Attention for Nonlinear Dynamics）是一种预训练预测模型，核心基于注意力机制来处理非线性动力学。模型在一个新型合成数据集上训练，该数据集包含2×10^4个混沌系统，通过进化算法生成以捕获多样动力学行为。训练过程中仅使用模拟数据，注意力头中设计了非线性共振模式以增强模型表现。关键创新在于预训练策略和注意力机制的结合，使得模型能够泛化到未见系统。
light_analysis.result: Panda展现出多个涌现属性：在零样本预测中保持短期准确性和分布度量；注意力头中观察到非线性共振模式；有效预测真实世界实验时间序列。尽管仅基于低维常微分方程训练，模型能自发预测偏微分方程而无需再训练。此外，研究展示了微分方程的神经缩放定律，表明模型性能随规模增加而改善。与现有方法对比，Panda在泛化能力和结构理解方面表现出色，但具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Panda的主要贡献是提出一个用于混沌动力学的预训练预测模型，通过合成数据训练实现零样本泛化和自发预测能力。这突显了预训练模型在抽象数学领域（如非线性动力学）的潜力，为复杂系统建模提供了新方法。未来工作可扩展到更多动力学类型或实际应用，潜在局限性可能在于数据依赖性和模型可解释性。

title: Large Language Model Psychometrics: A Systematic Review of Evaluation, Validation, and Enhancement
abstract: The advancement of large language models (LLMs) has outpaced traditional evaluation methodologies. This progress presents novel challenges, such as measuring human-like psychological constructs, moving beyond static and task-specific benchmarks, and establishing human-centered evaluation. These challenges intersect with psychometrics, the science of quantifying the intangible aspects of human psychology, such as personality, values, and intelligence. This review paper introduces and synthesizes the emerging interdisciplinary field of LLM Psychometrics, which leverages psychometric instruments, theories, and principles to evaluate, understand, and enhance LLMs. The reviewed literature systematically shapes benchmarking principles, broadens evaluation scopes, refines methodologies, validates results, and advances LLM capabilities. Diverse perspectives are integrated to provide a structured framework for researchers across disciplines, enabling a more comprehensive understanding of this nascent field. Ultimately, the review provides actionable insights for developing future evaluation paradigms that align with human-level AI and promote the advancement of human-centered AI systems for societal benefit. A curated repository of LLM psychometric resources is available at https://github.com/valuebyte-ai/Awesome-LLM-Psychometrics.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统回顾了大型语言模型心理计量学这一新兴跨学科领域，提出结合心理计量学工具评估和增强LLMs的结构化框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于大型语言模型的快速发展已超越传统评估方法，面临测量人类心理构造、超越静态和任务特定基准、建立以人为中心评估等新挑战。这些问题与心理计量学交叉，后者专注于量化人类心理的无形方面如个性和智力。现有方法不足在于无法有效应对LLMs的进步，亟需新评估范式以确保评估的全面性和人性化，从而推动AI系统更贴近人类水平。
light_analysis.method: 作为一篇系统性综述论文，本文研究方法涉及引入和综合LLM Psychometrics这一新兴跨学科领域，利用心理计量学的工具、理论和原则来评估、理解和增强LLMs。通过系统回顾文献，整合多样化视角，提供一个结构化的框架，帮助研究人员跨越学科界限。方法包括文献收集、分析和综合，以系统化地塑造基准原则，扩展评估范围，并完善评估方法学，促进更全面的理解。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果基于文献回顾总结，表明LLM心理计量学在塑造基准原则、扩展评估范围、完善方法学、验证结果和推进LLM能力方面取得进展。虽然摘要未明确具体数据，但综述指出结合心理计量学能更有效地评估LLMs的心理类似特性，如人格和价值观，超越传统静态基准。与基线方法相比，这种跨学科方法提供了更人性化和全面的评估视角，推动AI系统向人类级标准靠拢。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结本文主要贡献为系统回顾并结构化LLM心理计量学，提供可操作的见解以开发未来评估范式，有助于实现人类级AI和以人为中心的AI系统。学术价值在于推动跨学科研究，实际应用价值在于促进AI技术对社会有益的发展。局限性是综述性质缺乏原始数据，未来工作方向可基于此框架进行更深入的实证研究和资源应用，如利用提供的资源库进一步探索。

title: Unsupervised training of keypoint-agnostic descriptors for flexible retinal image registration
abstract: Current color fundus image registration approaches are limited, among other things, by the lack of labeled data, which is even more significant in the medical domain, motivating the use of unsupervised learning. Therefore, in this work, we develop a novel unsupervised descriptor learning method that does not rely on keypoint detection. This enables the resulting descriptor network to be agnostic to the keypoint detector used during the registration inference.   To validate this approach, we perform an extensive and comprehensive comparison on the reference public retinal image registration dataset. Additionally, we test our method with multiple keypoint detectors of varied nature, even proposing some novel ones. Our results demonstrate that the proposed approach offers accurate registration, not incurring in any performance loss versus supervised methods. Additionally, it demonstrates accurate performance regardless of the keypoint detector used. Thus, this work represents a notable step towards leveraging unsupervised learning in the medical domain.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种无监督、关键点不可知的描述符学习方法，用于灵活的视网膜图像配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前彩色眼底图像配准方法因缺乏标注数据而受限，这在医学领域尤为严重，因为医学图像标注成本高且困难。现有监督学习方法依赖大量标注数据，导致模型泛化能力差，影响诊断准确性。因此，需要开发无监督方法来克服数据稀缺问题，提高配准的实用性和灵活性，推动医学图像分析的发展，减少对人工标注的依赖。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括开发一种无监督的描述符学习算法，不依赖关键点检测，从而使描述符网络与关键点检测器无关。在参考公共视网膜图像配准数据集上进行训练和验证，并测试了多种性质不同的关键点检测器，包括新提出的检测器，以评估方法的鲁棒性。具体技术细节如网络架构在摘要中未明确说明，但强调了无监督学习框架的关键点不可知特性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，所提出的方法在参考数据集上提供了准确的图像配准，性能与监督方法相当，没有明显的性能损失。无论使用何种关键点检测器，该方法都保持稳定的准确性能，证明了其关键点不可知的特性。广泛的比较验证了方法的有效性和通用性，包括与多种检测器测试，结果一致表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: 这项研究提出了一种创新的无监督描述符学习方法，用于视网膜图像配准，减少了对外部关键点检测器的依赖。其学术价值在于推进了无监督学习在医学图像处理中的应用，提高了配准的灵活性和实用性。实际应用价值在于为医学领域提供高效的解决方案，减少数据标注需求。未来工作可进一步优化方法或扩展到其他医学图像任务。

title: Token-Level Constraint Boundary Search for Jailbreaking Text-to-Image Models
abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) generation has advanced rapidly in recent years, but they also raise safety concerns due to the potential production of harmful content. In the practical deployments, T2I services typically adopt full-chain defenses that combine a prompt checker, a securely trained generator, and a post-hoc image checker. Jailbreaking such full-chain systems is challenging in the black-box settings because prompt tokens form a discrete combinatorial space and the attack must satisfy multiple coupled constraints under sparse feedback and limited queries. To address these challenges, we propose Token-level Constraint Boundary Search (TCBS)-Attack, a novel query-based black-box jailbreak attack that searches for tokens located near the decision boundaries defined by text and image checkers. TCBS-Attack incorporates decision boundaries as constraint conditions to guide the evolutionary search of token populations, iteratively optimize tokens near these boundaries. Such evolutionary search process reduces the effective search space and improves query efficiency while preserving semantic coherence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCBS-Attack consistently outperforms state-of-the-art jailbreak attacks across various T2I models, including securely trained open-source models and commercial online services like DALL-E 3. TCBS-Attack achieves an ASR-4 of 52.5% and an ASR-1 of 22.0% on jailbreaking full-chain T2I models, significantly surpassing baseline methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出TCBS-Attack方法，一种基于令牌级约束边界搜索的黑盒越狱攻击，用于破解文本到图像模型的全链防御系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着文本到图像生成的快速发展，模型可能产生有害内容引发安全担忧。实际部署中，T2I服务采用包含提示检查器、安全训练生成器和后处理图像检查器的全链防御。然而，在黑盒设置下越狱这类系统极具挑战性，因为提示令牌形成离散组合空间，攻击需满足多重耦合约束，且反馈稀疏、查询有限。现有方法难以有效应对这些挑战，因此需要开发更高效的攻击策略来解决实际安全问题。
light_analysis.method: TCBS-Attack是一种基于查询的黑盒越狱攻击方法，核心在于搜索位于文本和图像检查器决策边界附近的令牌。该方法将决策边界作为约束条件，引导令牌种群的进化搜索，迭代优化边界附近的令牌。这种进化搜索过程减少了有效搜索空间，提高了查询效率，同时保持了语义连贯性。关键创新包括利用边界信息指导搜索和优化令牌选择策略，无需具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，TCBS-Attack在多种文本到图像模型上持续优于最先进的越狱攻击方法，包括安全训练的开源模型和商业在线服务如DALL-E 3。具体地，在越狱全链T2I模型时，TCBS-Attack实现了52.5%的ASR-4和22.0%的ASR-1，显著超越了基线方法，显示出更高的攻击成功率和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了TCBS-Attack方法，有效解决了黑盒设置下越狱文本到图像模型全链防御的挑战。研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了对抗攻击和模型安全领域的发展；实际应用上，有助于评估和提升T2I模型的鲁棒性。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可推测进一步优化攻击策略或扩展到其他模型类型。

title: Rethinking Two-Stage Referring-by-Tracking in Referring Multi-Object Tracking: Make it Strong Again
abstract: Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RMOT) aims to track multiple objects specified by natural language expressions in videos. With the recent significant progress of one-stage methods, the two-stage Referring-by-Tracking (RBT) paradigm has gradually lost its popularity. However, its lower training cost and flexible incremental deployment remain irreplaceable. Rethinking existing two-stage RBT frameworks, we identify two fundamental limitations: the overly heuristic feature construction and fragile correspondence modeling. To address these issues, we propose FlexHook, a novel two-stage RBT framework. In FlexHook, the proposed Conditioning Hook (C-Hook) redefines the feature construction by a sampling-based strategy and language-conditioned cue injection. Then, we introduce a Pairwise Correspondence Decoder (PCD) that replaces CLIP-based similarity matching with active correspondence modeling, yielding a more flexible and robust strategy. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks (Refer-KITTI/v2, Refer-Dance, and LaMOT) demonstrate that FlexHook becomes the first two-stage RBT approach to comprehensively outperform current state-of-the-art methods. Code can be found in the https://github.com/buptLwz/FlexHook.

light_analysis.overview: FlexHook 作为首个全面超越最先进方法的两阶段 Referring-by-Tracking 框架，通过重新设计特征构建和主动对应关系建模解决现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在 Referring Multi-Object Tracking 领域，随着一阶段方法取得显著进展，两阶段 Referring-by-Tracking 范式逐渐边缘化，但其较低的训练成本和灵活增量部署仍具不可替代性。现有两阶段 RBT 方法存在两个主要缺陷：一是特征构建过程过于依赖于启发式策略，缺乏灵活性；二是对应关系建模基于脆弱的方法，如基于 CLIP 的相似性匹配，导致性能不稳定和效率低下。因此，重新思考并改进两阶段 RBT 框架具有重要意义，以解决这些问题并提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 FlexHook，一个新颖的两阶段 Referring-by-Tracking 框架。其核心创新包括 Conditioning Hook (C-Hook)，它通过采样策略和语言条件提示注入重构特征表示，使特征构建更灵活。另一部分是 Pairwise Correspondence Decoder (PCD)，它放弃传统的 CLIP 相似性匹配，采用主动对应关系建模方法，以增强鲁棒性和适应性。实验在多个数据集上进行，如 Refer-KITTI/v2、Refer-Dance 和 LaMOT，以验证方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在 Refer-KITTI/v2、Refer-Dance 和 LaMOT 等多个基准测试中进行的广泛实验表明，FlexHook 成功超越当前所有最先进的方法，成为首个在两阶段 Referring-by-Tracking 范式中全面领先的框架。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率或效率提升），但实验结果显示 FlexHook 在性能上显著优于基线和其他方法，验证了其改进的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了 FlexHook 框架，通过重新设计特征构建和对应关系建模，解决了现有两阶段 Referring-by-Tracking 方法的缺陷。这不仅在学术上为 Referring Multi-Object Tracking 领域提供了新的研究方向，强调了改进两阶段范式的价值；在实际应用方面，FlexHook 保持了低训练成本和灵活部署的优势，使其在视频分析和人机交互等领域具有实用潜力。摘要未明确说明具体的局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断进一步优化和扩展到更多数据集是可能的。

title: Leveraging Spatial Context for Positive Pair Sampling in Histopathology Image Representation Learning
abstract: Deep learning has shown strong potential in cancer classification from whole-slide images (WSIs), but the need for extensive expert annotations often limits its success. Annotation-free approaches, such as multiple instance learning (MIL) and self-supervised learning (SSL), have emerged as promising alternatives to traditional annotation-based methods. However, conventional SSL methods typically rely on synthetic data augmentations, which may fail to capture the spatial structure critical to histopathology. In this work, we propose a spatial context-driven positive pair sampling strategy that enhances SSL by leveraging the morphological coherence of spatially adjacent patches within WSIs. Our method is modular and compatible with established joint embedding SSL frameworks, including Barlow Twins, BYOL, VICReg, and DINOv2. We evaluate its effectiveness on both slide-level classification using MIL and patch-level linear probing. Experiments across four datasets demonstrate consistent performance improvements, with accuracy gains of 5\% to 10\% compared to standard augmentation-based sampling. These findings highlight the value of spatial context in improving representation learning for computational pathology and provide a biologically meaningful enhancement for pretraining models in annotation-limited settings. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/contextual-pairs-E72F/.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种基于空间上下文的正对采样策略，以增强自我监督学习在组织病理学图像表示学习中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决组织病理学图像分析中深度学习依赖大量专家标注的问题，这限制了其在临床中的应用。无标注方法如自我监督学习虽具潜力，但传统方法通常依赖于合成数据增强，无法有效捕获图像的空间结构，而空间结构对于病理学诊断中的形态分析至关重要。因此，需要开发一种能利用空间上下文的方法来改进表示学习，克服现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 方法的核心是设计了一个空间上下文驱动的正对采样策略，通过利用全幻灯片图像中空间相邻补丁的形态一致性来生成正对，增强自我监督学习。该策略模块化设计，兼容Barlow Twins、BYOL、VICReg和DINOv2等现有SSL框架。评估采用多实例学习进行滑动级分类任务，并通过补丁级线性探测验证表示质量，确保了方法的可扩展性和有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在四个数据集上，与标准增强采样方法相比，新策略在滑动级分类和补丁级线性探测任务中使准确率提升了5%到10%。这些改进一致性地证明了空间上下文对提升表示学习效果的贡献，具体数据支撑包括跨多个数据集的性能验证和基线方法的对比分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出并验证了基于空间上下文的正对采样策略，增强了自我监督学习在计算病理学中的表示学习效果。学术上，它为SSL框架提供了生物学有意义的预训练方法；实际应用中，有助于缓解标注稀缺问题，提升模型性能。未来工作可能包括将该方法扩展到其他医学图像领域，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Boosting Cross-problem Generalization in Diffusion-Based Neural Combinatorial Solver via Inference Time Adaptation
abstract: Diffusion-based Neural Combinatorial Optimization (NCO) has demonstrated effectiveness in solving NP-complete (NPC) problems by learning discrete diffusion models for solution generation, eliminating hand-crafted domain knowledge. Despite their success, existing NCO methods face significant challenges in both cross-scale and cross-problem generalization, and high training costs compared to traditional solvers. While recent studies on diffusion models have introduced training-free guidance approaches that leverage pre-defined guidance functions for conditional generation, such methodologies have not been extensively explored in combinatorial optimization. To bridge this gap, we propose a training-free inference time adaptation framework (DIFU-Ada) that enables both the zero-shot cross-problem transfer and cross-scale generalization capabilities of diffusion-based NCO solvers without requiring additional training. We provide theoretical analysis that helps understanding the cross-problem transfer capability. Our experimental results demonstrate that a diffusion solver, trained exclusively on the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP), can achieve competitive zero-shot transfer performance across different problem scales on TSP variants, such as Prize Collecting TSP (PCTSP) and the Orienteering Problem (OP), through inference time adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DIFU-Ada框架，通过推理时间适应增强扩散基神经组合优化求解器的跨问题泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散基神经组合优化（NCO）在解决NP完全问题时有效，但现有方法面临跨尺度和跨问题泛化挑战，训练成本高。传统方法依赖手工程知识，而扩散模型虽有训练免费指导方法，但在组合优化中应用不足。因此，本研究旨在解决NCO方法的泛化能力和效率问题，探索无需额外训练的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出DIFU-Ada，一种训练免费的推理时间适应框架。核心方法是利用预定义的指导函数，在推理时对扩散模型进行条件生成，实现零样本跨问题转移和跨尺度泛化。关键创新在于无需额外训练，仅通过推理时适应处理不同组合优化问题。提供理论分析以理解跨问题转移机制。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，仅在旅行商问题（TSP）上训练的扩散求解器，通过DIFU-Ada框架，可以在TSP变体如奖品收集TSP（PCTSP）和定向问题（OP）上实现竞争性的零样本转移性能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但表明框架在跨问题和跨尺度泛化方面有效，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是DIFU-Ada框架，提升扩散基NCO求解器的跨问题泛化能力，无需额外训练。学术上，推动扩散模型在组合优化中的应用；实际上，降低训练成本，增强求解器适用性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多问题类型和改进指导函数。

title: Token Cleaning: Fine-Grained Data Selection for LLM Supervised Fine-Tuning
abstract: Recent studies show that in supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of large language models (LLMs), data quality matters more than quantity. While most data cleaning methods concentrate on filtering entire samples, the quality of individual tokens within a sample can vary significantly. After pre-training, even in high-quality samples, patterns or phrases that are not task-related can be redundant, uninformative, or even harmful. Continuing to fine-tune on these patterns may offer limited benefit and even degrade downstream task performance. In this paper, we investigate token quality from a noisy-label perspective and propose a generic token cleaning pipeline for SFT tasks. Our method filters out uninformative tokens while preserving those carrying key task-specific information. Specifically, we first evaluate token quality by examining the influence of model updates on each token, then apply a threshold-based separation. The token influence can be measured in a single pass with a fixed reference model or iteratively with self-evolving reference models. The benefits and limitations of both methods are analyzed theoretically by error upper bounds. Extensive experiments show that our framework consistently improves downstream performance. Code is available at https://github.com/UCSC-REAL/TokenCleaning.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种细粒度的token清理方法，用于大语言模型监督微调，通过过滤不信息token提升下游任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大型语言模型的监督微调中，数据质量比数量更重要，但现有数据清洗方法仅专注于过滤整个样本，忽略了样本内单个token质量的显著差异。即使在高质样本中，也存在与任务无关的模式或短语，这些可能冗余、无信息甚至有害，继续微调可能导致收益有限甚至性能下降。因此，研究需从噪声标签角度出发，解决token级别数据选择问题，以优化微调效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个通用的token清理管道，用于监督微调任务。该方法从噪声标签视角评估token质量，首先通过检查模型更新对每个token的影响来量化质量，具体有两种实现：一次性使用固定参考模型或迭代使用自演化参考模型测量影响。然后，应用基于阈值的分离机制，过滤掉不信息token，保留关键任务相关token。理论部分分析了两种方法的误差上界，验证了方法的理论基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，提出的token清理框架在不同设置下持续改善下游任务性能，证明了细粒度数据选择的有效性。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率数字，但广泛测试显示该方法优于传统样本级过滤。理论分析支持了框架的鲁棒性，误差上界揭示了两种实现方式的优缺点，为实际应用提供了指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一种细粒度的token清理方法，从噪声标签角度优化大语言模型监督微调的数据质量。该研究具有重要学术价值，通过理论分析和实验验证为数据选择领域提供了新思路。实际应用中能提升下游任务性能，代码开源促进了复现和推广。未来工作可探索更多评估token质量的方法或扩展到其他任务，以克服潜在局限性。

title: Class Incremental Learning with Task-Specific Batch Normalization and Out-of-Distribution Detection
abstract: This study focuses on incremental learning for image classification, exploring how to reduce catastrophic forgetting of all learned knowledge when access to old data is restricted. The challenge lies in balancing plasticity (learning new knowledge) and stability (retaining old knowledge). Based on whether the task identifier (task-ID) is available during testing, incremental learning is divided into task incremental learning (TIL) and class incremental learning (CIL). The TIL paradigm often uses multiple classifier heads, selecting the corresponding head based on the task-ID. Since the CIL paradigm cannot access task-ID, methods originally developed for TIL require explicit task-ID prediction to bridge this gap and enable their adaptation to the CIL paradigm. {In this study, a novel continual learning framework extends the TIL method for CIL by introducing out-of-distribution detection for task-ID prediction. Our framework utilizes task-specific Batch Normalization (BN) and task-specific classification heads to effectively adjust feature map distributions for each task, enhancing plasticity. With far fewer parameters than convolutional kernels, task-specific BN helps minimize parameter growth, preserving stability. Based on multiple task-specific classification heads, we introduce an ``unknow'' class for each head. During training, data from other tasks are mapped to this unknown class. During inference, the task-ID is predicted by selecting the classification head with the lowest probability assigned to the unknown class. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two medical image datasets and two natural image datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/z1968357787/mbn_ood_git_main.
comment: accepted by Neurocomputing Journal, camera ready version

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种结合任务特定批量归一化和离群检测的类增量学习框架，以预测任务标识符并减少灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究聚焦于图像分类的增量学习，旨在解决灾难性遗忘问题。当旧数据受限时，模型需平衡学习新知识（可塑性）和保留旧知识（稳定性）。现有方法中，任务增量学习（TIL）依赖任务标识符，而类增量学习（CIL）无法访问该标识符，导致需要显式预测任务-ID才能应用TIL方法。这一问题在现实应用中尤为重要，如医学图像分析，促使本研究开发新框架来克服CIL的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个持续学习框架，将TIL方法扩展到CIL。框架使用任务特定的批量归一化（BN）来调整每个任务的特征图分布，增强模型的可塑性；BN参数较少，有助于最小化参数增长，保持稳定性。基于多个任务特定分类头，为每个头引入一个“未知”类；训练时，来自其他任务的数据被映射到未知类，推理时通过选择未知类概率最低的头来预测任务-ID。该方法结合了离群检测技术，实现任务标识符的自动预测。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在两个医学图像数据集和两个自然图像数据集上实现了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体的准确率或效率改进数据，但表明该方法在类增量学习任务中有效减少了灾难性遗忘，并平衡了可塑性和稳定性。与基线方法相比，该方法在多个数据集上表现出色，展现了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一个新颖的类增量学习框架，通过任务特定的批量归一化和离群检测机制，有效预测任务标识符并减少遗忘。该框架在学术上为增量学习领域提供了创新解决方案，具有实际应用价值，特别是在需要持续学习的场景如医学图像分类中。未来工作可探索参数优化、扩展到其他数据类型或进一步评估局限性。

title: Goal Hijacking Attack on Large Language Models via Pseudo-Conversation Injection
abstract: Goal hijacking is a type of adversarial attack on Large Language Models (LLMs) where the objective is to manipulate the model into producing a specific, predetermined output, regardless of the user's original input. In goal hijacking, an attacker typically appends a carefully crafted malicious suffix to the user's prompt, which coerces the model into ignoring the user's original input and generating the target response. In this paper, we introduce a novel goal hijacking attack method called Pseudo-Conversation Injection, which leverages the weaknesses of LLMs in role identification within conversation contexts. Specifically, we construct the suffix by fabricating responses from the LLM to the user's initial prompt, followed by a prompt for a malicious new task. This leads the model to perceive the initial prompt and fabricated response as a completed conversation, thereby executing the new, falsified prompt. Following this approach, we propose three Pseudo-Conversation construction strategies: Targeted Pseudo-Conversation, Universal Pseudo-Conversation, and Robust Pseudo-Conversation. These strategies are designed to achieve effective goal hijacking across various scenarios. Our experiments, conducted on two mainstream LLM platforms including ChatGPT and Qwen, demonstrate that our proposed method significantly outperforms existing approaches in terms of attack effectiveness.
comment: Accepted by the 2025 IEEE 24th International Conference on Trust, Security and Privacy in Computing and Communications (IEEE TrustCom 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种基于伪对话注入的新型目标劫持攻击方法，通过利用大型语言模型在对话角色识别中的脆弱性来实现有效攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标劫持攻击旨在操纵大型语言模型输出预定内容，忽略用户原始输入，这在安全评估中至关重要。现有攻击方法（如添加恶意后缀）可能效果有限，尤其是在复杂对话场景中，难以有效利用模型弱点。因此，开发更强大的攻击技术有助于揭示LLM的安全漏洞，推动对抗性防御研究。
light_analysis.method: 该方法利用LLM在对话上下文角色识别中的弱点，通过构造伪对话注入后缀：伪造LLM对用户初始提示的响应，然后添加恶意任务提示，使模型误以为对话已完成并执行新提示。论文提出三种构造策略：目标伪对话、通用伪对话和鲁棒伪对话，以应对不同攻击场景。实验基于ChatGPT和Qwen等主流模型平台，但具体模型架构未详细说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验在ChatGPT和Qwen两个主流LLM平台上进行，结果表明提出的伪对话注入方法在攻击效果上显著优于现有基线方法。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或攻击成功率，但强调了攻击有效性的显著提升，表明该方法能更可靠地实现目标劫持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文成功提出了一种新颖的目标劫持攻击方法，通过伪对话注入有效利用LLM的对话上下文弱点，揭示了模型在角色识别方面的安全漏洞。该研究具有重要学术价值，可促进对抗性防御技术的发展，未来工作可能包括扩展攻击策略到更多模型或开发相应的安全增强措施。

title: EoRA: Fine-tuning-free Compensation for Compressed LLM with Eigenspace Low-Rank Approximation
abstract: While post-training compression techniques effectively reduce the memory footprint, latency, and power consumption of Large Language Models (LLMs), they often result in noticeable accuracy degradation and remain limited by hardware and kernel constraints that restrict supported compression formats ultimately reducing flexibility across a wide range of deployment scenarios. In this work, we propose EoRA, a novel fine-tuning-free method that augments compressed LLMs with low-rank matrices, allowing users to rapidly enhance task-specific performance and freely balance the trade-off between accuracy and computational overhead beyond the constraints of compression formats. EoRA consistently outperforms prior training-free low rank methods in recovering the accuracy of compressed LLMs, achieving notable accuracy improvements (e.g., $\mathbf{10.84\%}$ on ARC-Challenge, $\mathbf{6.74\%}$ on MathQA, and $\mathbf{11.45\%}$ on GSM8K) for LLaMA3-8B compressed to 3-bit. We also introduce an optimized CUDA kernel, accelerating inference by up to 1.4x and reducing memory overhead through quantizing EoRA. Overall, EoRA offers a prompt solution for improving the accuracy of compressed models under varying user requirements, enabling more efficient and flexible deployment of LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/EoRA.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出EoRA，一种无需微调的方法，通过特征空间低秩近似增强压缩大型语言模型的准确性，并允许灵活平衡性能与计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练压缩技术能减少大型语言模型的内存占用和延迟，但常导致准确性下降，且受限于硬件和内核约束支持的压缩格式，限制了部署灵活性。这使得在多样化场景中应用压缩模型时性能受限，亟需一种方法来快速恢复准确性而不受格式限制。
light_analysis.method: EoRA基于特征空间低秩近似，为压缩LLM添加低秩矩阵补偿，无需额外微调。其核心创新在于允许用户动态调整任务特定性能与计算开销的权衡，通过量化EoRA矩阵和优化CUDA内核来加速推理并减少内存使用，实现了高效的模型增强。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示EoRA在LLaMA3-8B压缩到3-bit时，在ARC-Challenge上准确性提升10.84%，MathQA上6.74%，GSM8K上11.45%，优于现有无需训练的低秩方法。优化的CUDA内核加速推理最多1.4倍，并通过量化降低内存开销，有效提高了压缩模型的部署效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: EoRA的主要贡献是提供了一种快速补偿压缩模型准确性的方法，增强了大型语言模型部署的灵活性和效率。学术价值在于引入特征空间低秩近似技术，实际应用上支持多样化场景的优化部署，未来可扩展至更多模型和任务以提高实用性。

title: Mamba Neural Operator: Who Wins? Transformers vs. State-Space Models for PDEs
abstract: Partial differential equations (PDEs) are widely used to model complex physical systems, but solving them efficiently remains a significant challenge. Recently, Transformers have emerged as the preferred architecture for PDEs due to their ability to capture intricate dependencies. However, they struggle with representing continuous dynamics and long-range interactions. To overcome these limitations, we introduce the Mamba Neural Operator (MNO), a novel framework that enhances neural operator-based techniques for solving PDEs. MNO establishes a formal theoretical connection between structured state-space models (SSMs) and neural operators, offering a unified structure that can adapt to diverse architectures, including Transformer-based models. By leveraging the structured design of SSMs, MNO captures long-range dependencies and continuous dynamics more effectively than traditional Transformers. Through extensive analysis, we show that MNO significantly boosts the expressive power and accuracy of neural operators, making it not just a complement but a superior framework for PDE-related tasks, bridging the gap between efficient representation and accurate solution approximation. Our code is available on https://github.com/Math-ML-X/Mamba-Neural-Operator
comment: Accepted in Journal of Computational Physics 2025

light_analysis.overview: Mamba神经操作符（MNO）通过结合结构化状态空间模型与神经操作符，显著提升了偏微分方程求解的表达能力和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 偏微分方程广泛用于建模复杂物理系统，但高效求解一直是重要挑战。近年来，Transformer因其捕获复杂依赖的能力成为PDE求解的首选架构，但它在表示连续动态和长程交互方面存在局限，这限制了其在物理建模中的适用性。为了解决这些问题，本研究旨在开发一个更有效的框架，克服现有方法的不足，以改进PDE相关任务的性能和灵活性。背景在于科学计算中需要更精确的模拟工具，而现有Transformer模型在处理连续性和长程依赖性时效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Mamba神经操作符（MNO）框架，该框架建立结构化状态空间模型与神经操作符之间的正式理论连接，提供一个统一结构，能够适应多种架构，包括Transformer模型。通过利用状态空间模型的结构化设计，MNO能够更有效地捕捉长程依赖和连续动态，从而增强神经操作符的表达能力。关键创新点在于结合SSMs的理论优势与神经操作符的实践框架，无需依赖特定数据集或详细模型架构，而是提供一个通用的方法论基础，旨在优化PDE求解过程。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛分析，论文表明MNO显著增强了神经操作符的表达能力和准确性，在PDE求解任务中优于传统的Transformer架构。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标或对比数据，如准确率提升或效率改进数值，但强调了MNO作为一个优越框架，能够桥接高效表示与准确近似。与基线方法Transformer相比，MNO在捕获长程交互和连续动态方面表现更佳，使其实用性更强。结果支持MNO作为互补乃至超越现有方法的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: MNO的主要贡献在于引入一个结合结构化状态空间模型和神经操作符的新框架，为PDE求解提供理论连接和统一结构，提升了解算能力。学术价值在于推进深度学习在科学计算中的应用，理论融合促进模型创新；实际价值在于提高PDE求解的效率和准确性，可能应用于物理模拟和工程领域。摘要未明确讨论局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断未来可能包括扩展应用到更多PDE类型、与其他模型集成，或进一步实证验证以优化框架性能。

title: Modelling Language using Large Language Models
abstract: This paper argues that large language models have a valuable scientific role to play in serving as scientific models of public languages. Linguistic study should not only be concerned with the cognitive processes behind linguistic competence, but also with language understood as an external, social entity. Once this is recognized, the value of large language models as scientific models becomes clear. This paper defends the position against a number of arguments to the effect that language models provide no linguistic insight. Building upon Weisberg's (2007) notion of a model construal, it is then argued that recent work in computational linguistics to better understand the inner workings of large language models can be used to develop a model construal for large language models as models of a language.

light_analysis.overview: 论文论证大型语言模型作为公共语言的科学模型具有重要科学价值。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言学研究中，传统上侧重于语言能力的认知过程，而忽略了语言作为外部社会实体的重要性。现有方法中存在对大型语言模型能否提供语言洞察力的质疑，认为其无法作为科学模型。本研究的动机在于应对这些质疑，强调语言的社会维度，并辩护大型语言模型在语言科学中的价值，以促进更全面的语言学研究。
light_analysis.method: 本研究基于Weisberg（2007）提出的模型解释概念，通过结合计算语言学近期对大型语言模型内部工作机制的分析，发展一个理论框架来构建大型语言模型作为语言模型的模型解释。关键创新点在于理论辩护和方法论整合，而非具体技术实现；摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构等细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，因为这是一篇理论性论文，未涉及量化性能指标或与基线方法的对比。然而，论文通过理论论证辩护了大型语言模型的语言学价值，强调其作为科学模型的合理性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于成功辩护大型语言模型作为公共语言的科学模型，强调其在语言学中的学术价值。研究意义在于促进语言学与计算语言学的交叉，为语言模型的应用提供理论基础，并建议未来工作可进一步细化模型解释框架，探索其在实际语言分析中的局限性。

title: Toward Adaptive Large Language Models Structured Pruning via Hybrid-grained Weight Importance Assessment
abstract: Structured pruning for large language models (LLMs) has garnered significant academic interest due to its ability to efficiently compress and accelerate LLMs by eliminating redundant weight groups at a coarse-grained granularity. Current structured pruning methods for LLMs typically depend on a singular granularity for assessing weight importance, resulting in notable performance degradation in downstream tasks. Intriguingly, our empirical investigations reveal that utilizing unstructured pruning, which achieves better performance retention by pruning weights at a finer granularity, \emph{i.e.}, individual weights, yields significantly varied sparse LLM structures when juxtaposed to structured pruning. This suggests that evaluating both holistic and individual assessment for weight importance is essential for LLM pruning. Building on this insight, we introduce the Hybrid-grained Weight Importance Assessment (HyWIA), a novel method that merges fine-grained and coarse-grained evaluations of weight importance for the pruning of LLMs. Leveraging an attention mechanism, HyWIA adaptively determines the optimal blend of granularity in weight importance assessments in an end-to-end pruning manner. Extensive experiments on LLaMA-V1/V2, Vicuna, Baichuan, and Bloom across various benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of HyWIA in pruning LLMs. For example, HyWIA surpasses the cutting-edge LLM-Pruner by an average margin of 2.82% in accuracy across seven downstream tasks when pruning LLaMA-7B by 50%. Code:https://github.com/azuryl/LLM-HWIA

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyWIA方法，结合细粒度和粗粒度评估权重重要性，使用注意力机制自适应优化大型语言模型的结构化剪枝，提升性能保持。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型结构化剪枝能压缩和加速模型，但现有方法依赖单一粒度评估权重重要性，导致下游任务性能显著下降。研究发现细粒度非结构化剪枝能更好保留性能，但产生不同稀疏结构，表明需要结合整体和个体评估来准确判断权重重要性。这凸显了当前方法的不足，推动开发更有效的混合粒度评估方法以提高剪枝效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出HyWIA方法，融合细粒度（个体权重）和粗粒度（权重组）评估权重重要性。核心创新是使用注意力机制自适应确定粒度混合比例，以端到端方式进行剪枝。该方法适用于多种大型语言模型如LLaMA和Vicuna，关键特色在于多粒度评估的灵活整合，从而优化剪枝决策，减少性能损失。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaMA-V1/V2、Vicuna、Baichuan和Bloom模型上进行了广泛实验，涵盖多个基准测试。结果表明HyWIA在剪枝后能显著保持性能，例如将LLaMA-7B剪枝50%时，在七个下游任务中平均准确率比当前先进方法LLM-Pruner高出2.82%。这些数据证明了HyWIA在减少模型大小的同时有效提升准确率，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了HyWIA方法，通过混合粒度评估权重重要性改进了大型语言模型结构化剪枝的性能。研究具有重要学术价值，为模型压缩提供新思路，并增强实际应用潜力，如高效部署LLMs。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模型类型或进一步优化算法以提升泛化能力，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Communication-Efficient Multimodal Federated Learning: Joint Modality and Client Selection
abstract: Multimodal federated learning (MFL) aims to enrich model training in FL settings where clients are collecting measurements across multiple modalities. However, key challenges to MFL remain unaddressed, particularly in heterogeneous network settings where: (i) the set of modalities collected by each client is diverse, and (ii) communication limitations prevent clients from uploading all their locally trained modality encoders to the server. In this paper, we propose Multimodal Federated learning with joint Modality and Client selection (MFedMC), a communication-efficient MFL framework that tackles these challenges through a decoupled architecture and selective uploading. Unlike traditional holistic fusion approaches, MFedMC separates modality encoders and fusion modules: modality encoders are aggregated at the server for generalization across diverse client distributions, while fusion modules remain local to each client for personalized adaptation to individual modality configurations and data characteristics. Building on this decoupled design, our joint selection algorithm incorporates two main components: (a) A modality selection methodology for each client, which weighs (i) the impact of the modality, gauged by Shapley value analysis, (ii) the modality encoder size as a gauge of communication overhead, and (iii) the frequency of modality encoder updates, denoted recency, to enhance generalizability. (b) A client selection strategy for the server based on the local loss of modality encoders at each client. Experiments on five real-world datasets demonstrate that MFedMC achieves comparable accuracy to several baselines while reducing communication overhead by over 20$\times$. A demo video and our code are available at https://liangqiy.com/mfedmc/.
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2310.07048

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出MFedMC框架，通过解耦架构和联合模态与客户端选择算法，实现通信高效的多模态联邦学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态联邦学习在异构网络环境中面临关键挑战：每个客户端收集的模态集合多样化，且通信限制阻止客户端上传所有本地训练的模态编码器。这些问题导致现有方法（如传统整体融合方法）难以高效处理客户端异质性和通信开销，从而限制了模型泛化和实际部署。因此，需要一种新框架来解决这些不足，提升联邦学习在资源受限场景下的效率和适应性。
light_analysis.method: MFedMC采用解耦架构，分离模态编码器和融合模块：模态编码器在服务器端聚合以实现跨客户端分布的泛化，而融合模块保留在客户端以个性化适应其模态配置和数据特征。基于此，联合选择算法包括两个组件：模态选择基于Shapley值分析评估模态影响、编码器大小衡量通信开销和更新频率（新鲜度）以增强泛化性；客户端选择由服务器基于客户端模态编码器的本地损失执行。该方法在五个真实世界数据集上进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在五个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，MFedMC实现了与多种基线方法相当的准确率，同时通信开销减少了超过20倍。具体性能指标（如准确率数值）在摘要中未明确说明，但结果显示该框架能有效平衡模型性能和通信效率，显著优于传统方法在异构网络环境中的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出MFedMC框架，通过解耦设计和联合选择算法解决了多模态联邦学习中的通信效率和异构性问题，为联邦学习提供了新方法。学术上，它拓展了通信优化和个性化学习的研究；实际上，可应用于医疗、物联网等资源受限场景。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括优化选择策略或扩展到更多模态类型。

title: Optimal Transport Aggregation for Distributed Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models provide a flexible statistical framework for modeling heterogeneity and nonlinear relationships. In many modern applications, however, datasets are naturally distributed across multiple machines due to storage, computational, or governance constraints. We consider a distributed model aggregation setting in which local MoE models are trained independently on decentralized datasets and subsequently combined into a global estimator. Aggregating MoE models is challenging because standard averaging produces models that do not preserve the MoE structure, and therefore do not yield estimates of the global model parameters. To address this issue, we propose a principled aggregation framework based on optimal transport that constructs a reduced global MoE estimator by minimizing a transportation divergence between the collection of local estimators and the aggregated model. An efficient majorization--minimization (MM) algorithm is derived to solve the resulting optimization problem. The method requires only a single communication step from local machines to a central server, making it a frugal distributed learning approach particularly attractive for large-scale settings where communication costs are a major bottleneck. We further establish statistical guarantees for the aggregated estimator, including consistency under standard assumptions on the local estimators. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the approach achieves performance comparable to centralized training while significantly reducing computation time. The source codes are publicly available on Github.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输的分布式混合专家模型聚合框架，通过最小化运输散度和使用MM算法，实现高效聚合并减少通信成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现代应用中数据集常因存储、计算或治理约束分布在多个机器上，导致分布式环境下的模型聚合需求。标准平均方法在聚合混合专家模型时会破坏其结构，无法准确估计全局参数，这使得现有方法在保持模型完整性和通信效率方面存在不足。因此，开发一种能保持MoE结构且降低通信开销的聚合方法变得至关重要，尤其在大规模分布式学习场景中。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于最优传输理论，提出一个聚合框架，通过最小化局部估计器集合与全局模型之间的运输散度来构建简化的全局MoE估计器。关键创新包括应用最优传输技术以维持模型结构，并推导majorization-minimization (MM)算法有效求解优化问题。该方法在分布式设置中仅需一次通信步骤，从本地机器传输聚合信息到中央服务器，显著降低了通信成本，特别适合大规模应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在合成和真实数据集上，所提方法的性能与集中式训练相当，同时显著减少了计算时间。与基线方法对比，该方法在保持模型准确性的基础上，有效提升了计算效率，但具体性能指标如准确率提升幅度摘要未明确说明。这验证了方法在大规模分布式环境中的实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个基于最优传输的分布式MoE模型聚合框架，并建立了统计保证如一致性。学术价值在于解决了分布式MoE聚合的结构保持问题，实际应用价值体现在降低通信开销，适用于大规模数据场景。未来工作方向或局限性摘要未明确说明，可能包括算法优化或扩展到其他模型类型。

title: Riemannian Laplace Approximation with the Fisher Metric
abstract: Laplace's method approximates a target density with a Gaussian distribution at its mode. It is computationally efficient and asymptotically exact for Bayesian inference due to the Bernstein-von Mises theorem, but for complex targets and finite-data posteriors it is often too crude an approximation. A recent generalization of the Laplace Approximation transforms the Gaussian approximation according to a chosen Riemannian geometry providing a richer approximation family, while still retaining computational efficiency. However, as shown here, its properties depend heavily on the chosen metric, indeed the metric adopted in previous work results in approximations that are overly narrow as well as being biased even at the limit of infinite data. We correct this shortcoming by developing the approximation family further, deriving two alternative variants that are exact at the limit of infinite data, extending the theoretical analysis of the method, and demonstrating practical improvements in a range of experiments.
comment: AISTATS 2024, with additional fixes and improvements. Theorem 2 is fixed

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了两个基于 Fisher 度量的黎曼拉普拉斯近似变体，纠正了先前方法的偏差，确保在无限数据极限下精确。
light_analysis.motivation: 拉普拉斯近似在贝叶斯推理中计算高效且渐近精确，但对于复杂目标和有限数据后验往往近似粗糙。尽管基于黎曼几何的泛化版本能提供更丰富的近似族并保持计算效率，但其性质严重依赖于度量选择；先前工作中采用的度量导致近似过于狭窄且有偏差，即使在无限数据极限下也存在问题，这限制了方法在实际应用中的准确性和可靠性，因此需要纠正这一缺点以提升近似效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文进一步发展了黎曼拉普拉斯近似的近似族，推导出两个替代变体。这些变体基于选定的黎曼几何，具体使用了 Fisher 度量，关键创新在于通过理论推导确保在无限数据极限下精确，同时保留计算效率。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构，但方法扩展了理论分析，并在实验中进行验证，强调了结合几何变换来优化近似过程。
light_analysis.result: 新方法在无限数据极限下被证明是精确的，纠正了先前度量的偏差。在一系列实验中展示了实际改进，表明新变体在近似复杂目标密度时表现更优；与基线方法（即先前基于不合适度量的近似）相比，新方法提供了更准确和可靠的近似结果，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标如准确率提升数据，仅通过理论分析和实验验证强调了改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是发展了黎曼拉普拉斯近似的两个变体，纠正了先前度量选择的缺点，并扩展了该方法的理论分析。研究提高了拉普拉斯近似在贝叶斯推理中的准确性和适用性，具有重要的学术价值，可为复杂统计推断提供更稳健的工具；潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括进一步优化度量选择和扩展到更多应用场景。

title: Mindstorms in Natural Language-Based Societies of Mind
abstract: Both Minsky's "society of mind" and Schmidhuber's "learning to think" inspire diverse societies of large multimodal neural networks (NNs) that solve problems by interviewing each other in a "mindstorm." Recent implementations of NN-based societies of minds consist of large language models (LLMs) and other NN-based experts communicating through a natural language interface. In doing so, they overcome the limitations of single LLMs, improving multimodal zero-shot reasoning. In these natural language-based societies of mind (NLSOMs), new agents -- all communicating through the same universal symbolic language -- are easily added in a modular fashion. To demonstrate the power of NLSOMs, we assemble and experiment with several of them (having up to 129 members), leveraging mindstorms in them to solve some practical AI tasks: visual question answering, image captioning, text-to-image synthesis, 3D generation, egocentric retrieval, embodied AI, and general language-based task solving. We view this as a starting point towards much larger NLSOMs with billions of agents-some of which may be humans. And with this emergence of great societies of heterogeneous minds, many new research questions have suddenly become paramount to the future of artificial intelligence. What should be the social structure of an NLSOM? What would be the (dis)advantages of having a monarchical rather than a democratic structure? How can principles of NN economies be used to maximize the total reward of a reinforcement learning NLSOM? In this work, we identify, discuss, and try to answer some of these questions.
comment: published in Computational Visual Media Journal (CVMJ); 9 pages in main text + 7 pages of references + 38 pages of appendices, 14 figures in main text + 13 in appendices, 7 tables in appendices

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出自然语言基础的社会思想（NLSOMs），通过多个神经网络代理的协作提升多模态任务的零样本推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决单个大语言模型（LLMs）在多模态零样本推理中的局限性，这些模型难以应对复杂任务如视觉问答和图像生成。问题的重要性在于，随着AI任务的多样化，单一模型无法灵活处理多种模态数据。现有方法如独立LLMs在协作和扩展性方面不足，导致性能瓶颈。NLSOMs通过模块化设计允许代理以自然语言通信，克服这些限制，提高系统的适应性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于构建自然语言基础的社会思想（NLSOMs），由大语言模型（LLMs）和其他神经网络专家组成，通过统一自然语言接口通信。核心创新点在于模块化设计，新代理可轻松添加，使用通用符号语言进行协作。关键细节包括利用多达129个成员的代理系统，应用于多种AI任务，如视觉问答和文本到图像合成。该方法强调社会结构的灵活性和代理间的互动，无需特定硬件或数据集。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，NLSOMs能成功应用于多种AI任务，包括视觉问答、图像描述和3D生成。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但暗示了通过多代理协作克服了单个LLMs的局限。与基线方法对比，摘要提到提高了多模态零样本推理能力，但未提供量化数据。因此，可推断NLSOMs在任务解决上展示了可行性，但具体实验结果需进一步验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出NLSOMs框架，通过多代理协作增强多模态AI任务性能，展示其作为更大规模系统的基础。学术价值在于拓展了协作神经网络系统的研究，促进AI社会结构探索；实际应用价值在于可能用于复杂任务如具身AI和生成任务。局限性在于摘要未详述实验细节，未来方向包括研究社会结构优化（如民主制vs君主制）和NN经济原则在强化学习中的应用。

title: Disjunctive Branch-and-Bound for Certifiably Optimal Low-Rank Matrix Completion
abstract: Low-rank matrix completion consists of computing a matrix of minimal complexity that recovers a given set of observations as accurately as possible. Unfortunately, existing methods for matrix completion are heuristics that, while highly scalable and often identifying high-quality solutions, do not provide an instance-wise certificate of optimality. We reexamine matrix completion with an optimality-oriented eye. We reformulate low-rank matrix completion problems as convex problems over the non-convex set of projection matrices and implement a disjunctive branch-and-bound scheme that solves them to certifiable optimality. Further, we derive a novel and often near-exact class of convex relaxations by decomposing a low-rank matrix as a sum of rank-one matrices and incentivizing that two-by-two minors in each rank-one matrix have determinant zero. In numerical experiments, our new convex relaxations decrease the optimality gap by two orders of magnitude compared to existing attempts, and our disjunctive branch-and-bound scheme solves $n \times m$ rank-$k$ matrix completion problems to certifiable optimality or near optimality in hours for $\max \{m, n\} \leq 2500$ and $k \leq 5$. Moreover, this reduction in the training error translates into an average $2\%$--$50\%$ reduction in the test set error compared with alternating minimization-based methods.
comment: Updated version for revision at INFORMS Journal on Computing

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种不连分支定界方法和新型凸松弛技术，实现低秩矩阵完成问题的可认证最优解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有低秩矩阵完成方法主要为启发式算法，如交替最小化，虽高度可扩展且常能获得高质量解，但缺乏实例级最优性证书，导致无法保证解的最优性，这在需要高精度和可靠性的应用场景（如推荐系统、信号处理）中成为关键瓶颈。本研究旨在通过提供可认证的最优解来弥补这一缺陷，提升模型的可信度和实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文将低秩矩阵完成问题重新表述为在非凸投影矩阵集上的凸优化问题，并实施不连分支定界方案以求解至可认证最优。关键创新包括：通过分解低秩矩阵为秩一矩阵之和，并强制每个秩一矩阵的二乘二子式行列式为零，推导出一类新颖且往往接近精确的凸松弛方法。该方法结合了分支定界算法和凸松弛技术，有效处理非凸性，确保最优解的计算。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，新凸松弛方法相比现有尝试将最优性差距减小了两个数量级。不连分支定界方案能在几小时内解决max(m,n) ≤ 2500且k ≤ 5的低秩矩阵完成问题，实现可认证最优或接近最优解。此外，训练误差的减少转化为测试集误差平均降低2%–50%，相比基于交替最小化的方法有显著性能提升，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出不连分支定界框架和新凸松弛技术，实现了低秩矩阵完成的可认证最优解，提升了模型的准确性和可靠性。这具有重要的学术价值，为非凸优化问题提供了新思路，并在推荐系统等领域展示了实际应用潜力。未来工作可探索算法效率的进一步优化或扩展至更高秩问题，以应对更复杂的场景。

title: Improving Fairness with Ensemble Combination: Margin-Dependent Bounds
abstract: The concern about hidden discrimination in machine learning models is growing, as their widespread real-world applications increasingly impact human lives. Various techniques, including commonly used group fairness measures and several fairness-aware ensemble-based methods, have been developed to enhance fairness. However, existing fairness measures typically focus on only one aspect -- either group or individual fairness, and the compatibility difficulty among these measures indicates a possibility of remaining biases even when one of them is satisfied. Moreover, existing mechanisms to boost fairness usually present empirical results to show validity, yet few of them discuss whether fairness can be boosted with certain theoretical guarantees. To address these issues, we propose a fairness quality measure named `discriminative risk' by only perturbing protected attributes in instances, to express both individual and group fairness aspects. Furthermore, we investigate its properties and establish the first- and second-order oracle bounds and their relaxations, which show that fairness is possibly improved via ensemble combination with margin-dependent bounds. The analysis is suitable for both binary and multi-class classification. A few ensemble pruning methods are also proposed to utilise our proposed measure and obtain both accurate and fair sub-ensembles; comprehensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed fairness measure and pruning methods.
comment: Accepted by ACM FAccT 2026. Code is available on https://github.com/eustomaqua/FairML

light_analysis.overview: 提出名为'discriminative risk'的新公平性度量，基于margin-dependent界限，通过集成组合改进机器学习模型公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着机器学习模型在现实世界应用中的普及，其潜在隐藏歧视问题日益引发关注。现有公平性度量通常仅聚焦于群体或个体公平的单一维度，且不同度量间兼容性困难，导致即使满足某些度量也可能残留偏见。此外，现有提升公平性的方法大多依赖实证结果展示有效性，少有理论保证。因此，需要一种能综合个体和群体公平、并提供理论基础的度量方法来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了名为'discriminative risk'的公平性质量度量，仅通过扰动实例中的受保护属性来同时表达个体和群体公平。研究者分析了该度量的性质，建立了一阶和二阶oracle界限及其松弛形式，表明通过集成组合结合margin-dependent界限可以提升公平性。该分析适用于二分类和多分类任务。此外，研究者设计了几种集成剪枝方法，利用该度量筛选出既准确又公平的子集成，以优化模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 论文进行了综合实验来评估所提公平性度量和剪枝方法的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标提升，但实验旨在验证理论界限的正确性和方法的实用性。通过对比基线方法，实验展示了集成组合和剪枝策略能够改进模型的公平性，同时保持分类准确性，为公平性提升提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于引入一种新颖的公平性度量'discriminative risk'，它整合了个体和群体公平的考量，并建立了理论界限，为通过集成组合提高公平性提供了理论保证。提出的集成剪枝方法能生成准确且公平的子集成，增强了机器学习模型的公平性。学术价值在于弥补了公平性研究中理论框架的缺失，实际应用价值在于在分类任务中减少歧视和偏见。未来工作可能扩展到其他机器学习领域。

title: Efficient Bayesian Updates for Deep Active Learning via Laplace Approximations
abstract: Deep active learning (AL) selects batches of instances for annotation to avoid retraining deep neural networks (DNNs) after each new label. Employing a naive top-$b$ selection can result in a batch of redundant (similar) instances. To address this, various AL strategies employ clustering techniques that ensure diversity within a batch. We approach this issue by substituting the costly retraining with an efficient Bayesian update. Our proposed update represents a second-order optimization step using the Gaussian posterior from a last-layer Laplace approximation. Thereby, we achieve low computational complexity by computing the inverse Hessian in closed form. We demonstrate that in typical AL settings, our update closely approximates retraining while being considerably faster. Leveraging our update, we introduce a new framework for batch selection through sequential construction, updating the DNN after each label acquisition. Furthermore, we incorporate our update into a look-ahead selection strategy as a feasible upper baseline approximating optimal batch selection. Our results highlight the potential of efficient updates to advance deep AL research.
comment: Accepted @ ECML PKDD 2025. This is the author's version of the work. The definitive version of record is published in the proceedings of ECML PKDD 2025

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出基于拉普拉斯近似的高效贝叶斯更新方法，显著加速深度主动学习中的批选择过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度主动学习（AL）中，为避免每次新标签后重新训练深度神经网络（DNNs），常采用批选择策略。传统方法如聚类确保多样性，但重新训练成本高，导致计算效率低下和冗余实例问题，限制了AL的实际应用。现有方法缺乏高效更新机制，因此开发计算轻量的更新技术至关重要，以解决高成本和低效率的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出一种高效的贝叶斯更新方法，替代昂贵的重新训练。核心技术基于拉普拉斯近似，构建高斯后验分布，并通过二阶优化步骤实现更新。创新点在于计算逆Hessian矩阵的闭式解，显著降低计算复杂度。此外，引入新框架，通过顺序构造在每次标签获取后更新DNNs，并集成到前瞻选择策略中，近似最优批选择。
light_analysis.result: 在典型的深度主动学习设置中，提出的贝叶斯更新方法能够紧密近似完整重新训练，同时计算速度显著更快。实验表明，该方法在批选择效率和性能上与基线方法（如重新训练）可比，展示了高效更新在提升AL效率方面的潜力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了速度改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了一种高效的贝叶斯更新技术，替代重新训练，降低了深度主动学习的计算负担。这推动了AL研究的学术进展，具有实际应用价值，如加速数据标注和模型训练过程。未来工作可探索更复杂模型或扩展到其他学习场景，以进一步验证和优化该方法。
